Fellow Conservative -

**Senator Mark Kelly caved under the pressure of Biden and Schumer.**

After months of dodging questions, Kelly finally confirmed what we all suspected: **he wants to nuke the filibuster so the left can federalize elections, add new blue states to the Union, and pack the Supreme Court.**

subject: NEW: Cuellar's ties to Azerbaijan oil company

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, by now you
know the FBI raided Rep. Henry Cuellar’s home and campaign office earlier
this week. Today, we learned the FBI investigation is about business
relationships in Azerbaijan.

We also JUST learned more about Henry Cuellar’s relationship with oil
executives in Azerbaijan. This just broke from The Intercept:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90857?refcode=em20220121-21608&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=21608%2E1203867%2EZAtdci ]Headline from the intercept: After forging ties with Azerbaijan oil
executives Rep. Henry Cuellar pushed nation's agenda in Congress

It’s an investigative report about a trip Cuellar took to Azerbaijan, the
murky web of funding and relationships Cuellar formed with oil executives,
and Cuellar’s subsequent advocacy for Azerbaijan oil interests.

Cuellar’s corporate-backed re-election campaign is in trouble, but he
still has a ton of campaign money to try and get through this news cycle.
But we can’t let him win re-election. We must send a flood of support to
Jessica Cisneros to ensure we can defeat Cuellar in this rapidly
approaching House primary.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90857?refcode=em20220121-21608&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21608%2E1203867%2EZAtdci ]Cuellar has millions, can you help Jessica close the gap at this
momentous point in the race? Rush a split donation to Jessica’s campaign
and Justice Democrats right now so we can defeat Cuellar.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90857?refcode=em20220121-21608&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21608%2E1203867%2EZAtdci ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=21608%2E1203867%2EZAtdci ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=21608%2E1203867%2EZAtdci ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220121-21608-footer&t=1024&refcode2=21608_1203867_ZAtdci&akid=21608%2E1203867%2EZAtdci

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=21608%2E1203867%2EZAtdci

body:
Sorry to email so late on Friday night, but this is important. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRS8oYaqmKDAGcnp-5cG0zyAQiloQ3IeCpfqmeHs2WAyyQaPR2rRG4LPrELA42DU9qVL7SB31FhXNVWAH_hv2MIdUgYhElDjwYetGAyjP3ioaK4uLdwHUUYIzp7zvKvLE52smBqg6OfJHKh9eMyepto4lVRto3culh7sYqU9NeXP3Y-IKQgHpBbCO-1OriwHEJ46Tsu7QT8Q26jeep7q_rThkU5PqQwv_BdZYykJ-zQdaRjuFiM5HC3McRxH5LbAW3g/3ix/aFPFwk_jRMOG42d91shDZw/h0/plAgFCoTNY-U3hY7NRqROx5b1guSlGrbVtuAMUlvtL8) Peter, so sorry to email late on a Friday night, but this is important. |
Feds issue subpoenas seeking records related to Rep. Cuellar and his wife, associates
---
News just broke that a federal grand jury probe has begun issuing subpoenas and seeking records from Congressman Henry Cuellar and his family looking into whether or not Cuellar or his family provided any "work, act, favor, or service" at the behest of foreign companies, government officials, or business leaders.
**As more news about the FBI investigation trickles out, Cuellar’s campaign is going on offense.** They placed their first TV ad buys today. And with $2.3 million to spend — he has _a lot_ of resources to keep an ailing campaign afloat.
**Peter, Jessica’s chances of winning have never been better.** But the biggest obstacle to victory is the fact that we are being massively outraised and outspent by Cuellar and his corporate funders. That’s why we’re emailing late on a Friday night about this news... because we desperately need your help to close the gap.
[**Please, can you contribute $5 right now to help us close the gap and respond to Henry Cuellar’s ads? We’re so close to victory, but we could lose this chance if we get outspent on the airwaves.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCDXHam0x6OroSof3fZs7aOeJTFogzdzxH7prl5_JJ755pk-6bUPwKZqpG8BRZvvPcy2_WY-N2B5fok_0InU8Ic6NZ_FIbHXvUycpRj6Xh2kdENmARTMiLnCIIcfCnSh9jAFNuJDMqaba7ee1qTkRx7oHpYpdezSf_U8YUpCVJ4ygUhLUabf7GjC-6ZYblNw_IJofldT4qcHaOktS347-TclEswbu2kjsRvzwlZEZxuj1yurdE9uy-uK294EoM6DzfiL2u10K3i5F1li1uFzRlTL3RuzXhEXQQIbnZqmo1YoUGktJsUbTf52gwwUU-GX--saEfyUmyVY6oXpSx-bpRv9yMTGeHEWfc8Onev_kc38w/3ix/aFPFwk_jRMOG42d91shDZw/h1/hvMkZS7d4sELaeVEH5RF4ZNpaVyJwQcH0Dri1tn0odM)
[**__**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCaG7ZxezSTdkezWPDOX5q3gXiKtU4dyC-LjmJS2IMANq38KDcSDsRFUINvwyjA5JwSGkHS3DHblVLgIxCSxryasydwE6uPGb50AzJRYyd01AIW_EDf9kqQXlKpD_2_U3YCqify6lDqsn9synPRHtAKctsI4_B0A3wSQ76nIgBCJOYlR88jFsEdw-Rq5Fz2Hb9uKfVw9JLZ69P4gwI2mtlmzLl91-Rr9PSkkXo_z7bmigo8JcNpnlvjCkrBk_DuR6FI2OX8ZVsKr1at64YcBTfSp2aCswF8u8K1rC6jt41j4zEeeMljbO5YpjVisB4uhDkS9J6_0SOojEDt0XCHB615adXXUK-6d8k1mPic00e6XI/3ix/aFPFwk_jRMOG42d91shDZw/h2/dNwOGuX1Ah1BXvLTFdADIgAgcpsh6f7VDvgT6KKwjck)
[Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCDXHam0x6OroSof3fZs7aOeJTFogzdzxH7prl5_JJ757uduqI1bAKkss8LKWs35LZpvI8k14ifLQUyCWKx7wtR-04PPBXzHCAmYcSFlGvkeaVTXwYTjo4Gr3jR3z5ZCctE0w_Cd5HHSlHd0ALyqcGjcbx8uhobGNOC1muw5QaFMNShGtQQCE9DwV8_pBSZ-Bry3reKlLUY9yX3UIyLYSL1HI2EkgdN_7JXkdymm14hxwB7b6Eq62wf3jzeqBxahtgokTr9Ims5liVSfJjKAAZgrqcb7r9fCxvBepszpdF4jPzGuH6OA6b7yhVnzL8Y7y3rFsOwzUfXqBvkiYLPJ9oVI_Elxkwo6gVIx0DHohDM8Y/3ix/aFPFwk_jRMOG42d91shDZw/h3/QNkA_S2ezsMpuVrv3367S6sFu97usMot4af2xASLAXE)Although we don’t know much beyond what was reported in the news, it’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation.
But we can’t bet on winning just because Cuellar is under investigation. We don’t know how much we’ll hear in the coming weeks, or whether or not voters are tuned in and paying attention to all of these concerning developments.

clean_body: Sorry to email so late on Friday night, but this is important. | | | Peter, so sorry to email late on a Friday night, but this is important. | Feds issue subpoenas seeking records related to Rep. Cuellar and his wife, associates News just broke that a federal grand jury probe has begun issuing subpoenas and seeking records from Congressman Henry Cuellar and his family looking into whether or not Cuellar or his family provided any "work, act, favor, or service" at the behest of foreign companies, government officials, or business leaders. As more news about the FBI investigation trickles out, Cuellar’s campaign is going on offense. They placed their first TV ad buys today. And with $2.3 million to spend — he has a lot of resources to keep an ailing campaign afloat. Peter, Jessica’s chances of winning have never been better. But the biggest obstacle to victory is the fact that we are being massively outraised and outspent by Cuellar and his corporate funders. That’s why we’re emailing late on a Friday night about this news... because we desperately need your help to close the gap. we don’t know much beyond what was reported in the news, it’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. But we can’t bet on winning just because Cuellar is under investigation. We don’t know how much we’ll hear in the coming weeks, or whether or not voters are tuned in and paying attention to all of these concerning developments. Peter, the truth is that 88% of House races were won by the top spending candidate. Right now, unless we see a huge surge, that’s Henry Cuellar. So, what do you think? Can we count on your help? Thanks for all of your support these past few days. We’ll keep you updated as we hear more in the news. \- Team Cisneros To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Beto for Texas
subject: You’ve been selected to respond to Team Beto’s Election Year Strategy Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Your response would mean a lot.
#
Hey,
Beto really wants to hear from folks like you about our strategy to fire Greg Abbott and win in Texas — which is why we’re asking you to represent PA in our brand-new Strategy Survey.
**Will you take a minute to respond to our first Election Year Strategy Survey, starting with the question below?**
[Greg Abbott is already dropping millions on TV and radio ads. Our campaign is focused on Beto traveling across the state to reach every voter, including Republicans, Independents, and folks who’ve never voted before.](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey/?source=ema20220121-172682&t=1&akid=172682%2E444211%2EW4zAKt) [Do you agree that focusing on outreach and organizing is the best way to fight back against Abbott’s ad blitz?](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey/?source=ema20220121-172682&t=2&akid=172682%2E444211%2EW4zAKt) Select an answer: Yes No Not sure **[Finish the survey →](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey/?source=ema20220121-172682&t=3&akid=172682%2E444211%2EW4zAKt)**
---
With your help, we will elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott next year, but we need to be clear-eyed about the challenges that lie ahead. Abbott has amassed over $65 million in campaign cash, and his corporate donors will spend whatever it takes to protect their power.
Right now, we’re planning our travel, hiring staff, and setting our budget for the rest of this campaign. There’s no better time to get feedback from supporters like you on how we’re investing our time and energy.
[**Click here to complete Team Beto’s new Election Year Strategy Survey →**](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/EY-strategy-survey/?source=ema20220121-172682&t=4&akid=172682%2E444211%2EW4zAKt)
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot.
More soon,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220121-172682-footer&t=5&refcode2=172682_444211_W4zAKt&akid=172682%2E444211%2EW4zAKt)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=6&akid=172682%2E444211%2EW4zAKt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=172682%2E444211%2EW4zAKt)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?q?What_Rachel_Maddow_just_said=E2=80=A6_=28VPP=29?=
subject: Senator Manchin should be EMBARRASSED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team: Rachel Maddow just SLAMMED Joe Manchin for protecting the filibuster instead of saving the right to vote: [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=6&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL) Maddow is ABSOLUTELY right. If Democrat Joe Manchin would’ve stepped up to ABOLISH the filibuster months ago, the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act would have passed in the Senate!

**Now, voting rights, our Congressional majorities, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda are on the verge of total collapse.**

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to STAND with us, and tell Joe Manchin to do what’s right and abolish the filibuster »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=7&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=8&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=9&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL)
---
TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: A Realistic Democrat
DATE: January 21, 2022

**_Dear Senator Manchin,_**

We need to have a serious talk.

For the last nine months, in state houses across the country, **Republicans have been doing their best to dismantle voting rights.**

**And now, Senate Republicans have BLOCKED the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act, which would protect voting rights at a national level!**

I’m enraged, Senator, so now, I’m personally demanding you step up, meet this moment, and ABOLISH the filibuster to finally SAVE voting rights!

[I’m dead serious – and to prove it, I’m giving a donation of $2 to the Voter Protection Project, an organization founded to protect the right to vote, right now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=10&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=11&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
The Republican war on our democracy isn’t over, Senator.

**In addition to trying to suppress voters, the GOP is trying to block every piece of legislation President Biden is trying to pass — putting the midterms at risk!**

The people of your state and our country deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and abolish the filibuster!

[So please, STAND UP, defend our right to vote and abolish the filibuster once and for all. I know I am, and I’ll show it with a $2 donation to VPP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=12&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=13&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Sincerely,

**_x. A Proud American_**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5289?t=14&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1156%2E878179%2EY7L4QL)

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: You are invited to Beer & Petitions in Canon City
body:
Join us at Worlds End Brewery
| | | |
---
| Hello Peter,
Please join the Aadland for Congress staff Tuesday, Jan 25th in Canon City.
Enjoy fine craft beers and talk with campaign staff to answer questions about Erik Aadland and the campaign to put CD7 back in Republican hands.

Friend,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMFOwzAQRL_GublK1iFuDzlAm1JQC6gtiFtknE3jYjuR44DK1-OUwgHJtrRvvKOdrXJIecowUjnEAHESLkuAJRNZZykyESdvULN4ykkaG3EQQnrVWqHR-YlsTdTkyXTGMZtOZwwlh1hAAjMuKp5eiSxj9VWk88b7rifsmsAynB7l4HDyqazDajQJzKMwtEHXywY1VVYG1lqkXausp5U_UkfYcvCm7NvBSSRs4fCDQDYiKUwn1MEG2LVaX6jBSg0mMDRCjbCXofhJGWflqtju5qtiXRZFudjfl48PBX16vHvYl9viZSS_5q31aH1otVLT52fDT6ddt90EubRaVUH4BxtVhbCL9v1-xV5vXeTyqvtUWqs-G7d4GMc57y6MrVV9ygm_IQDnNoDzmuDw8nEctvC18ZTNXmlxNOt4FGEeXn_q8O_nxWRySQmEL74BYBSSYA)
That's right – NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia – 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can – and will – happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMFuwjAQRL_G3IySdQhwyKGFUIooVBQhbpHjLImp7USOA6JfX4fSHirZlvaNd7SzRQLROGI4kAkEAEHoLwuBhUNxiiNkPAhzOLFgMiZRoHnJuXCyNlyhdUNR60GV5HE-EmwSMhFDFEZFyPMRjjgGJ5hORxEMVFI517SEPRFY-NOi6CwOr9JYLHoTzxxyTSu0rahQUWmEZ7VB2tTSOFq4M7WELTqns7burEDC5hYvBOIeCa4bLkvjYVMr9aAaC9lpz1Bz2cNW-OInZRBny3T3MVum6yxNs_l-lW03KX3fvm722S499OTXvDYOjfOtRih6hpsrTcre0cuZUbLwwj9YycKHndefqyU7vtiBTYrmKpWSbdxvsezHue_Oj63k6ZaQ8TMBuLcB3NcE5eFy7nbw9eYomx5petbroBdh5l93a_Dv58Nk-EgJZDz_BvQnkqI)**

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Friend, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right – NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia – 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can – and will – happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body: Another victory for Judicial Watch! The City of Asheville, North Carolina, settled our federal civil rights lawsuit after agreeing to remove all racially discriminatory provisions in a city-funded scholarship program. [WEEKLY UPDATE] FBI LETTER SHOWS PFIZER TIED TO INVESTIGATION OF PROJECT VERITAS [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26660&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1KY0R1TzJKSVRDcyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Another victory for Judicial Watch! The City of Asheville, North Carolina, settled our federal civil rights lawsuit after agreeing to remove [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26586&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3duYy1jaXRpemVucy1mb3ItZXF1YWxpdHktdi1jaXR5LW9mLWFzaGV2aWxsZS1hZ3JlZW1lbnQtMDAzMTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] all racially discriminatory provisions in a city-funded scholarship program. The city also agreed [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26606&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3duYy1jaXRpemVucy1mb3ItZXF1YWxpdHktdi1hc2hldmlsbGUtc2lnbmVkLXNldHRsZW1lbnQtMDAzMTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] to remove racially discriminatory eligibility provisions in a related program that provides grants to educators. The City Council approved the settlement on January 11. In October 2021, we filed the lawsuit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26587&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYXNoZXZpbGxlLWRpc2NyaW1pbmF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] in the U.S. District Court for the Western District of North Carolina on behalf of a North Carolina citizens group, WNC Citizens for Equality, Inc., whose members include high school students who were ineligible for a scholarship program only because they are not Black (_WNC Citizens for Equality, Inc., v. City of Asheville et al._ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26078&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3duYy1jaXRpemVucy12LWFzaGV2aWxsZS1uYy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAzMTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] (No. 1:21-cv-00310)). (The Legal Insurrection Foundation partnered with us in the lawsuit.) Here’s the background. On May 5, 2021, the City of Asheville entered into an agreement with the Asheville City Schools Foundation to establish and administer the City of Asheville Scholarship Fund. According to the agreement, the City of Asheville Scholarship is “awarded in perpetuity to Black high school students within Asheville City Schools, with special consideration given for Black students pursuing a career in education.” (In July 2020, Ashville’s City Council unanimously approved what is called a “reparations initiative [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26589&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kcml2ZS5nb29nbGUuY29tL2ZpbGUvZC8xV0tpYWxWSVNXenU3Mm1oYXN5eTlTc2xEYlZHTVNqNVUvdmlld10s4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz that provided [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26590&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMC8wNy8xNi91cy9yZXBhcmF0aW9ucy1hc2hldmlsbGUtbmMuaHRtbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] “funding to programs geared toward increasing homeownership and business and career opportunities for Black residents.”) > To settle our civil rights lawsuit, on January 11, 2022, > Asheville’s City Council approved a resolution that removes the > racial criteria for the scholarship: [T]he scholarship will give preference to applicants whose household members, including parents and/or guardians have a high school education or less, these applicants representing “first generation” college students. The City Council also removed racially discriminatory language for a scholarship program for educators and staff of Asheville City Schools. The scholarship agreements were also amended to prohibit discrimination based on race and other categories. Our clients, a group of Asheville residents, including high school students, courageously challenged this blatantly discriminatory and illegal scholarship program in federal court. Thankfully, the City of Asheville did the right thing in quickly ending these indefensible race-based scholarship programs. This federal lawsuit and the resulting remarkable settlement should serve as a wake-up call to those activists and allied politicians pushing the extremist leftist agenda to segregate and discriminate based on race. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR INFO ON CIA TARGETING PRESIDENT TRUMP Our Senior Attorney T. Russell Nobile told the House Judiciary Subcommittee on the Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil Liberties that voting procedures [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26661&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1UTktWRTFwdG9CTSZ0PTM3NzZzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] proposed under Democrat legislation aren’t necessary and would be destructive. This legislation, H.R. 4 – John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021, would effectively result in a federal takeover of election management and empower the Justice Department to veto voter ID and other widely used election integrity measures. “Data tells the true story of ballot access in America. To objectively evaluate whether racial minorities have an equal opportunity to participate in the electoral process, you must look at racial registration and turnout data. Looking at the most recent data, the minority participation is exponentially higher now than it was in 1965,” Nobile said in the hearing titled “Voter Suppression and Continuing Threats to Democracy.” “There is a significant disconnect between this ballot access data and public claims of widespread voter suppression,” he said. “Notwithstanding pervasive talking points about “rampant voter suppression,” the public data cannot be ignored: registration and turnout for minority voters in 2020 far exceeds that of 1965. When black citizens now register and turnout at higher rates than white citizens in places like Mississippi, it is simply not credible to claim that Jim Crow style voter suppression currently exists.” Voter ID and other measures as “voter suppression” is truly a big lie. There appears to be a larger motive behind the legislation, Nobile told the committee. “[T]he truth is that H.R. 4 goes far beyond any civil rights law enacted during the height of the civil rights era. Rather, it appears part of a grander plan to wrest control of American elections away from accountable state legislatures and into the hands of a single federal agency. It does this despite Americans’ longstanding distrust of centralized administration of elections. Twice the U.S. Constitution mandated that presidential electors meet and cast their votes for president in their respective states, rather than at a central location, because in doing so there ‘would be less opportunity for political intrigue and chicanery than if they assembled in a single location.’” Nobile, senior attorney Robert Popper and I repeatedly have addressed Congress on the importance of securing free and fair election. For more than 25 years, Judicial Watch has been known for its aggressive, leading-edge use of public records laws and lawsuits, as well as taxpayer, civil rights and whistleblower protection litigation, to fight government corruption. We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of this effort, we assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who have fought gerrymandering in Maryland, stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=21208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]. This hearing shows the Left has not given up on its effort to undermine election security. And it shows that Judicial Watch will not give up its leadership role in protecting free and fair elections. DHS DISPERSES 273,396 ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS AROUND U.S. IN FIVE MONTHS > Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are now abroad in the > land with the secretive help of the Biden administration, that has > been caught ferrying migrants > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26662&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLXVzZXMtc21hbGwtdGV4YXMtYWlycG9ydC10by1kaXNwZXJzZS1pbGxlZ2FsLWltbWlncmFudHMtcmVsZWFzZWQtZnJvbS1kZXRlbnRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] > furtively to communities with flights that land in the middle of the > night. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26663&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLWRpc3BlcnNlcy1pbGxlZ2FsLWltbWlncmFudHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] > the outrageous numbers: > > Startling figures > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57701&L=26664&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucm9uam9obnNvbi5zZW5hdGUuZ292L3NlcnZpY2VzL2ZpbGVzL0Y5RDU0NjdFLUVFQzktNEFFQy05MTU2LTczQzU5NTdDRkU1Nz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] > reluctantly disclosed by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) > show that the Biden administration dispersed 273,396 illegal > immigrants throughout the United States during a five-month period > last year and issued north of 100,000 Notices to Report (NTR) to an > Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) field office within 60 > days. Not surprisingly, the stats reveal that over 50,000 illegal > aliens failed to show up for their hearing with federal authorities > by ignoring the government issued NTR that has become the > laughingstock of the nation’s immigration system. > > The administration began using the NTR during the 2021 border > crisis, according to the Wisconsin senator who obtained the > distressing records this month. Back in October the veteran lawmaker > pressed DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas for data regarding the > number of illegal immigrants released into American communities and > how many have been relocated with an NTR, parole or a Notice to > Appear (NTA), which officially starts the deportation process with a > court hearing before an immigration judge. Johnson, who chaired the > Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs for six > years, also requested the number of illegal aliens that have been > transported by plane, train and bus to destinations throughout the > U.S. by DHS or government contractors. “Media reports indicate > that Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) is not just releasing > illegal aliens into border towns after CBP processing, but rather > transporting illegal aliens from the border to cities within the > interior of the United States,” Johnson writes in his October 19 > letter to Mayorkas. “It also [WEEKLY UPDATE] FBI LETTER SHOWS PFIZER TIED TO INVESTIGATION OF PROJECT VERITAS [==] Another victory for Judicial Watch! The City of Asheville, North Carolina, settled our federal civil rights lawsuit after agreeing to remove [] all racially discriminatory provisions in a city-funded scholarship program. The city also agreed [] to remove racially discriminatory eligibility provisions in a related program that provides grants to educators. The City Council approved the settlement on January 11. In October 2021, we filed the lawsuit [==] in the U.S. District Court for the Western District of North Carolina on behalf of a North Carolina citizens group, WNC Citizens for Equality, Inc., whose members include high school students who were ineligible for a scholarship program only because they are not Black (WNC Citizens for Equality, Inc., v. The City Council also removed racially discriminatory language for a scholarship program for educators and staff of Asheville City Schools. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR INFO ON CIA TARGETING PRESIDENT TRUMP Our Senior Attorney T. Russell Nobile told the House Judiciary Subcommittee on the Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil Liberties that voting procedures [] proposed under Democrat legislation aren’t necessary and would be destructive. This legislation, H.R. 4 – John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021, would effectively result in a federal takeover of election management and empower the Justice Department to veto voter ID and other widely used election integrity measures. “Data tells the true story of ballot access in America. To objectively evaluate whether racial minorities have an equal opportunity to participate in the electoral process, you must look at racial registration and turnout data. Looking at the most recent data, the minority participation is exponentially higher now than it was in 1965,” Nobile said in the hearing titled “Voter Suppression and Continuing Threats to Democracy.” “There is a significant disconnect between this ballot access data and public claims of widespread voter suppression,” he said. “Notwithstanding pervasive talking points about “rampant voter suppression,” the public data cannot be ignored: registration and turnout for minority voters in 2020 far exceeds that of 1965. When black citizens now register and turnout at higher rates than white citizens in places like Mississippi, it is simply not credible to claim that Jim Crow style voter suppression currently exists.” Voter ID and other measures as “voter suppression” is truly a big lie. There appears to be a larger motive behind the legislation, Nobile told the committee. “[T]he truth is that H.R. 4 goes far beyond any civil rights law enacted during the height of the civil rights era. Rather, it appears part of a grander plan to wrest control of American elections away from accountable state legislatures and into the hands of a single federal agency. It does this despite Americans’ longstanding distrust of centralized administration of elections. Twice the U.S. Constitution mandated that presidential electors meet and cast their votes for president in their respective states, rather than at a central location, because in doing so there ‘would be less opportunity for political intrigue and chicanery than if they assembled in a single location.’” Nobile, senior attorney Robert Popper and I repeatedly have addressed Congress on the importance of securing free and fair election. For more than 25 years, Judicial Watch has been known for its aggressive, leading-edge use of public records laws and lawsuits, as well as taxpayer, civil rights and whistleblower protection litigation, to fight government corruption. We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of this effort, we assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who have fought gerrymandering in Maryland, stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. This hearing shows the Left has not given up on its effort to undermine election security. And it shows that Judicial Watch will not give up its leadership role in protecting free and fair elections. DHS DISPERSES 273,396 ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS AROUND U.S. IN FIVE MONTHS Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are now abroad in the land with the secretive help of the Biden administration, that has been caught ferrying migrants [] furtively to communities with flights that land in the middle of the night. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] the outrageous numbers: Startling figures [==] reluctantly disclosed by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) show that the Biden administration dispersed 273,396 illegal immigrants throughout the United States during a five-month period last year and issued north of 100,000 Notices to Report (NTR) to an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) field office within 60 days. Not surprisingly, the stats reveal that over 50,000 illegal aliens failed to show up for their hearing with federal authorities by ignoring the government issued NTR that has become the laughingstock of the nation’s immigration system. The administration began using the NTR during the 2021 border crisis, according to the Wisconsin senator who obtained the distressing records this month. Back in October the veteran lawmaker pressed DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas for data regarding the number of illegal immigrants released into American communities and how many have been relocated with an NTR, parole or a Notice to Appear (NTA), which officially starts the deportation process with a court hearing before an immigration judge. Johnson, who chaired the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs for six years, also requested the number of illegal aliens that have been transported by plane, train and bus to destinations throughout the U.S. by DHS or government contractors. “Media reports indicate that Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) is not just releasing illegal aliens into border towns after CBP processing, but rather transporting illegal aliens from the border to cities within the interior of the United States,” Johnson writes in his October 19 letter to Mayorkas. “It also appears that ICE might not be properly assessing these illegal aliens before releasing them into the interior of the U.S. If true, ICE’s reported actions could threaten the safety and security of all Americans.” In correspondence [==] attached to the records, Mayorkas apologizes to the senator for the delay in responding and reiterates a script he has used repeatedly, that DHS is committed to ensuring a safe, orderly, and humane immigration system. “The Department continues to prioritize and allocate critical, limited resources toward the Southwest Border to process noncitizens consistent with applicable legal authorities, including our immigration authorities and public health requirements,” the DHS secretary writes. “This work includes guaranteeing that the rights of all individuals, including noncitizens, are protected while safeguarding the national and border security of the United States and the safety of American communities.” The six pages of agency statistics attached to it support the senator’s assessment that the administration’s failure to secure the border has created an unprecedented migration crisis. The records show that between March 21, 2021, and August 31, 2021, the government “processed” a record 273,396 illegal immigrants into the U.S. Of those migrants, the Biden administration issued 104,171 NTR to individuals who were then released throughout the country. More than half of the illegal aliens freed into the interior of the U.S. with an NTR during the five-month period failed to check-in with ICE. Of the 49,859 that did report to an ICE field office, only 16,293 were put into removal proceedings, according to the records. The figures also reveal that between March 21, 2021, and December 5, 2021, ICE started deportation proceedings for 50,683 illegal immigrants previously released on an NTR but failed to keep track of the overwhelming majority of cases—more than 40,000—even though the agency is a key component in removals because it plays the role of prosecutor in deportations. As for taxpayer-funded transportation of the illegal immigrants, the figures state that 37,569 “noncitizens” were moved by bus in fiscal year 2021. Phoenix, Arizona and San Antonio, Texas served as the most popular “release point” for illegal immigrants bused by Uncle Sam with 15,779 and 15,645 respectively. The DHS figures show that 84,261 migrants were transported on planes last year as part of ICE Air Operations. Judicial Watch reported on several Biden administration schemes that covertly dispersed illegal immigrants throughout the U.S. via small regional airports [] or in the middle of the night [=] without notifying local authorities or officials. Until next week ... name: Sen. Rand Paul
subject: Join me in supporting Don Huffines
body:
There is a clear choice for Texas Governor [](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot, Texas is a lighthouse of liberty, shining across the dark places in America and around the world. The keeper of that lighthouse must also embody that spirit of freedom and live the principles of liberty.Texas has exactly that candidate running for governor. **His name is Don Huffines, and he has my unreserved endorsement, support, and admiration as a true champion for freedom and for Texas.** [STAND WITH RAND](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-y/) Since my dad ran for president in 2008 and spawned a national, organized movement of liberty-loving Americans, there have been plenty of politicians claiming the mantel of liberty to advance their careers more than the cause of freedom.As a fellow warrior in the eternal struggle for liberty, we can see who is full of baloney and who is the real deal.**Don Huffines IS the real deal.** [STAND WITH RAND](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-j/) **Texas needs a governor who will stand up for the Constitution and for the rights of every Texan.** Don Huffines has been in the thick of every Conservative fight, isn't afraid to stand up to the establishment, and is someone who will defend our freedoms.He has been a big supporter of mine, and my dad before that. **[Please join us by adding your name today to Don 's list of Texas supporters.](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-t/)** [STAND WITH RAND](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-i/) Governor Abbott has a lot of resources and support from the GOP establishment. So did my opponent when I first ran for Senate. Let's make sure that Texas remains a lighthouse of liberty by electing a true liberty-loving Texan to the governor's mansion.**Let 's elect Don Huffines!**For liberty, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-d/) [STAND WITH RAND](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-h/) [](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-n/) | _Copyright(C) 2021 Don Huffines Campaign, All rights reserved._You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. **Our Mailing Address:**

Irving, TX 75017 [Preferences](https://dhcampaign.updatemyprofile.com/t-cukkiiy-17329976-yuddtktydi-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://dhcampaign.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cukkiiy-yuddtktydi-x/)

### FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
Hundreds of members of the Oregon public, including medical professionals and licensed physicians, school officials, teachers, veterans, business owners, hearing impaired adults, a former city councilwoman from Cottage Grove and parents of school-aged children, each testified for three minutes during an eight hour period on Thursday to participate in the Oregon Health Authority’s meeting to submit public comment on the proposed rulemaking for Oregon Administrative Rule [_333-019-1025_](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7ZaHwBN5Kwqo-2B1YPGFDE2tXny853xmP3wuvbc9aeEs57fyFR3suyuRLVBQ3rPkqgXYuNfWK022oTZw5n2dGqYxBP4Mru4uIn7JzLkytPXasnWDGL8HkqVKqhoi2OJGm-2FajF-2FunUlF2EiZurL-2Fex-2BZB8-3DDCLL_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp7e2YU-2FhGWL68vqkHrqpmB8nrwQ8Fyv6xY3QZktwniEV88Dutsa8xEssssVy10K82vre2Lq6uXrW6hyZALMpMV2rU3eqXgkMl4whvgILYoJADm6O-2BcaM3W5KIzeG-2FlKJPCPPQXMs1bIP0Y3UUwHW-2FveZwKES62m1b1IY2GXHjRu5azCp9114AwI2r-2FAbSpOu-2BWR2jqHPQ7eKoi1T6wv-2BCbOP3ddZlXcXLNBs4aVcvs3-2Fn9KXsgGyM38z57sj9ROebLGOgHMAXiv9wZA2y0uX0XbVUJRe1CbB0fhb02OFHUKbuAJvme8x-2F1L-2Fxio4fVrM1f9vUc1NvMoCYjP5F6hgewYXP5mv25Z6vdTXkp5-2FbcznQ-2BbGChfXzsFVuy3k9dqWiMYISk5JWAIOcaevnXjbkNWSy-2B-2FL2YuteO16VFQiLq18Tr-2BWnen9FMcpz0zICmac0aO55Q5vGGW-2BAPclSO9f4t1RDIwfNtKrRG2bOa-2BpEt1DkRXE2AxDi5EUpynHr-2BZik7nBxmsjBBYptYmMWo2CpgVDCrryNfnrE0YTJChPf3EQTbmh-2FhqIc-2BX6hDT-2Foo3VNCRMUOXa9l9QCFsQNiEgs6s2cahXypbLiGyeHHY3F3W791g8pTavj7pBXuwKp4MDwzZhX5x3aCJrXMeMtZy1dgRqt4SEy-2BVaTu-2Bbn9dJIZwJrEyjT6MTcKsxizNyqUVlZuNz-2BmbeoXpyvFvv6623N0HaUVPJuCuwD9rnKCFya9FMHc4hQLizGsxEIjrXXjBrxQ-3D-3D), a change that would adopt a permanent rule “requiring masks to be worn in indoor spaces in Oregon.”

Every single person who testified was firmly against OHA’s proposed permanent rule, stating state, federal and international agency-referenced COVID-19 and mental health statistics, learning delays for children, economic losses, multi-billion dollar agency budgets and more. Over the span of the meeting, which began at 10:00 a.m. and ended after 5:00 p.m., more than four hours past the original end time, many Oregonians called out top OHA officials for not being present during the meeting, a lack of medical degrees and “qualifications,” and on two occasions, the Twisted Sisters’ famous song, “We’re Not Gonna Take It,” was either sung or played during the testimony as a sort of an anthem for how members of the public were feeling. More than a dozen testifiers used part of their time allotted to directly praise fellow Oregonians for their previous testimony and encourage the listening public to stand up and defy the current “unjust and discriminatory” COVID-19 restrictions through peaceful non-compliance.

**Not one single person, who testified January 20, was in support of OHA’s proposed permanent indoor mask rule–currently set to expire after February 8–despite the full day of testimony from hundreds of Oregonians and OHA requesting an individual’s statement of position on the rule upon registration to testify.**

“One gentleman made a statement that politely summed up the sentiment of all who testified: ‘Let's stop the nonsense, and start using common sense!’ and I completely agree,” stated Alsea School Superintendent and [_candidate_](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7ZaHwBN5Kwqo-2B1YPGFDE2tWBB5ZBJQk46gw5ksStwSH8fGyn_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp7e2YU-2FhGWL68vqkHrqpmB8nrwQ8Fyv6xY3QZktwniEV88Dutsa8xEssssVy10K82vre2Lq6uXrW6hyZALMpMV2rU3eqXgkMl4whvgILYoJADm6O-2BcaM3W5KIzeG-2FlKJPCPPQXMs1bIP0Y3UUwHW-2FveZwKES62m1b1IY2GXHjRu5azCp9114AwI2r-2FAbSpOu-2BWR2jqHPQ7eKoi1T6wv-2BCbOP3ddZlXcXLNBs4aVcvs3-2Fn9KXsgGyM38z57sj9ROebLGOgHMAXiv9wZA2y0uX0XbVUJRe1CbB0fhb02OFHUKbuAJvme8x-2F1L-2Fxio4fVrM1f9vUc1NvMoCYjP5F6hgewYXP5mv25Z6vdTXkp5-2FbcznQ-2BbGChfXzsFVuy3k9dqWiMYISk5JWAIOcaevnXjbkNWSy-2B-2FL2YuteO16VFQiLq18Tr-2BWnen9FMcpz0zICmac0aO55Q5vGGW-2BAPclSO9f4t1RDIwfNtKrRG2bOa-2BpEt1DkRXE2AxDi5EUpynHr-2BZik7nBxmsjBBYptYmMWo2CpgVDCrryNfnrE0YTJChPf3EQTbmh-2FhqIc-2BX6hDT-2Foo3VNIdiocQnr8s92sI-2FLOo3RSNIJ-2FFVWTcgWD8Q-2F9sSUF-2BZfe9YWg-2FHAoHPFwYYB0by1ODN8T25NZ3uRMYznryvTZBtxydyj5-2F99RAGdZDTcTTYiBMv751WeOBVfP1hlxxor78LXsnhlMzB3-2FNPYW68YkZ0qM6GIlrPqc3sxmPXQiLfUMJ7OKDGiq642zRCSppkiA-3D-3D) for Oregon governor Marc Thielman. “All who testified on this call were well-informed as they spoke about OHA's clear overreach to bodily autonomy–it was truly encouraging that the tides continue to shift away from the public’s acceptance of these unconstitutional rules.” He added, “At what point will Governor Kate Brown and OHA listen to the diversity of voices they are tasked with serving as countless health experts across the globe move to balance health measures against the collateral damages done by the very measures they installed in an attempt to protect the public?”

Thielman was the only gubernatorial candidate to testify on the call. Less than [_a dozen states_](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7bPj2fHvSS4ylDGbSPaMGjNvaUlA-2Bcp7Q-2BPSXQ334Xmd4e1XTjJI8txl1lyp3XcU5FvjwbpYJ1LSTMPCY6SM2Hk-3D076g_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp7e2YU-2FhGWL68vqkHrqpmB8nrwQ8Fyv6xY3QZktwniEV88Dutsa8xEssssVy10K82vre2Lq6uXrW6hyZALMpMV2rU3eqXgkMl4whvgILYoJADm6O-2BcaM3W5KIzeG-2FlKJPCPPQXMs1bIP0Y3UUwHW-2FveZwKES62m1b1IY2GXHjRu5azCp9114AwI2r-2FAbSpOu-2BWR2jqHPQ7eKoi1T6wv-2BCbOP3ddZlXcXLNBs4aVcvs3-2Fn9KXsgGyM38z57sj9ROebLGOgHMAXiv9wZA2y0uX0XbVUJRe1CbB0fhb02OFHUKbuAJvme8x-2F1L-2Fxio4fVrM1f9vUc1NvMoCYjP5F6hgewYXP5mv25Z6vdTXkp5-2FbcznQ-2BbGChfXzsFVuy3k9dqWiMYISk5JWAIOcaevnXjbkNWSy-2B-2FL2YuteO16VFQiLq18Tr-2BWnen9FMcpz0zICmac0aO55Q5vGGW-2BAPclSO9f4t1RDIwfNtKrRG2bOa-2BpEt1DkRXE2AxDi5EUpynHr-2BZik7nBxmsjBBYptYmMWo2CpgVDCrryNfnrE0YTJChPf3EQTbmh-2FhqIc-2BX6hDT-2Foo3VNKMADkFFkUGMzkvi6cwCJbI7DrbXPKFVWcDrwaIopa-2BBpzgT3S2Rd7uv1Z3KgsdZif6r5OWiFKYqgM0MvE3Uj6u1zmHUTPIURtdtbZIT-2BS8l5YIH8j-2BE1pH8nB8yBzMg5Zq8HPhsatgcX7rC3qRd4GGgI-2BR5uV4nJzkGWptBuzbhAcMQGxMQtHQnC5yNoQsJWQ-3D-3D) in America still impose mask mandates, while British Prime Minister Boris Johnson [_announced a day prior_](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7dFignyP-2BueOQYuLcP9B92RNATyC3ygbY51hCSu0igQXLpm94OvHgqr3S8mfB5XIZaDn6gUchFhX79gFtXZ123iIqRHyJsZEosFLZK1H3VX6rFkHTcg1hxCN0ZWehhB-2Bi4JGMRcj5-2BL-2FzFvtJfaGUW1bzKqKc-2BAdDnsRxcrHtiBhHmavRp1VniT-2FGvcinIzgxGkkpoLlIkVvWz-2BdXP9LOEk-3DXLOG_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Mc6fSmCfQf4n9Xk41-2FAEp7e2YU-2FhGWL68vqkHrqpmB8nrwQ8Fyv6xY3QZktwniEV88Dutsa8xEssssVy10K82vre2Lq6uXrW6hyZALMpMV2rU3eqXgkMl4whvgILYoJADm6O-2BcaM3W5KIzeG-2FlKJPCPPQXMs1bIP0Y3UUwHW-2FveZwKES62m1b1IY2GXHjRu5azCp9114AwI2r-2FAbSpOu-2BWR2jqHPQ7eKoi1T6wv-2BCbOP3ddZlXcXLNBs4aVcvs3-2Fn9KXsgGyM38z57sj9ROebLGOgHMAXiv9wZA2y0uX0XbVUJRe1CbB0fhb02OFHUKbuAJvme8x-2F1L-2Fxio4fVrM1f9vUc1NvMoCYjP5F6hgewYXP5mv25Z6vdTXkp5-2FbcznQ-2BbGChfXzsFVuy3k9dqWiMYISk5JWAIOcaevnXjbkNWSy-2B-2FL2YuteO16VFQiLq18Tr-2BWnen9FMcpz0zICmac0aO55Q5vGGW-2BAPclSO9f4t1RDIwfNtKrRG2bOa-2BpEt1DkRXE2AxDi5EUpynHr-2BZik7nBxmsjBBYptYmMWo2CpgVDCrryNfnrE0YTJChPf3EQTbmh-2FhqIc-2BX6hDT-2Foo3VNNtvyZDQ2NQXyfnRVN6jWQ-2FCcTJWZoyDabId2um8sxmo5cJiWyS4k05PZk-2BWkKVuqgmYjj-2FbxR5rImoSESm3YecwTY6cZC4DXhXmVo3CQHxOUWHUuuMhR3zydOlMus-2BKoQtecT9XjHcOvSbtxrlX3W-2F8qGheuj7m3ZPFN8k-2FLBh7BLqE8rcRJHZ-2BTdt5fRoPVA-3D-3D), on Wednesday, the decision to lift all government restrictions nationwide, including the requirement to wear face masks, beginning next Thursday.

**“The sheer lack of trust between the public and this agency is obvious; the voices of hundreds of Oregonians were in complete unison at a public meeting–that’s historical and speaks to the level of frustration over these failed policies and a desire for change felt by the public,” Thielman added. “While in this case ‘permanent’ is a legal term used, it does allow for OHA to keep a rule in place** _**indefinitely**_**and requires going through a formal repeal or rescinding process.”**

Thielman testified at 3:20 p.m., directly following the testimony of a Redmond School Board member who stated she represented an entire school board opposing the proposed rule.

**He testified about, “four C’s you’ve got to have if you’re in a government agency” including, Competence, Credibility, Confidence of the public and Common Sense. He elaborated, “Common sense dictates that you don’t make an ineffective mask mandate permanent that has little to no impact on controlling the pandemic. But at this point, because OHA has killed common sense, this is what they are proposing to do. Now in terms of OHA’s credibility, OHA’s credibility has died...and my question is, did it die** _**with**_**COVID or** _**because of**_**COVID? Even the CDC finally admits what the public has known since nearly the beginning, that masks don’t really work.”**

Thielman stated after the meeting that, “OAR changes are quietly being proposed by unelected bureaucrats, away from much of the public’s eye, despite a two-year budget of more than $29 billion and clean_body: | | | | Gubernatorial candidate Marc Thielman testifies against OHA's proposed permanent indoor mask rule. Media Contact: mailto:media@marcfororegon.com?subject=&body= Phone:tel:541-649-2411 | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Hundreds of members of the Oregon public, including medical professionals and licensed physicians, school officials, teachers, veterans, business owners, hearing impaired adults, a former city councilwoman from Cottage Grove and parents of school-aged children, each testified for three minutes during an eight hour period on Thursday to participate in the Oregon Health Authority’s meeting to submit public comment on the proposed rulemaking for Oregon Administrative Rule , a change that would adopt a permanent rule “requiring masks to be worn in indoor spaces in Oregon.” Every single person who testified was firmly against OHA’s proposed permanent rule, stating state, federal and international agency-referenced COVID-19 and mental health statistics, learning delays for children, economic losses, multi-billion dollar agency budgets and more. Over the span of the meeting, which began at 10:00 a.m. and ended after 5:00 p.m., more than four hours past the original end time, many Oregonians called out top OHA officials for not being present during the meeting, a lack of medical degrees and “qualifications,” and on two occasions, the Twisted Sisters’ famous song, “We’re Not Gonna Take It,” was either sung or played during the testimony as a sort of an anthem for how members of the public were feeling. More than a dozen testifiers used part of their time allotted to directly praise fellow Oregonians for their previous testimony and encourage the listening public to stand up and defy the current “unjust and discriminatory” COVID-19 restrictions through peaceful non-compliance. Not one single person, who testified January 20, was in support of OHA’s proposed permanent indoor mask rule–currently set to expire after February 8–despite the full day of testimony from hundreds of Oregonians and OHA requesting an individual’s statement of position on the rule upon registration to testify. “One gentleman made a statement that politely summed up the sentiment of all who testified: ‘Let's stop the nonsense, and start using common sense!’ and I completely agree,” stated Alsea School Superintendent and for Oregon governor Marc Thielman. “All who testified on this call were well-informed as they spoke about OHA's clear overreach to bodily autonomy–it was truly encouraging that the tides continue to shift away from the public’s acceptance of these unconstitutional rules.” He added, “At what point will Governor Kate Brown and OHA listen to the diversity of voices they are tasked with serving as countless health experts across the globe move to balance health measures against the collateral damages done by the very measures they installed in an attempt to protect the public?” Thielman was the only gubernatorial candidate to testify on the call. Less than in America still impose mask mandates, while British Prime Minister Boris Johnson , on Wednesday, the decision to lift all government restrictions nationwide, including the requirement to wear face masks, beginning next Thursday. “The sheer lack of trust between the public and this agency is obvious; the voices of hundreds of Oregonians were in complete unison at a public meeting–that’s historical and speaks to the level of frustration over these failed policies and a desire for change felt by the public,” Thielman added. “While in this case ‘permanent’ is a legal term used, it does allow for OHA to keep a rule in place indefinitelyand requires going through a formal repeal or rescinding process.” Thielman testified at 3:20 p.m., directly following the testimony of a Redmond School Board member who stated she represented an entire school board opposing the proposed rule. He testified about, “four C’s you’ve got to have if you’re in a government agency” including, Competence, Credibility, Confidence of the public and Common Sense. He elaborated, “Common sense dictates that you don’t make an ineffective mask mandate permanent that has little to no impact on controlling the pandemic. But at this point, because OHA has killed common sense, this is what they are proposing to do. Now in terms of OHA’s credibility, OHA’s credibility has died...and my question is, did it die withCOVID or because ofCOVID? Even the CDC finally admits what the public has known since nearly the beginning, that masks don’t really work.” Thielman stated after the meeting that, “OAR changes are quietly being proposed by unelected bureaucrats, away from much of the public’s eye, despite a two-year budget of more than $29 billion and extremely active and accounts constantly pushing out content. Rule changes essentially circumvent the state legislature, potentially making unconstitutional administrative rules that act as laws that can drastically change the very fabric of our society and the rights and personal liberties of each and every Oregonian. Kate Brown and her agency leaders are failing the people of Oregon and bringing us further and further down, despite an already abysmal approval rating of just 43%, placing , out of all Governors across America. It would be absurd if the OHA ignores this incredible show of the public’s direct opposition and would further illustrate the rhetoric mirrored by Governor Brown’s elitist out of touch and authoritarian approach to policy making.” The public can submit written testimony about the proposed permanent indoor mask rule (333-019-1025) through Monday, January 24, at 5:00 p.m. to mailto:publichealth.rules@dhsoha.state.or.us?subject=OAR 333-019-1025&body=. OHA has scheduled two related on Monday, January 24: •9:00 a.m. - Mask and Vaccination Requirements for Schools Details: The purpose of this hearing is to take public testimony on the proposed adoption of OAR 333-019-1015 and 333-019-1030 regarding “Masking requirements in Schools; Vaccination Requirements for Teachers and School Staff.” •2:00 p.m. - Mask and Vaccination Requirements for Health Care Settings Details: The purpose of this hearing is to take public testimony on the proposed adoption of OAR 333-019-1010 and 333-019-1011 regarding “Masking and vaccination requirements to control COVID-19 in health care settings.” | About the Marc for Oregon Gubernatorial Campaign Marc Thielman is a republican candidate for governor in Oregon and superintendent of the Alsea School District. The Marc for Oregon campaign is a constitutionally-minded, grassroots-run campaign led by committed people in Oregon who are ready for a change in leadership and support fairness and integrity in politics. For more information about Marc for Oregon, visit , contactmailto:media@marcfororegon.com?subject=&body= for interview requests, emailmailto:info@marcfororegon.com?subject=&body= for general inquiries, follow @marcfororegon on social media, or calltel:541-649-2411 . | JOIN US | | | | PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

body:
With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservat

| | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please allow me to introduce myself as the new President of The Heritage Foundation. I’m writing to you today with an urgent need. With the threat of the Biden administration’s reckless and unlawful Covid-19 vaccine mandate, my work to defend your conservative values has been cut out for me from the very moment I arrived at Heritage. **But the good news is, I’m leading a team that fights back whenever your freedom is threatened.** I’m extremely proud to share with you that Heritage has filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s unlawful mandate. Because we recognize this vaccine mandate as exactly what it is: a dangerous level of government overreach attempting to strip your foundational liberty to make your own personal medical decisions.

At Heritage, we are focused on returning power to the people. We are working to preserve and defend your individual liberties guaranteed in U.S. Constitution. We are standing rock solid in defense of the very values that make America great. We are fighting this government power grab and protecting the rights and freedoms of all Americans. But we’re looking for the support of proud American citizens like you. And today, I need to know that you are standing beside us as we fight back. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign our Pledge to Stop the Unlawful Vaccine Mandate.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z307h8ar8e9f3f60mrfrtuscujg1p5vouchtbg0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3gm9oj4cth2bs) It’s urgent that we know you are with us. I would be honored to see your name added to the pledge.
**You can sign the pledge right now using this link:**[**https://secured.heritage.org/vaccine-mandate-pledge/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ikvclil92rjiduvuam8dv363tqhs1jq6srg5ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3gm9oj4cth2bs) And you are more than welcome to share it with everyone you know. If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. **Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now.** Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

If we want to stop this violation of your freedom and privacy, we need as many people as possible to stand up against a mandate the Department of Labor has no authority to impose. Please don’t delay. Be sure to add your name to the pledge right now. Sincerely yours, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
_Sponsored message_
The Left’s control of the Senate are numbered

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9oa5su572tqnmca1c7377e3qt89vdm655mvbj7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3gm9pj0cjh2bs)

Folks,

There’s no sugar-coating it. 2022 has already gotten off to a rough start.

**I’m talking about running into a barbed-wire fence rough start.

I’m talking about Biden and Chuck Schumer doing everything in their power to flush any progress we’ve made as a nation down the toilet rough start.

We’ve lost some ground in the fight against the Radical Left, and I need your help in making it up so we can stop Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and their **SOCIALIST ALLIES.**

name: Team Kiggans
subject: One year of Biden
body:
TEXT "TEAM" to 70609

Yesterday marked a full year of the Biden Presidency - one year of one-party rule in Washington. How does our country look now compared to a year ago?

If you’re sick of the disastrous Biden Administration and Democrat controlled House, send me to Washington! [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=One+year+of+Biden]

Inflation is at a 40-year high...hard-working Americans are paying more at the pump and in stores, and many of the shelves in those stores are barren.

We have a porous border that no one on the left has any real intention of fixing. Illegal immigrants are parading into the country in record numbers while drug seizures are up over 1000% at the Southern Border, creating a crisis taking American lives.

We have raging culture wars and divisiveness... we saw the Biden Administration labeling parents "domestic terrorists."

Crime has hit decade-high numbers across the nation, while Democrats continually put criminals before victims.

COVID cases hit record highs after Biden promised to shut down the virus. As case numbers spike, tests and reliable, consistent information have been harder to come by.

Mandates have threatened our freedom, cost hardworking Americans their jobs, and made our children suffer.

Afghanistan is in shambles after President Biden surrendered it on a national stage. He has proven time and again that we are becoming more unreliable to our allies, and his foreign policy motto is “America Last.”

Looking back at this unprecedented tumultuous year, it is more apparent than ever that Republicans need to take back leadership in Washington. The left's one-party rule has failed the American people.

I look forward to reversing this administration's damage when I get to Washington. [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=One+year+of+Biden]

As always, I appreciate your support,

Jen

DONATE $10 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=10&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=One+year+of+Biden] DONATE $25 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=25&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=One+year+of+Biden] DONATE $50 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=50&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=One+year+of+Biden] DONATE $100 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=100&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=Nonpartisan+ethics+watchdog+calls+for+investigation+into+Elaine+Luiria+after+evidence+shows+she+violated+federal+law.] DONATE OTHER [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=One+year+of+Biden]

Jen Kiggans is a veteran of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Great America Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6764%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=UFJBEJ1btNosrLAKBFDhfA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69791%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7cAI4b9sGAzC4wyEN927Jw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69792%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fHBlWFVUfru6NGHs4IvvJQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69793%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f2C6f74bIyBV8exXSrhISw&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6764%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=UFJBEJ1btNosrLAKBFDhfA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6764%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=UFJBEJ1btNosrLAKBFDhfA&sysid=1)

| | | Fellow Conservative,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots – you were of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn’t a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbao-1uf35-4qqlpo3/ "%%Email__c%%")**

---
I cannot stress this enough – electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left’s liberal takeover. Look at what’s happening in blue states – businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in _ANY_ state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbao-1uf36-4qqlpo4/ "I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in ANY state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.")**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbao-1uf37-4qqlpo5/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
I won’t lie to you, it’s not going to be easy.

We’re fighting against the entire liberal machine – the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Fellow Conservative.

This isn’t a fair fight – they’ve got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left’s tyrannical agenda, and we’ve never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbao-1uf38-4qqlpo6/ "Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.")**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left’s policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbao-1uf39-4qqlpo7/ "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---

body:

Dear Peter,

Your name may be in Joe Biden's federal registry of domestic enemies.

Joe Biden and his anti-gun regime assembled a database of 55 million American gun owners.

There is only one reason to catalogue a list of firearms owners in America...

**...And that is so gun-grabbers know whose doors they need to kick down when the socialist Democrats move to ban and confiscate firearms.**

President Trump endorsed my campaign for Congress in Michigan because Trump knows I'm the only America Frist conservative in the race capable of fighting back against the Democrat's schemes to gut our Second Amendment rights.

RINO Peter Meijer proved he puts Nancy Pelosi first when he voted to impeach President Trump as part of the January 6 hoax.

**[Can I count on you to join President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in an emergency contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59521228:WOcgShHNk:m:1:2365227053:331ADBED9A52528A31E9D853173045E0:r)?**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59521228:WOcgShHNk:m:1:2365227053:331ADBED9A52528A31E9D853173045E0:r) [_**HELP GIBBS DEFEND THE 2ND AMENDMENT
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY! **_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59521228:WOcgShHNk:m:1:2365227053:331ADBED9A52528A31E9D853173045E0:r) Your support will help me alert every voter in Michigan's third congressional district that President Trump endorsed my campaign to oust pro-impeachment RINO Peter Meijer.

**Joe Biden's secret national gun registration database represents a tyrannical escalation of socialist Democrats' war on our gun rights.**

Stockpiling a dossier of gun owner records intensified the new domestic war on terror the regime declared on America First patriots.

This assault on our Second Amendment rights makes it clear that conservatives need a proven fighter that will never cave compromise our fundamental right to keep and bear arms.

Never Trumper Peter Meijer failed that test.

**Not only did Peter Meijer vote to impeach President Trump.**

Peter Meijer voted with Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar to create a Stalinist January 6 Committee whose only goal was blocking President Trump from running for re-election in 2024.

You and I don't need any more Liz Cheney's or Adam Kinzinger's controlled opposition-types colluding with the fake news media and Nancy Pelosi to shred our God-given rights.

**[If you want to replace pro-impeachment RINO Peter Meijer with a President Trump endorsed champion of the Second Amendment, please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or $500 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59521228:WOcgShHNk:m:1:2365227053:331ADBED9A52528A31E9D853173045E0:r).**

The Biden regime already stockpiled the names of moms and dads that protested critical race theory and mask mandates at school board meetings.

**Americans that questioned the results of the 2020 election sit in solitary confinement.**

55-million-gun owners now live with a dagger dangling over their heads.

That's because Joe Biden and the gun grabber's ultimate goal is banning and confiscating every every firearm in America.

When Peter Meijer voted to impeach Donald Trump, Peter Meijer proved his number one concern is CNN showering praise on him.

CNN slandered me because I dared to fight for President Trump.

**I wear fake news CNN 's attacks and lies like a badge of honor.**

And if elected to Congress I will vote to defund Joe Biden's national gun registration database.

But I need your help.

**[To keep my campaign's momentum building I'm asking you to chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59521228:WOcgShHNk:m:1:2365227053:331ADBED9A52528A31E9D853173045E0:r).**

Sincerely,
John Gibbs

RINO Peter Meijer proved he puts Nancy Pelosi first when he voted to impeach President Trump as part of the January 6 hoax. ? Your support will help me alert every voter in Michigan's third congressional district that President Trump endorsed my campaign to oust pro-impeachment RINO Peter Meijer. Joe Biden's secret national gun registration database represents a tyrannical escalation of socialist Democrats' war on our gun rights. Stockpiling a dossier of gun owner records intensified the new domestic war on terror the regime declared on America First patriots. This assault on our Second Amendment rights makes it clear that conservatives need a proven fighter that will never cave compromise our fundamental right to keep and bear arms. Never Trumper Peter Meijer failed that test. Not only did Peter Meijer vote to impeach President Trump. Peter Meijer voted with Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar to create a Stalinist January 6 Committee whose only goal was blocking President Trump from running for re-election in 2024. You and I don't need any more Liz Cheney's or Adam Kinzinger's controlled opposition-types colluding with the fake news media and Nancy Pelosi to shred our God-given rights. . The Biden regime already stockpiled the names of moms and dads that protested critical race theory and mask mandates at school board meetings. Americans that questioned the results of the 2020 election sit in solitary confinement. 55-million-gun owners now live with a dagger dangling over their heads. That's because Joe Biden and the gun grabber's ultimate goal is banning and confiscating every every firearm in America. When Peter Meijer voted to impeach Donald Trump, Peter Meijer proved his number one concern is CNN showering praise on him. CNN slandered me because I dared to fight for President Trump. I wear fake news CNN 's attacks and lies like a badge of honor. And if elected to Congress I will vote to defund Joe Biden's national gun registration database. But I need your help. . Sincerely, John Gibbs Paid for by Gibbs for Congress** __ This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-67675091705-echo3-E037050FF97AB6CE8373EB564A284959@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

body:
Your 2 year membership streak is at risk. Renew now >>>

| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhuj054ahkn2g0i0b6re0amcfged3dp3nk55soog_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or2c1h2bs)**

---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeh8c557p5iteiljh0591kmr4ttsb9ql2gkh16oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or2c1h2bs)** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk9l06jas5rus1bo4mat21kkqk8ui3in1723kq9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or2c1h2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqo5qj16nbik6oicn4sp8i217t3ns6hivp53b6t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or2c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.
