body:
I have been subpoenaed by Pelosi’s Congress.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoudcf3lis8o6av3sg7gbc6sbfiupm6r4adeaub8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onichh68o30edg7ctbn69jj9oj2m1pmdctmcqomasj6e1o6csdh6qoecphkmhqn1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb0mdi60shkcooj5ddksuobapbi4no)

I have been subpoenaed by Pelosi’s Congress.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zslkqog71ibaqslqkk06e7bi0ddae3jlmt8vv458_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
We knew this was coming...
---
**_Pelosi’s Congress has subpoenaed me._**
---
There’s nothing I can even say to Congress! As President Trump’s personal attorney, I have attorney-client privilege and executive privilege.
---
And Congress damn well knows that! This is nothing but a political witch hunt to try and take down each and every one of President Trump’s loyal allies.
---
After the FBI raid on my apartment last year failed, the Deep State has unleashed its latest weapon to take me down. You’re my only hope of fighting back.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3aubpn781ib48ggd9vmp44o2mrhilk5f7j4gojo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zctgssv7n51dsaj6aghttg8dnk0ffhu4cd8jbb6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2kl5sdubej9q2iv185kmbr99njev3tk8b50niuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkjufi6e5fisc65n86hosk5hd1vfcoo5eh14o740_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ucvbovbslk26inrsc4ua7e67fvq2017k1s0em0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4jgkeip7qino4bguqgc05hm9dvke95lrmjioil8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhi7gh6vbr4m3ebqr2h0977nuqmd40amffcrd5q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ecbklfo3rachik9de1lj6r0cfj1k75ipsec1co_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)**
---
---
The Committee Chair responsible for issuing the subpoena – who, by the way, is NOT a lawyer – stated that I may have “advanced unsupported theories about election fraud...”
---
Has it now become a crime to question the integrity of our elections?
---
At a time when inflation is hitting a 40-year record, crime is soaring, our southern border is in chaos, and America’s supply chains are breaking down, Pelosi’s Congress has chosen to wage war against its political enemies.
---
Friend: _this_ is the monstrous face of the swamp President Trump led a mission to drain.
---
**_The Deep State is trying to destroy me because of my allegiance to the man who fought to finally put the needs and interests of the American people FIRST._**
---
_They’d love nothing more than to take down the lawyer who SUCCESSFULLY defended President Trump from impeachment scams and witch hunts._
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdc5cfcudibgrtqpub557ps4u0fftic1idksq968_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)
---
**But now I simply have to ask for your help as I face enormous legal costs during this latest attack on my freedom.**
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8cpi468tiahqb3f7ec7juq4ol6v03in5fkp6rog_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im2or7cjh2bs)

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbnj-1uf7c-4qqlpo1/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbnj-1uf7d-4qqlpo2/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbnj-1uf7e-4qqlpo3/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cbnj-1uf7f-4qqlpo4/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2ke2h60047c2q2lfak3h2vjhn20lu2cauaakru0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im6ob1cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq79odm69jmecpkclqb6cdkmpgb4p75mdrrccliesp76t74sor64d1nmspjcc3n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti69j3cp5lmdjr4d366aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpbufl6i7fbf12gd5udkm95jhis51m8eq3ddl7r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im6ob1cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znl5m75shj8f6tbnv3dvlo2t1osl0j3qpj0r727g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im6ob1cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z55301o2377ki7o8di1prr0kgkop9u8145mospo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im6ob1cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zjgie57s40hpiks8043qujsoplb1c2s9o7s3e9e0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z53evvtrmt2pj3ehu6tuf7lhgq4vh694vdscnps8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3im6ob1cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Hello,
**Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight calls Ann Selzer “the best pollster in politics.”** Why? She knows Iowa better than anyone, overseeing almost every one of the Des Moines Register’s Iowa polls since 1987 – and she has a track record of nearly always being right.
That’s why this is such incredible news for Democrats: **Ann Selzer just told PBS that “there is something going on” in her latest poll and that she sees “weakness” for Iowa Republican Chuck Grassley in her new numbers!**
Admiral Mike Franken is the Democrat running against Chuck Grassley to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue, and if Mike wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold onto (or expand!) our Senate majority this year.
But Mike needs your help. **Right now, we’re still 364 donations short of our daily goal and what we need to help Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to try to defeat Mike and turn the Senate red. But Mike Franken’s not taking money from corporate PACs so if he’s going to win, he needs grassroots donors like you to chip in now:
[**No amount is too small. Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever amount you can afford before midnight tonight – to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40938500/326615214/-42398318?refcode=em20220122am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzE2OWQ5Ni04YjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZFCfZSWa7Sb7WR1KQ-yLcC8i0jrTgmuxUIqr44rW-x8=)

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: A dire need for equal, fair representation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
One of my first interviews as a candidate touched on an issue incredibly close to my heart. Last summer, I spoke with Washingtonian Magazine [https://www.washingtonian.com/2021/08/23/the-dc-area-congressional-delegation-is-overwhelmingly-male-could-that-change/] about the lack of female representation in the DMV area congressional delegation. Having female voices present and in positions of power is essential. Without the diverse, perceptive insight that women bring, inclusive, comprehensive public policy is stopped in its footsteps. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=washingtonian]
It’s not enough that women get paid just 82 cents to the dollar [https://www.americanprogress.org/article/quick-facts-gender-wage-gap/] , with that gap widening for women of color, this discrepancy between women and men is visible in Congress. Despite making up approximately 50% of the U.S. population, women are disproportionately underrepresented in our federal government and beyond.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-01-20%20at%204.40.53%20PM.png]
I know my supporters agree that there is a dire need for equal, fair representation at the Capitol. Be that representation for your gender or race, or even for someone with the same lived experience as you, something has got to change. I want to be that change for the people of Virginia, and with empathy and understanding, I will advocate for the issues close to home. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=washingtonian]
This interview rightly says that we face an up-hill battle, and I need your continued support to turn this battle into a victory. Can I count on your help today with a contribution to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=washingtonian]

clean_body: [] [] [] One of my first interviews as a candidate touched on an issue incredibly close to my heart. Last summer, I spoke with Washingtonian Magazine [] about the lack of female representation in the DMV area congressional delegation. Having female voices present and in positions of power is essential. Without the diverse, perceptive insight that women bring, inclusive, comprehensive public policy is stopped in its footsteps. [] It’s not enough that women get paid just 82 cents to the dollar [] , with that gap widening for women of color, this discrepancy between women and men is visible in Congress. Despite making up approximately 50% of the U.S. population, women are disproportionately underrepresented in our federal government and beyond. [] I know my supporters agree that there is a dire need for equal, fair representation at the Capitol. Be that representation for your gender or race, or even for someone with the same lived experience as you, something has got to change. body:
| |
---
Did you see the survey AG James sent out on the eve of Roe v. Wade's 49th anniversary, Peter?

The rate at which GOP-led state legislatures are dismantling the hard-won progress we've made for reproductive freedoms is shocking. That's why AG James needs fearless fighters like you to speak out against these dystopian injustices, even if the Supreme Court will not.
We're still **[73 responses short](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939135/326616485/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)** of where we need to be by midnight tonight, and it looks like we're still missing yours. Please, before 11:59 p.m., will you make your voice heard and let us know if Roe v. Wade should be protected?

Here's the link to the survey: [**https://surveys.signforgood.com/tj-0122-reprorights** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939136/326616486/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)

Thanks for standing by the attorney general at this critical hour.

Gabby
Team James

From: **Letitia James**
Date: Fri, Jan 21, 2022
Subject: Roe v. Wade is in danger
| | |
---
| | **_ROE V. WADE IS IN DANGER_**
---
On the 49th anniversary of this historic, groundbreaking case, backwards laws across the country threaten to undo all our hard-won progress.
**I need 744 more fearless fighters to take this urgent survey before midnight TONIGHT to fight back against the GOP's rampant spread of draconian laws against reproductive rights.**

**[_Take the survey now:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939137/326616487/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**

**Should Roe v. Wade be protected?**

| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939138/326616488/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939139/326616489/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter,

Forty-nine years ago tomorrow, the Supreme Court made the groundbreaking decision to recognize the constitutional right to have an abortion.

**Fast-forward to today:** GOP-majority state legislatures have passed thousands of backwards, dystopian restrictions that gut our autonomy over our own bodies, our access to quality health care, and our hard-won progress for the democracy of this country.
On the eve of the anniversary of this revolutionary case, we simply cannot sit idly by and let Republican legislatures dictate our reproductive rights, or lack thereof.
**That's why I'm reaching out to top Democrats today to make your voice heard by taking this critical survey: Before midnight tonight, before the anniversary of this historic case 49 years ago, we still need 744 more survey responses, and yours is missing.[_Will you speak out on behalf of reproductive rights for all Americans before midnight, and let us know:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939140/326616490/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**
| | **Should Roe v. Wade be protected?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939141/326616491/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40939142/326616492/-1126962631?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk308-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQxNzQ0Ny04YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QOoGPg0I2mnJJQzluSgnlfoUpsLI6yDff4LvvPnTk=&emci=8c4b0024-4e79-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1ad17447-8c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
---
Just last month, I continued my staunch, tireless opposition to the coordinated and unconstitutional attempts to roll back reproductive rights by challenging Arizona's "reason ban," that prohibits abortion when sought due to a fetal abnormality.
Reproductive rights are under constant assault, and Arizona is just the latest in a long line of conservative-led states, from Mississippi to Texas and beyond, seeking to control our bodies and our choices. I will never stop fighting them.

But our voices are louder – and stronger – when they rise up together. That's why it's so crucial I have people like you by my side in this fight for our democracy and our rights.
**So please, before midnight tonight, take a part in this crucial Roe v. Wade survey – we're still missing 744 responses: **
| | **Should Roe v. Wade be protected?**
---

The rate at which GOP-led state legislatures are dismantling the hard-won progress we've made for reproductive freedoms is shocking. That's why AG James needs fearless fighters like you to speak out against these dystopian injustices, even if the Supreme Court will not. We're still of where we need to be by midnight tonight, and it looks like we're still missing yours. Please, before 11:59 p.m., will you make your voice heard and let us know if Roe v. Wade should be protected? Here's the link to the survey: Thanks for standing by the attorney general at this critical hour. Gabby Team James \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Fri, Jan 21, 2022 Subject: Roe v. Wade is in danger | | | | | ROE V. WADE IS IN DANGER On the 49th anniversary of this historic, groundbreaking case, backwards laws across the country threaten to undo all our hard-won progress. I need 744 more fearless fighters to take this urgent survey before midnight TONIGHT to fight back against the GOP's rampant spread of draconian laws against reproductive rights. Should Roe v. Wade be protected? | | | | Peter, Forty-nine years ago tomorrow, the Supreme Court made the groundbreaking decision to recognize the constitutional right to have an abortion. Fast-forward to today: GOP-majority state legislatures have passed thousands of backwards, dystopian restrictions that gut our autonomy over our own bodies, our access to quality health care, and our hard-won progress for the democracy of this country. On the eve of the anniversary of this revolutionary case, we simply cannot sit idly by and let Republican legislatures dictate our reproductive rights, or lack thereof. That's why I'm reaching out to top Democrats today to make your voice heard by taking this critical survey: Before midnight tonight, before the anniversary of this historic case 49 years ago, we still need 744 more survey responses, and yours is missing. | | Should Roe v. Wade be protected? | | | | Just last month, I continued my staunch, tireless opposition to the coordinated and unconstitutional attempts to roll back reproductive rights by challenging Arizona's "reason ban," that prohibits abortion when sought due to a fetal abnormality. Reproductive rights are under constant assault, and Arizona is just the latest in a long line of conservative-led states, from Mississippi to Texas and beyond, seeking to control our bodies and our choices. I will never stop fighting them. But our voices are louder – and stronger – when they rise up together. That's why it's so crucial I have people like you by my side in this fight for our democracy and our rights. So please, before midnight tonight, take a part in this crucial Roe v. Wade survey – we're still missing 744 responses: | | Should Roe v. Wade be protected? | | | | Thank you for acting now. Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. # "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**[NEW] #1 Requested Item of 2021 –
Introductory Stock Extremely Limited**[**➡ Navy SEAL tested: see it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-NKA)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[**>> Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Hello my fellow Patriots.I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper, and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ If 2020 has taught us anything... it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN**.A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids.Crisis mode has become the new normal.Facts are facts. It's sad, but true. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family.Let me be clear. One of the best ways to protect your own safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out.Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout.All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. Communications, comfort and protection – all of it is suddenly called into question.**You simply have to have a backup power plan, no matter what your situation or budget.** Well now you can.Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device...That can harness the limitless and FREE energy from the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run.But if you want one, you better hurry...Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market.And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long.You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._yEqbsIIG08s3eurw)_"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"__Craig W.
Police Officer
Indiana
October 2020_Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more!You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets...**And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot.So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:[**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**You'll Never Run Out of Juice** _"You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." – Dan W._[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

body:
By now, you probably know our mantra: people over politics. |

Friend,

By now, you probably know our mantra: _people over politics._

But this mantra is about more than just putting Floridians first -- it’s also about _listening_ to folks like you, and hearing what you have to say. Hearing your hopes, fears, and concerns for the future.

**[So -- if you’ve got a few moments to spare -- can you take my issues survey? I’d like to find out what issues are most important to you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40941566/326624396/-972183672?refcode=20220122_f_1_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjE4YzcyYy05MTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q0TLbCnPHEhtAYih2ibUMqMI_SV78aOM7A0KuU66UF8=&emci=a11e2575-427a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8f18c72c-917b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8807089)**

Thank you,
Charlie Crist

body:
Team, our democracy is in serious danger! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012222_1] Since Trump’s Big Lie took the GOP by storm, we’ve seen attack after attack on our election system and officials.
Now Donald Trump has been caught on camera laying out the plan for 2024: make sure his cronies are the ones counting the votes! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012222_1]
“Sometimes the vote counter is more important than the candidate. They have to get a lot tougher and smarter.” – Donald Trump, Mar-a-Lago, last week

At least we agree on one thing – it’s really important who counts the votes.
Chip in to make sure it’s pro-voter Secretaries of State in 2024!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012222_1]
When Trump says, “they have to get tougher” he really means “they have to be willing to lie for me [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012222_1] .”
If Trump gets his way, democracy is doomed. Our pro-voter Secretaries have one shot to beat the insurrectionists and extremists this year. But we have to be ready!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012222_1]

Jahana voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act last year, which would protect a person’s ability to make her own health care choices and allow health care providers the ability to provide abortion services. Women should be in full control of their reproductive decisions.
We must work to ensure everyone has full access to reproductive rights and healthcare, whether it be birth control, comprehensive prenatal care, or abortion care – and maintain their right to choose without restriction.

name: Madison Horn via madisonhorn.com
subject: why I’m running…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Hey —

I never thought running for political office was part of my plan. But watching our “leaders” like James Lankford, act for their own interests instead of for the people and are wholly unqualified, I felt compelled to dive into this race.

I believe in making politics for the people and am taking a firm stance for reproductive freedom, our education, equity in healthcare, and building up our local economies.

It’s time to push back against the idea that only the wealthy, that only the chosen “elite,” should represent us. I am running to be the first woman Senator ever from our state and am ready to shake up Washington.

Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. | This week marks the 49th anniversary of the decision of _Roe v. Wade_ — when the Supreme Court secured the right for a **_woman to choose._**

Despite the decision from Roe, and affirming court cases that followed, reproductive rights are still under attack across the country.
| | [SIGN YOUR NAME TO STAND FOR REPRODUCTIVE FREEDOM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40943793/326634164/-2118038976?refcode=MH_EM_PT_1MO_20220122_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2JlZjhmNy05MzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qRReJcMaeXy0NqQhjoO1-gLbtNdiAzKntcL0-nX9kA=&emci=c35d0836-cb7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=97bef8f7-937b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2432894)

I am a third generation United Methodist pastor, and it is my faith that compels me to speak up against this injustice. Everyone deserves access to healthcare, and as an American, I don’t believe the government should restrict that access. The decision of if and when to have children is a human right. But with three Trump confirmed Supreme Court Justices presiding, _women’s access to equitable and safe healthcare is at very grave risk._

For years we have seen fear mongering and attacks from the far right, attempting to take away women’s rights in ways that have immediate, serious implications and put people’s lives at risk. We know the extremists would deny access even in the face of rape, incest, and when the life of the woman is at stake. We also know my opponent will quietly consent if extremism gets him reelected. _We cannot do the same and sit idly by and watch as millions of people’s rights get ripped away._

[The threat to reproductive healthcare actively threatens the lives and health of millions of Americans. subject: Roe v. Wade

body:
Forty-nine years ago, the Roe v. Wade decision solidified the right for people to make their own choice regarding reproductive care. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40943917/326634328/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiYmVmOGY3LTkzN2ItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2bOVycYGJrZ5S_RePRI3DhZ8YJ9urzQh9IWvS0if9S0=&emci=aa7d2e68-097b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=abbef8f7-937b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=16335001) Team,

Forty-nine years ago, the Roe v. Wade decision solidified the right for people to make their own choice regarding reproductive care.

Yet, ever since, politicians in this country, including the members of the Treason Caucus, have made it their mission to erode that right. **Sadly, in many cases, they have succeeded.**

We can't go back to a time when abortion was illegal. People lost their lives or suffered permanent damage to their health because racism, classism, and misogyny forced them into botched, back-alley procedures.

But already, recent restrictions on abortion are forcing people to go through with an unplanned or unwanted pregnancy due to lack of abortion access in their communities. **More than 50% of our population shouldn't have to fight for their rights in our democracy, but as long as the Treason Caucus remains in power, the fight must continue.**

**[Will you rush a donation today, in honor of Roe v. Wade, and help us build a war chest to defeat the extremist Treason Caucus and elect leaders who will protect our reproductive rights and our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40943918/326634329/1495222140?refcode=em22_220122_RVW_fndd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220122_RVW_fndd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiYmVmOGY3LTkzN2ItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2bOVycYGJrZ5S_RePRI3DhZ8YJ9urzQh9IWvS0if9S0=)**

In the last year alone, there were more than 600 abortion restrictions introduced in state legislatures across the country. At the federal level, members of the Treason Caucus have been hard at work to overturn and undermine Roe v. Wade.
* **Marjorie Taylor Greene** said that removing access to reproductive care would make women "better people" and has sponsored destructive anti-choice legislation.
* Texas has been dragging the nation down with some of the most restrictive abortion laws in the country with the help of extremist Republicans, one of them: **Ted Cruz.**
* Despite being embroiled in a federal sex scandal involving human trafficking, **Matt Gaetz** maintains his dedication to being a "voice for those without one" as he crusades in Congress against reproductive rights.

Listen, these are just some examples of ways that the Treason Caucus continues to damage our country and attack our rights. **Our organization began with the goal of holding these people accountable for the events of January 6, but our mission doesn't end there.**

By being avid supporters of anti-choice legislation and pushing dangerous agendas, the Treason Caucus is actively undermining our democracy. We can't move forward (in any area of legislation) unless these people are elected out of office and held accountable.

**[Help us defeat the extremist, anti-choice Treason Caucus by making a donation today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40943919/326634330/1495222140?refcode=em22_220122_RVW_fndd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220122_RVW_fndd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiYmVmOGY3LTkzN2ItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2bOVycYGJrZ5S_RePRI3DhZ8YJ9urzQh9IWvS0if9S0=)**

Thank you,

Team Never Again
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/napac-january-2022?refcode=em22_220122_RVW_fndd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220122_RVW_fndd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326)

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: On the anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40944108/326634797/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220122roevwade_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY0ZjQzNy05NDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qmo4u8vAvN-tapttQo7jJPMXBWVp1hoEIE3rXd9adaM=)
---
Today is the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark Supreme Court case that guaranteed the right to an abortion in the United States, and has been under attack by Republicans like Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick ever since. [Chip in to help me replace Fitzpatrick and fight for reproductive choice in Congress, then read my op-ed published in the _Bucks County Courier Times_ below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40944109/326634798/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220122roevwade_ae_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY0ZjQzNy05NDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qmo4u8vAvN-tapttQo7jJPMXBWVp1hoEIE3rXd9adaM=) Team, In America, families come in all shapes and sizes, but one thing is true for all of them: they must have the power to plan for the future. The 1973 Supreme Court decision on _Roe v. Wade_ is essential to that power, and it must be protected. A family, regardless of income or whether it is a single-parent household or has both parents in the picture, has to do what is best for them. **Republicans like our current Representative Brian Fitzpatrick want to take away this decision from families.** Young, single women with lower incomes are often positioned on the frontlines of the fight for reproductive rights. But if we go back to the numbers, and look at the statistics, the majority of family planning decisions are not made for one person, they are made for a family:
* 87-91% of women who have children use contraception.
* 90% of married women use some form of contraception.
* 59% of people who have an abortion are already parents.
* Nearly 1 in 4 women in the United States will have an abortion before the age of 45. These women are people in our families, they are our neighbors and they are members of our community.

It is sobering to look at the statistics, and see just how many other families struggle in our own community. 36,600 people in Bucks County live at or below the poverty level, and of people living in poverty here, the largest demographic group are women ages 25-34. When you factor in that the cost of living in Bucks County is substantially higher than the state and national average, it only makes things worse for members of our community. Make no mistake, Congressman Fitzpatrick’s consistent votes against reproductive freedoms means he is keeping families from getting care by hitting them where they are most vulnerable — burdening them with high costs and lost time. That is how anti-choice legislation works at its core. Just last Fall, Rep. Fitzpatrick voted against affirming the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ , signing off on extremist Republicans' plans to ban abortions for millions of women. He has pledged to defund Planned Parenthood which offers essential, life-saving healthcare services like cancer screenings. He even voted against an amendment allowing an abortion in order to save the life of a mother. This attack on reproductive freedom won’t happen in a vacuum, it will come for us all right here in Pennsylvania. That is why I support H.R. 3755, the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would federally codify _Roe v. Wade_. As more abortion bans make their way to the U.S. Supreme Court, here in Pennsylvania with a majority of Republicans in both state houses, our only line of defense becomes the Governor’s veto. Without that veto, and without codified legislation protecting access to safe and legal abortions, the number of people in poverty in PA-01 will increase. If families faced with unplanned pregnancy are forced to seek care out of state, then even more costs will pile up as they have to find the money to pay for travel, hotel rooms, take time off of work, or find child care. My own family struggled to afford groceries and make the rent on time, and I joined the Army at the age of 17 to make opportunities for myself that I otherwise would never have had. As a commander in the Army, I was in charge of over 200 soldiers, and when my soldiers were struggling, they knew they could come to me. Most people don’t know that many soldiers, veterans, and their families are living at or below the poverty line, often facing tough economic issues such as food insecurity. Too often, I had my soldiers come to me and say “Ma’am, the childcare center on post is all booked up, and I can’t afford a babysitter on my own”, or “Ma’am, my wife just had our third baby and I don’t know how we are going to make it work.” My soldiers came to me to solve problems. We need leaders we know we can turn to who will solve problems. Brian Fitzpatrick can’t be trusted to solve problems when he’s voting against our best interests. **I am a combat veteran — reproductive freedom is a part of the Constitution that I went overseas to fight to protect, and it’s time we take action in Congress to ensure it is protected.** **[Make a contribution to my campaign today to help me unseat Fitzpatrick this November and defend our right to reproductive choice in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40944110/326634799/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220122roevwade_ae_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY0ZjQzNy05NDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qmo4u8vAvN-tapttQo7jJPMXBWVp1hoEIE3rXd9adaM=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40944111/326634800/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220122roevwade_ae_full_xx_abx10&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY0ZjQzNy05NDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qmo4u8vAvN-tapttQo7jJPMXBWVp1hoEIE3rXd9adaM=)

clean_body: | = Today is the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade , the landmark Supreme Court case that guaranteed the right to an abortion in the United States, and has been under attack by Republicans like Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick ever since. = Team, In America, families come in all shapes and sizes, but one thing is true for all of them: they must have the power to plan for the future. The 1973 Supreme Court decision on Roe v. Wade is essential to that power, and it must be protected. A family, regardless of income or whether it is a single-parent household or has both parents in the picture, has to do what is best for them. Republicans like our current Representative Brian Fitzpatrick want to take away this decision from families. Young, single women with lower incomes are often positioned on the frontlines of the fight for reproductive rights. But if we go back to the numbers, and look at the statistics, the majority of family planning decisions are not made for one person, they are made for a family: 87-91% of women who have children use contraception. 90% of married women use some form of contraception. 59% of people who have an abortion are already parents. Nearly 1 in 4 women in the United States will have an abortion before the age of 45. These women are people in our families, they are our neighbors and they are members of our community. It is sobering to look at the statistics, and see just how many other families struggle in our own community. 36,600 people in Bucks County live at or below the poverty level, and of people living in poverty here, the largest demographic group are women ages 25-34. When you factor in that the cost of living in Bucks County is substantially higher than the state and national average, it only makes things worse for members of our community. Make no mistake, Congressman Fitzpatrick’s consistent votes against reproductive freedoms means he is keeping families from getting care by hitting them where they are most vulnerable — burdening them with high costs and lost time. That is how anti-choice legislation works at its core. Just last Fall, Rep. Fitzpatrick voted against affirming the protections of Roe v. Wade , signing off on extremist Republicans' plans to ban abortions for millions of women. He has pledged to defund Planned Parenthood which offers essential, life-saving healthcare services like cancer screenings. He even voted against an amendment allowing an abortion in order to save the life of a mother. This attack on reproductive freedom won’t happen in a vacuum, it will come for us all right here in Pennsylvania. That is why I support H.R. 3755, the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would federally codify Roe v. Wade. As more abortion bans make their way to the U.S. Supreme Court, here in Pennsylvania with a majority of Republicans in both state houses, our only line of defense becomes the Governor’s veto. Without that veto, and without codified legislation protecting access to safe and legal abortions, the number of people in poverty in PA-01 will increase. If families faced with unplanned pregnancy are forced to seek care out of state, then even more costs will pile up as they have to find the money to pay for travel, hotel rooms, take time off of work, or find child care. My own family struggled to afford groceries and make the rent on time, and I joined the Army at the age of 17 to make opportunities for myself that I otherwise would never have had. As a commander in the Army, I was in charge of over 200 soldiers, and when my soldiers were struggling, they knew they could come to me. Most people don’t know that many soldiers, veterans, and their families are living at or below the poverty line, often facing tough economic issues such as food insecurity. Too often, I had my soldiers come to me and say “Ma’am, the childcare center on post is all booked up, and I can’t afford a babysitter on my own”, or “Ma’am, my wife just had our third baby and I don’t know how we are going to make it work.” My soldiers came to me to solve problems. We need leaders we know we can turn to who will solve problems. Brian Fitzpatrick can’t be trusted to solve problems when he’s voting against our best interests. I am a combat veteran — reproductive freedom is a part of the Constitution that I went overseas to fight to protect, and it’s time we take action in Congress to ensure it is protected. = **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Tom Perez
subject: Three words for Mitch McConnell:
body:
Shame on you.
#

Peter,

I hope you don’t mind my writing you on a Saturday, but I think this is really important. This week, Republicans led an effort to stamp out two critical pieces of voting rights legislation that, if passed, would’ve ensured all eligible people can vote, and that their votes are counted – and I’m asking for your help to do something about it.

**It’s time to put our money where our mouth is:[Donate now to Fair Fight Action and ensure they can continue to fight back against voter suppression. 100% of your donation will benefit their work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40944522/326636526/15109028?refcode=bpi-em-20210122-fairfight&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQwM2FhOC05NDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tuNgnRaNvVcnJrxKirz1P-bbbnMzOry2uyLm_tCXWWE=)**

Passing this legislation seemed like a simple enough proposition, but not one Republican voted for it – not _one_.

The decision alone is devastating and disappointing, but then Mitch McConnell added insult to injury when he said – “African American voters are voting in just as high a percentage as _Americans_.”

**And that’s when I got really angry.**

I have three words for the Senator: **Shame on you.** African Americans _are_ Americans, and what you’ve said is insulting to the legacy of John Lewis and others who’ve endured physical violence, imprisonment, and death for the sacred right to participate in our democracy.

Peter, we could let our anger and disappointment at Senate Republicans hinder our ability to keep fighting, or we can transform that anger at this injustice into real change. **I’m choosing the latter, and I’m urging you to do the same.**

**[Please click here to make a donation to Fair Fight Action, and support their work to fight back against voter suppression, ensuring everyone has access to the ballot box. 100% of your donation will benefit Fair Fight Action.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40944523/326636527/15109028?refcode=bpi-em-20210122-fairfight&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQwM2FhOC05NDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tuNgnRaNvVcnJrxKirz1P-bbbnMzOry2uyLm_tCXWWE=)**

It’s been a tough week for our democracy, voting rights, and the values of opportunity we stand for in America, but I take comfort in knowing we’re on the right side of history, and I know justice will ultimately prevail.

Thanks for continuing this fight,

Tom Perez
Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States

clean_body: Shame on you. Peter, I hope you don’t mind my writing you on a Saturday, but I think this is really important. This week, Republicans led an effort to stamp out two critical pieces of voting rights legislation that, if passed, would’ve ensured all eligible people can vote, and that their votes are counted – and I’m asking for your help to do something about it. It’s time to put our money where our mouth is:= Passing this legislation seemed like a simple enough proposition, but not one Republican voted for it – not one. The decision alone is devastating and disappointing, but then Mitch McConnell added insult to injury when he said – “African American voters are voting in just as high a percentage as Americans.” And that’s when I got really angry. I have three words for the Senator: Shame on you. African Americans are Americans, and what you’ve said is insulting to the legacy of John Lewis and others who’ve endured physical violence, imprisonment, and death for the sacred right to participate in our democracy. Peter, we could let our anger and disappointment at Senate Republicans hinder our ability to keep fighting, or we can transform that anger at this injustice into real change. I’m choosing the latter, and I’m urging you to do the same. = It’s been a tough week for our democracy, voting rights, and the values of opportunity we stand for in America, but I take comfort in knowing we’re on the right side of history, and I know justice will ultimately prevail. Thanks for continuing this fight, Tom Perez Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

subject: Abortion rights are in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
Our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. And if he is elected, he will try to take away those rights.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40946447/326645420/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.22_b1_abortion_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY3ZjYyOC05ODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SeNpX7XIn2MccSSpa_M7APYJy5sUTPA-LNYXEXO2r00=)
---
Friends --

49 years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled in the historic _Roe v. Wade_ case that legalized abortion across the country.

And now, these rights are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Last year, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that has the potential to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

And because the Republicans were able to stack the Court with far-right leaning justices, there is a very real chance it could happen. If it does, abortion could become illegal here in Wisconsin.

Abortion rights are too important to allow them to be decided by the whim of the Supreme Court. They need to be codified into law so they can be protected for people who need them forever.

But our opponent Derrick Van Orden is against abortion access. And if he is elected, he will try to take away those rights.

Brad will always fight to protect and codify abortion access. So at a time so perilous for abortion rights, it’s more important than ever to send him to Congress. But he needs your help to get there.

body:
On this day, in 1973, the Supreme Court made the historic decision to grant women the right to make their own health care choices. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948035/326652016/-1840596280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg2YTQ4My05YjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=naICESf7rsCNR3D1ZJbMyPb2aMSCO9DhRZwcglNDRoo=&emci=91b5a1db-3b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7286a483-9b7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14943358) Friends, On this day, in 1973, the Supreme Court made the historic decision to grant women the right to make their own health care choices. Every single day since then, the right to a safe abortion has been under attack. **[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Will you join me in sending the message to Congress that they must do WHATEVER it takes to protect Roe?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948036/326652017/-1840596280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg2YTQ4My05YjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=naICESf7rsCNR3D1ZJbMyPb2aMSCO9DhRZwcglNDRoo=&emci=91b5a1db-3b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7286a483-9b7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14943358)** **[**Sign Now >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948037/326652018/-1840596280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg2YTQ4My05YjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=naICESf7rsCNR3D1ZJbMyPb2aMSCO9DhRZwcglNDRoo=&emci=91b5a1db-3b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7286a483-9b7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14943358)** The government has no business involving itself in the medical choices of any person. Forty-eight years ago, America took a significant step forward, but today we are in genuine danger of moving backward. Anti-choice extremists will stop at nothing to rob women of bodily autonomy, so we have to take action now! **[We need 3,000 people to sign on in support of Roe v. Wade today! Will you join me in this fight by signing our petition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948038/326652019/-1840596280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg2YTQ4My05YjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=naICESf7rsCNR3D1ZJbMyPb2aMSCO9DhRZwcglNDRoo=&emci=91b5a1db-3b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7286a483-9b7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14943358)** **[**Sign Now >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948039/326652020/-1840596280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg2YTQ4My05YjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=naICESf7rsCNR3D1ZJbMyPb2aMSCO9DhRZwcglNDRoo=&emci=91b5a1db-3b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7286a483-9b7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14943358)** When I am in Congress, I will do everything I can to expand access to reproductive healthcare and secure the right to abortion. **[But we cannot wait that long, Congress needs to act now, sign on in support of reproductive freedom right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948040/326652021/-1840596280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg2YTQ4My05YjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=naICESf7rsCNR3D1ZJbMyPb2aMSCO9DhRZwcglNDRoo=&emci=91b5a1db-3b7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7286a483-9b7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14943358)** We are not going back. Ben Samuels

body:
Re: COVID-19 tests. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40948208/326654694/1582314273?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNGRhNTU5LTljN2ItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-xbQMhTKErEqpWKIRRYAcF4pLlLUIvPXGaOf34Qhwj4=) Exciting news, Peter. In case you missed it: **President Biden announced a massive plan to buy and distribute 1 billion COVID-19 rapid tests over the coming months — to expand testing capacity and increase access to free testing.** Ordering one for you and your family is easy! You can visit [**covidtests.gov**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40948209/326654695/-2091205112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNGRhNTU5LTljN2ItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-xbQMhTKErEqpWKIRRYAcF4pLlLUIvPXGaOf34Qhwj4=&emci=c6a287dd-e37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fb4da559-9c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=16951753), and follow a link that takes you to an order form on the [**U.S. Postal Service website**.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40948210/326654696/-1567335107?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNGRhNTU5LTljN2ItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-xbQMhTKErEqpWKIRRYAcF4pLlLUIvPXGaOf34Qhwj4=&emci=c6a287dd-e37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fb4da559-9c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=16951753) _Only one order for four tests can be placed per address._ President Biden is working around the clock to ensure the American people have the tools and resources to fight COVID-19: from the American Rescue Plan and vaccination program to free-at-home rapid tests. His administration is even preparing to give away 400 million N95 masks, starting next week. We couldn’t be prouder of Joe’s hard-fought effort to keep the American people safe. Thank you, and stay safe! Julianna

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Today is the anniversary of Roe v. Wade
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
On this date in 1973, the Supreme Court ruled that the US Constitution protected a woman’s right to an abortion. Now, nearly 50 years later, the conservative-majority Court seems poised to roll back abortion rights by upholding Mississippi’s restrictive abortion law which bans abortions after 15 weeks. If the Court chooses to overturn Roe v. Wade completely, then millions of women around the nation will lose access to their right to choose.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/PkDoMNLYxUSFqDhoWD9Bgg2?source=em [https://secure.ngpvan.com/PkDoMNLYxUSFqDhoWD9Bgg2?source=em]We cannot sit idly by while anti-abortion extremists attack the rights of women. On this historic anniversary of Roe v. Wade, I’m asking for you to stand with me in the fight to protect and expand reproductive rights in Maryland. Will you sign my petition urging the Maryland legislature to enshrine the right to an abortion into the state’s constitution? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/PkDoMNLYxUSFqDhoWD9Bgg2?source=em]
As Governor, I’ll oppose ANY attempts to restrict women’s reproductive rights, and I’ll take steps to protect and expand the right to choose. I’ll fight to ensure that healthcare providers cover abortions and related services, and that undocumented Marylanders have access to safe, full care.
Abortion is healthcare, and the right to choose shouldn’t just be for the rich, the wealthy, and the powerful. If you agree with me, then please stand with me – the Supreme Court is on the verge of rolling back abortion rights across the country, and Maryland needs to be prepared to protect abortion rights within the state.
SIGN YOUR NAME: The Maryland legislature should pass the abortion rights amendment bill. Thank you, [https://secure.ngpvan.com/PkDoMNLYxUSFqDhoWD9Bgg2?source=em]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Fighting for Roe v. Wade 49 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948304/326654828/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzRlYTU1OS05YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0Si6grNPD4KaDiu-zcWAZPk04hOY5Djm6GTH4jPsiQ=&emci=8ffdc121-f17a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=074ea559-9c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Today, on the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade,**our constitutional right to abortion care is being dismantled.**
More than 600 abortion restrictions were introduced in 2021 alone – with more than 100 being signed into law. This is a record number in any one year since Roe v. Wade was first decided.
I will say it as many times as I have to: **abortion is health care and access to abortion is essential.**
**This is personal, friend, becasue Arizona is one of the many states where abortion would immediately be criminalized if Roe v. Wade is overturned.**
The _Women’s Health Protection Act_ must be passed as soon as possible to protect this right and ensure everyone can make their own health care decisions without political interference.
Right now, our opponents are running on the promise to ban abortion, preventing people from making health care decisions about their own bodies.
I have always fought to protect reproductive rights, and I will continue to do so in Congress. [**Can I count on you to join me in the fight to defend reproductive rights by chipping in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948309/326654833/41694283?refcode=X_012221_RoevWadeAnniversary&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzRlYTU1OS05YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0Si6grNPD4KaDiu-zcWAZPk04hOY5Djm6GTH4jPsiQ=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40948834/326656759/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTI4ZWQwYS05ZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbSxLzDxACbdo6s0Y2s2gSOcnnNPMZh7loEviQe2Z0U=&emci=f5ae6b93-0a7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fa28ed0a-9d7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=561582) | Fairness Project is saying happy anniversary to _Roe v. Wade_ today, and as part of our celebration, we’re inviting you to [_**sign on to our petition**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40948838/326656761/-2006476016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTI4ZWQwYS05ZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbSxLzDxACbdo6s0Y2s2gSOcnnNPMZh7loEviQe2Z0U=&emci=f5ae6b93-0a7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fa28ed0a-9d7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=561582) in favor of _protecting Roe_ and codifying our reproductive rights. [CODIFY ROE V. WADE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40948840/326656766/-2006476016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTI4ZWQwYS05ZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbSxLzDxACbdo6s0Y2s2gSOcnnNPMZh7loEviQe2Z0U=&emci=f5ae6b93-0a7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fa28ed0a-9d7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=561582) **Team****, extremist legislators across the country cracked down hard on reproductive rights in 2021, and they’re not going to stop in 2022.** Now, with the decision for _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ right around the corner, we’re looking at an all-out attack on reproductive rights. The good news is that there _are_ ways to protect our reproductive rights — like ballot measures and health care expansions — but they require your action and support. body:
Republicans are trying to entrench themselves in power, and it is powerfully important we don’t allow that to happen. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948877/326656807/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3A_SCO_E_20211122_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NhZGNlYy05YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fmg9iq2kzQhzRVL7lEiRdbhIxTQlTpoz_3kcww2qJ4c=&emci=e0f3a099-9c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=eccadcec-9c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)

Twelve years ago yesterday, the Supreme Court hung a big “For Sale” sign on our democracy. Their disastrous ruling in Citizens United opened the floodgates to unlimited campaign cash from wealthy donors and corporations. It put power in the hands of big money spenders while taking it out of yours. And since then, the Supreme Court has been shoved even further to the far right. Which brings me to today’s anniversary. Forty-nine years ago, the Court’s ruling in Roe v. Wade affirmed the right to an abortion. For nearly a half-century, Roe — despite attack after attack and attack from the right — has remained the law of the land. But the Court’s new conservative supermajority is now on the verge of overturning this landmark protection. Along with Citizens United, and the gutting of the Voting Rights Act, we’ve seen the damage the Court can do. We’ve seen how it’s been hijacked by the far right. And we see how we need to fight back. **I’m going to keep fighting to rebalance the Court by adding at least four new justices. But to get it done, we must elect more progressive Democrats who agree with our vision.** [_**Can you chip in $3 to support our re-election campaign and help get more progressive Democrats elected who believe in restoring balance, integrity, and independence to the extremist Court? Every donation helps change how our government works and who it works for.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948878/326656808/-237140144?refcode=EMZ3A_SCO_E_20211122_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NhZGNlYy05YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fmg9iq2kzQhzRVL7lEiRdbhIxTQlTpoz_3kcww2qJ4c=&emci=e0f3a099-9c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=eccadcec-9c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
I’ll just be blunt: It’s hypocrisy, pure and simple, for Mitch McConnell and his cast of Senate Republicans to cry foul about Court reform.
I had a front-row seat when Mitch and his Republican majority refused to recognize Merrick Garland’s nomination for nearly a full year while they waited out President Obama’s second term, only to watch them scurry to confirm Amy Coney Barrett in the final days of Donald Trump’s presidency and their party’s majority just a few years later.
Let’s face it: Republicans have been playing fast and loose with the rules of engagement for some time now, and particularly when it comes to our judicial system. They’re trying to entrench themselves in power in every branch and at every level of our government, and it is powerfully important we don’t allow that to happen.
**As always, I’m ready to fight back — but I can’t do it alone. It’s going to take us working together, building this grassroots coalition and electing more progressive Democrats who understand the urgency of this moment.**
[_**If you can, please make a $3 donation to support our campaign and the big, structural change our country needs.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948891/326656821/947137114?refcode=EMZ3A_SCO_E_20211122_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NhZGNlYy05YzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fmg9iq2kzQhzRVL7lEiRdbhIxTQlTpoz_3kcww2qJ4c=)

Elizabeth

clean_body: Republicans are trying to entrench themselves in power, and it is powerfully important we don’t allow that to happen. | | | Twelve years ago yesterday, the Supreme Court hung a big “For Sale” sign on our democracy. Their disastrous ruling in Citizens United opened the floodgates to unlimited campaign cash from wealthy donors and corporations. It put power in the hands of big money spenders while taking it out of yours. And since then, the Supreme Court has been shoved even further to the far right. Which brings me to today’s anniversary. Forty-nine years ago, the Court’s ruling in Roe v. Wade affirmed the right to an abortion. For nearly a half-century, Roe — despite attack after attack and attack from the right — has remained the law of the land. But the Court’s new conservative supermajority is now on the verge of overturning this landmark protection. Along with Citizens United, and the gutting of the Voting Rights Act, we’ve seen the damage the Court can do. We’ve seen how it’s been hijacked by the far right. And we see how we need to fight back. I’m going to keep fighting to rebalance the Court by adding at least four new justices. But to get it done, we must elect more progressive Democrats who agree with our vision. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | I’ll just be blunt: It’s hypocrisy, pure and simple, for Mitch McConnell and his cast of Senate Republicans to cry foul about Court reform. I had a front-row seat when Mitch and his Republican majority refused to recognize Merrick Garland’s nomination for nearly a full year while they waited out President Obama’s second term, only to watch them scurry to confirm Amy Coney Barrett in the final days of Donald Trump’s presidency and their party’s majority just a few years later. Let’s face it: Republicans have been playing fast and loose with the rules of engagement for some time now, and particularly when it comes to our judicial system. They’re trying to entrench themselves in power in every branch and at every level of our government, and it is powerfully important we don’t allow that to happen. As always, I’m ready to fight back — but I can’t do it alone. It’s going to take us working together, building this grassroots coalition and electing more progressive Democrats who understand the urgency of this moment. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:

Here’s what you need to know – Senator Maggie Hassan’s race in New Hampshire will determine the Senate majority. **The future of the Supreme Court, voting rights, and reproductive health care are all on the line.**
Republicans have spent over $7 MILLION to defeat her – more than against any other Senate Democratic incumbent – but Maggie’s fundraising is behind other top Democrats. That’s why Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40948937/326657171/-1281091919?refcode=e20220122_maddow&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDc0ZTUxMC05ZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=An1DmYHlIVLlIyQ1OkLA0xBT-0SRhGajUdlmpq-g-7M=)
Look, we really need every single Democrat to step up. If any one of us becomes complacent, we could lose this seat, and Mitch McConnell will take back the Senate majority. We’ll say it again: there is too much on the line to let that happen.
A donation of even just $5 or more could be the thing that wins this election. clean_body: | | | "Maggie Hassan is sort of the prototypical moderate Senate Democrat, and she is up for reelection. She is incredibly practical. She is a low-profile work horse, not show horse...who really concentrates on just getting things done in New Hampshire." | | = Here’s what you need to know – Senator Maggie Hassan’s race in New Hampshire will determine the Senate majority. The future of the Supreme Court, voting rights, and reproductive health care are all on the line. Republicans have spent over $7 MILLION to defeat her – more than against any other Senate Democratic incumbent – but Maggie’s fundraising is behind other top Democrats. That’s why Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm: = Look, we really need every single Democrat to step up. If any one of us becomes complacent, we could lose this seat, and Mitch McConnell will take back the Senate majority. We’ll say it again: there is too much on the line to let that happen. A donation of even just $5 or more could be the thing that wins this election. And frankly, given that Maggie won her last race by just 1,017 votes, choosing not to donate could be the thing that loses it. = | = = = = Thank you. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
