name: Conor Lamb
subject: I will always vote to protect a woman's right to choose, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949004/326657597/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjAzMzg5Yi05ZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygtn-5CCXy35lfF-o-5MmoI8XiPN4K-Ibg8yufYhtAE=)

Friend,

Almost 50 years ago today, the _Roe v. Wade_ case was decided by the Supreme Court. This decision guaranteed the right to choose and protected the ability to make personal medical decisions about reproductive health without government interference. **But now, there are clear threats to _Roe_ that could lead to this landmark decision being overturned.**

**First,** the conservative-majority Supreme Court insulated the extremely restrictive Texas law banning abortion after six weeks from judicial review – this is before most women know that they are pregnant. For the highest court in the land to refuse to take action to protect reproductive rights is highly worrying, friend.

**Now,** the upcoming _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ case could see this same Supreme Court _fully overturning Roe v. Wade,_ putting bodily autonomy and reproductive rights everywhere in America **at immediate risk.**

**[Friend, I will always vote to protect women's right to choose. I cosponsored and voted to codify _Roe_ into law in the House, and with one more vote in the Senate, that can become law – no matter what the court does. Will you lend your support to my campaign so I can defend the right to choose in the Senate? >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949005/326657598/-49815258?refcode=em22_220122_roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjAzMzg5Yi05ZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygtn-5CCXy35lfF-o-5MmoI8XiPN4K-Ibg8yufYhtAE=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949006/326657599/-49815258?refcode=em22_220122_roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjAzMzg5Yi05ZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygtn-5CCXy35lfF-o-5MmoI8XiPN4K-Ibg8yufYhtAE=) Thank you for taking action. Together, we will defend the right to choose and protect health care access for all.

name: Aramis Ayala
subject: Today could be the last anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Aramis Ayala for Congress
body:
Let me be clear: a woman’s right to privacy and her freedom to make her own medical decisions should be free from interference from the government.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949499/326660169/-1888922884?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.12.21_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.22_b1_rvw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QnIL8-E4yL77x63NtGacGWvvY3ZoJT9gO1evdj2JxY4=)

Peter,

Today is the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , but I’ve never been more concerned that it might be the last.

Right here in Florida, Republicans proposed a bill to ban abortions after just 15 weeks. And unfortunately, with a Republican-controlled legislature, it is likely to pass.

**Peter, let me be clear: a woman’s right to privacy and her freedom to make her own medical decisions should be free from interference from the government.**

And now that we can’t count on _Roe v. Wade_ to protect this right, Democrats need to take federal action and codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law.

Now is the time for strong, decisive action. I will never waiver in my commitment to fighting for reproductive rights to remain free from unconstitutional government intrusion, and in Congress I will be a champion for women’s rights.

**[So if you want to make sure that reproductive rights are protected, please chip in $5 to my campaign so I can take our vision to Congress:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949501/326660171/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.22_b1_rvw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.22_b1_rvw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QnIL8-E4yL77x63NtGacGWvvY3ZoJT9gO1evdj2JxY4=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949502/326660172/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.22_b1_rvw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.22_b1_rvw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QnIL8-E4yL77x63NtGacGWvvY3ZoJT9gO1evdj2JxY4=)

This issue affects everyone across the country, but especially Black, Brown, and poor people seeking abortion care.

Those who are wealthy have always been able to access abortions when they need them.

But if _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned, Black, Brown, and poor people may find themselves out of options. And since our country still doesn’t provide necessities like maternal leave, child care, or health care, these women and their children will face unnecessary challenges from undue governmental intrusion.

**[I will fight tooth and nail to stop this from happening when I’m in Congress. And Peter, if you’re with me, I just need $5 from you today to help my campaign. Can I count on your help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949509/326660180/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.22_b1_rvw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.22_b1_rvw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QnIL8-E4yL77x63NtGacGWvvY3ZoJT9gO1evdj2JxY4=)**

clean_body: Let me be clear: a woman’s right to privacy and her freedom to make her own medical decisions should be free from interference from the government. | = Peter, Today is the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade , but I’ve never been more concerned that it might be the last. Right here in Florida, Republicans proposed a bill to ban abortions after just 15 weeks. And unfortunately, with a Republican-controlled legislature, it is likely to pass. Peter, let me be clear: a woman’s right to privacy and her freedom to make her own medical decisions should be free from interference from the government. And now that we can’t count on Roe v. Wade to protect this right, Democrats need to take federal action and codify Roe v. Wade into law. Now is the time for strong, decisive action. I will never waiver in my commitment to fighting for reproductive rights to remain free from unconstitutional government intrusion, and in Congress I will be a champion for women’s rights. = | = = = = = = This issue affects everyone across the country, but especially Black, Brown, and poor people seeking abortion care. Those who are wealthy have always been able to access abortions when they need them. But if Roe v. Wade is overturned, Black, Brown, and poor people may find themselves out of options. And since our country still doesn’t provide necessities like maternal leave, child care, or health care, these women and their children will face unnecessary challenges from undue governmental intrusion. = Thank you for listening, Aramis Ayala | | Paid for by Aramis Ayala for Congress. Aramis Ayala for Congress P.O. Box 691581 Orlando, FL 32869 United States Aramis Ayala is an award-winning advocate for justice reform and human rights. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: 49 years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Team,

Today is the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade , when the Supreme Court affirmed a woman’s right to choose nationwide.

In 2016, I ran for Congress against an anti-choice incumbent with the promise that I would fight to defend the right to choose. As your Congressman, I have fought to ensure that women can make their own decisions about their reproductive health, and I won’t stop now.

Currently, reproductive rights are under attack across the country and the future of Roe is uncertain.

We cannot sit idly by and watch as millions of women’s rights get ripped away. We must stand up for a woman’s right to choose.

I’m committed to the fight to ensure everyone has access to the reproductive healthcare they need, join me by adding your name here: [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/repro-rights]ADD YOUR NAME [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/repro-rights]

Thank you,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Amanda Green-Hawkins, Keystone Progress
subject: Give us the ballot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

“The denial of [the] sacred right [to vote] is a tragic betrayal of the highest mandates of our democratic tradition. And so our most urgent request to the president of the United States and every member of Congress is to . . . Give us the ballot, and . . . we will transform the salient misdeeds of bloodthirsty mobs into the calculated good deeds of orderly citizens. Give us the ballot, and we will fill our legislative halls with men of goodwill...”

In 1957, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. voiced these decisive words in a powerful voting rights speech. At the Prayer Pilgrimage for Freedom at the Lincoln Memorial in Washington, D.C., Dr. King was undeterred by segregationists when he demanded that America “Give Us the Ballot.”

Sixty-five years later, we pretended to honor Dr. King on his holiday, yet, we continue to dishonor him with hypocrisy. Over the past several days, legislative efforts in Congress to protect peoples’ right to vote were blocked by obstructionists. Without a doubt, this will lead to the disenfranchisement of thousands or millions of Americans.

Dr. King knew that the ballot empowers people by giving them a voice. He understood that by the power vested by the ballot, people could change their condition. We must honor Dr. King and his legacy on his holiday and every day, not by words, but through action. We must recommit ourselves to continuing his work and working to protect voting rights.

Together, we can indeed change our condition and enforce America’s promise of liberty and justice for all.

Please stand with us to support voters’ rights — today and always.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012222 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012222]

In solidarity,

Amanda Green-Hawkins
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Pittsburgh, PA 15224

body:
Today, we celebrate 49 years of Roe v. Wade

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949574/326660279/224548824?refcode=roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-f25qrJvQ4oKPMgRm7QAa_hx8ZcYYP2okPfyqgwwNw=) Peter, 49 years ago today, the Supreme Court issued their decision in _Roe v. Wade_ — a landmark case in the fight for women’s rights that legalized abortion at the federal level. Today should be a day to celebrate this historic victory and the continued commitment to upholding women’s rights in our country. But, instead, today is a grim reminder that women’s rights are facing the greatest threat since 1973. **[With the Supreme Court poised to overturn Roe this summer, it’s likely that this will be Roe’s last anniversary. And if that happens, dozens of states will ban abortion outright — INCLUDING FLORIDA. Chip in $10 today to help us fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949575/326660281/224548824?refcode=roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-f25qrJvQ4oKPMgRm7QAa_hx8ZcYYP2okPfyqgwwNw=)** As we speak, Ron DeSantis’ 15 week abortion ban is making its way through the Florida Legislature. And in the next few weeks, he’ll sign it into law. If _Roe_ gets overturned, there’s no doubt that the Florida GOP will completely ban abortion the moment they get the chance. **But not if I have anything to say about it. ** **[I’ve never wavered in my commitment to women’s rights. And as the first woman Governor of Florida, I will refuse to sign any law that would limit those rights. Help me win this race, defeat Ron DeSantis, and fight back against the GOP’s anti-choice, anti-women agenda. Click here to chip in $10 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949576/326660282/224548824?refcode=roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-f25qrJvQ4oKPMgRm7QAa_hx8ZcYYP2okPfyqgwwNw=)** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately._ | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949577/326660283/224548824?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-f25qrJvQ4oKPMgRm7QAa_hx8ZcYYP2okPfyqgwwNw=) | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949578/326660285/224548824?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-f25qrJvQ4oKPMgRm7QAa_hx8ZcYYP2okPfyqgwwNw=) | [$20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40949579/326660287/224548824?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWY5ODg3Mi05ZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-f25qrJvQ4oKPMgRm7QAa_hx8ZcYYP2okPfyqgwwNw=)

Women in Florida deserve a Governor who will stand up for our rights. We deserve to make our own choices, free from government interference. And we deserve reproductive freedom.

That’s what I’ll fight for as your next Governor. And I’m so grateful to have supporters like you fighting with me.

Thank you for being on my team.

— Nikki

| | While we should be celebrating the historic decision of _Roe v. Wade_ today, many of us, including myself, are worried about the future of reproductive rights if Republicans have control of Congress. Ron Johnson has shown how clearly anti-choice he is, voting to put anti-choice judges in power so that they can overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

Under his reign, millions are at risk of losing their reproductive rights. That's why I’m so passionate about electing Tom Nelson to the US Senate – he’s been a champion of reproductive rights and women’s health and will stop the attacks on choice.

The ramifications of destroying _Roe v. Wade_ would be devastating. This is especially true for Wisconsinites, because we still have a total abortion ban on the books from 1849 that could be enforced again if _Roe_ is overturned. We can’t let doctors be threatened with felonies simply for providing safe abortion care.

**I believe Tom is the strongest candidate to beat Ron Johnson, and our best chance to advance reproductive freedom in Congress.** [If you agree, support him today by donating anything you can >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950489/326665064/1053214558?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220122_1_1&refcode2=a7bd9ba2-a27b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2JkOWJhMi1hMjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuFP1J0V11jyqDovzYWsLaLEty1gPBJh9aJMjUBou6U=)

Thank you,
Kelda

And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | | While we should be celebrating the historic decision of Roe v. Wade today, many of us, including myself, are worried about the future of reproductive rights if Republicans have control of Congress. Ron Johnson has shown how clearly anti-choice he is, voting to put anti-choice judges in power so that they can overturn Roe v. Wade. Under his reign, millions are at risk of losing their reproductive rights. That's why I’m so passionate about electing Tom Nelson to the US Senate – he’s been a champion of reproductive rights and women’s health and will stop the attacks on choice. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = The ramifications of destroying Roe v. Wade would be devastating. This is especially true for Wisconsinites, because we still have a total abortion ban on the books from 1849 that could be enforced again if Roe is overturned. We can’t let doctors be threatened with felonies simply for providing safe abortion care. I believe Tom is the strongest candidate to beat Ron Johnson, and our best chance to advance reproductive freedom in Congress. = Thank you, Kelda Kelda Roys State Senator, District 26 | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. Team, Today, we celebrate the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ — the landmark Supreme Court case that has since guaranteed the right to reproductive choice — but Republicans like Yvette Herrell and her allies in the Supreme Court are working to make sure that there won't be a 50th. Republicans have spent the last 49 years attacking reproductive rights and attempting to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , largely by introducing abortion bans in state legislatures all over the country. **Last year, the Texas GOP succeeded in passing an extreme 6-week abortion ban, and the conservative-led U.S. Supreme Court allowed it to go into effect — a move that far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell applauded.** With _Roe v. Wade_ at risk of being gutted in the Supreme Court this year, it’s absolutely imperative that we elect enough Democrats to the House and Senate so we can successfully pass legislation to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. Unlike Herrell, who wants to return to the dark days of back-alley abortions, I will support codifying abortion rights in federal law, so that women no longer need to live in fear that an unelected judge will take away their right to choose. [**On today’s important anniversary, let’s recommit ourselves to the fight for choice: chip in $10 or whatever you can to help me unseat Herrell, hold the House Democratic majority, and protect the right to abortion and reproductive health care.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950556/326665289/284315840?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220122roevwade_GV_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIxMjQxZS1hMzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=opXxDoqqMJSsVZ4lG2E_if_YHoB81ZmjVdFL2GFNmCM=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Forty-nine years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that people had the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions in the landmark Roe v. Wade decision. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950755/326667289/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jukLeFMaJ2Os-ge_i3rwFu_mTh__7cCdnnBwuvfH3Sg=&emci=0eb76003-ce7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9312fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

Forty-nine years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that people had the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions in the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision.

_Roe_ might be the law of the land, but that hasn't stopped Republicans from attacking access to reproductive care. Last year alone, 19 states introduced 106 abortion restrictions – the highest recorded since _Roe_ was decided in 1973.

And to make matters worse, the Supreme Court will be making a decision this year on Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban which could decide the fate of _Roe_. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, our reproductive rights are in clear danger.

**[We can't let this be the last anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. Add your name to join Kim in recommitting to the fight to protect reproductive health care rights →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950756/326667290/-150578096?ms=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=PA1ZyK%2B6vzsk3oRacjL4Iz7ax8OgUuYmjsAIqs0IZWcmQahj25NMz5QdmZIwuj52bjbHDeHX8p%2BwvYsh%2BQXexXkgRrXeSPXOjVVPoVAv1iaRkjUvTiwa6BB6PbV47un6%2Bhb9OkR9biwsaC%2BGxbnbso5Mh1XD5UIakTocb1VPX7k%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jukLeFMaJ2Os-ge_i3rwFu_mTh__7cCdnnBwuvfH3Sg=&emci=0eb76003-ce7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9312fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338) ** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950757/326667291/-150578096?ms=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=PA1ZyK%2B6vzsk3oRacjL4Iz7ax8OgUuYmjsAIqs0IZWcmQahj25NMz5QdmZIwuj52bjbHDeHX8p%2BwvYsh%2BQXexXkgRrXeSPXOjVVPoVAv1iaRkjUvTiwa6BB6PbV47un6%2Bhb9OkR9biwsaC%2BGxbnbso5Mh1XD5UIakTocb1VPX7k%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jukLeFMaJ2Os-ge_i3rwFu_mTh__7cCdnnBwuvfH3Sg=&emci=0eb76003-ce7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9312fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting back against any attacks on our reproductive care. She was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act last year to block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care and she's endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund.

Kim will always work to ensure personal reproductive decisions remain between a patient and their doctor only. But she needs to know you're with her in this important fight.

**[Will you add your name to stand with Kim in the fight to protect reproductive health care rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950758/326667292/-150578096?ms=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220122_roe1_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=PA1ZyK%2B6vzsk3oRacjL4Iz7ax8OgUuYmjsAIqs0IZWcmQahj25NMz5QdmZIwuj52bjbHDeHX8p%2BwvYsh%2BQXexXkgRrXeSPXOjVVPoVAv1iaRkjUvTiwa6BB6PbV47un6%2Bhb9OkR9biwsaC%2BGxbnbso5Mh1XD5UIakTocb1VPX7k%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jukLeFMaJ2Os-ge_i3rwFu_mTh__7cCdnnBwuvfH3Sg=&emci=0eb76003-ce7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9312fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)**

Peter,

The 2022 midterm season is in full swing and, at the start of a new year, with a new district number, a new congressional map, and a ton of new voters to talk to, Christy isn't wasting any time getting her message out. We've got less than 10 months until election day, it's full steam ahead.

Here's what Christy's been up to:
* * *

We're starting the new year with a new look! [**Check out Christy's brand new website and keep up to date with all the latest news.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950968/326667738/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKs5u6mUbBTMU-2yHio32oxGxZ0xjxdTcjQw6EaX4kY=&emci=45210679-577a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9b12fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11385749) You can read about her top priorities and policy positions, sign up to volunteer, and even drop her a line.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950969/326667739/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKs5u6mUbBTMU-2yHio32oxGxZ0xjxdTcjQw6EaX4kY=&emci=45210679-577a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9b12fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11385749)
---

* * *

We're sure you've heard by now, but we wanted to remind you how much rests on winning here in CA-27. The Cook Report called CA-27 one of the few toss-up districts, which could decide which party controls Congress and determine the fate of the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950970/326667741/1907459259?refcode=em22_220122_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKs5u6mUbBTMU-2yHio32oxGxZ0xjxdTcjQw6EaX4kY=)
---
[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950971/326667742/1907459259?refcode=em22_220122_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKs5u6mUbBTMU-2yHio32oxGxZ0xjxdTcjQw6EaX4kY=)
* * *

Christy was proud to honor MLK Day with several local organizations, including the Dolores Huerta Foundation, Voices of Youth, and Heart of Compassion. There is no greater or more urgent time to honor MLK's legacy and protect the sacred right to vote. Christy will continue to be outspoken against any and all attempts at voter suppression and will bring that fight to Washington as CA-27's next Congresswoman.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950972/326667744/1907459259?refcode=em22_220122_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKs5u6mUbBTMU-2yHio32oxGxZ0xjxdTcjQw6EaX4kY=)
---
* * *

Earlier this week, Christy was honored to receive an endorsement from SEIU California. She's always believed that a strong labor movement is the backbone of this country, and will be a fierce defender of higher wages, workplace safety protections, and an economy that puts the workers first.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950973/326667745/1907459259?refcode=em22_220122_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKs5u6mUbBTMU-2yHio32oxGxZ0xjxdTcjQw6EaX4kY=)

* * *

And Christy was proud to receive the endorsement of Rep. Brad Sherman this month. Rep. Sherman has been a dedicated public servant, and partner of Christy's for a number of years.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950975/326667747/1907459259?refcode=em22_220122_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKs5u6mUbBTMU-2yHio32oxGxZ0xjxdTcjQw6EaX4kY=)

* * *

That's all for now, thank you for staying updated!

– Team Christy

clean_body: | Peter, The 2022 midterm season is in full swing and, at the start of a new year, with a new district number, a new congressional map, and a ton of new voters to talk to, Christy isn't wasting any time getting her message out. We've got less than 10 months until election day, it's full steam ahead. Here's what Christy's been up to: We're starting the new year with a new look! You can read about her top priorities and policy positions, sign up to volunteer, and even drop her a line. | We're sure you've heard by now, but we wanted to remind you how much rests on winning here in CA-27. The Cook Report called CA-27 one of the few toss-up districts, which could decide which party controls Congress and determine the fate of the country. = = Christy was proud to honor MLK Day with several local organizations, including the Dolores Huerta Foundation, Voices of Youth, and Heart of Compassion. There is no greater or more urgent time to honor MLK's legacy and protect the sacred right to vote. Christy will continue to be outspoken against any and all attempts at voter suppression and will bring that fight to Washington as CA-27's next Congresswoman. = Earlier this week, Christy was honored to receive an endorsement from SEIU California. She's always believed that a strong labor movement is the backbone of this country, and will be a fierce defender of higher wages, workplace safety protections, and an economy that puts the workers first. = And Christy was proud to receive the endorsement of Rep. Brad Sherman this month. Rep. Sherman has been a dedicated public servant, and partner of Christy's for a number of years. = That's all for now, thank you for staying updated! – Team Christy = = = *

Wade_ , which solidified abortion as a fundamental right for all Americans. But now, the right to abortion is facing an uncertain future. During his presidency, Donald Trump packed the Supreme Court with three conervative justices who have committed themselves to a right-leaning interpretation of our constitution. With a case challenging the right to abortion on its way to the Court, it’s possible that _Roe_ could be overturned before the year is over – paving the way for Republican state legislatures to pass laws that restrict and even ban access to abortion before many people even know they’re pregnant. **As Senator, a woman, and a mother, I will always support the right to an abortion. I will fight to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law, and will only support judges who recognize the constitutional right to bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom.** **[If you believe that we need reproductive justice that includes accurate science-based sex education, access to contraception and real abortion rights in America, help me flip this seat and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate by making a donation to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950963/326667731/-945847804?refcode=E13587-20220122-RoevWade-SL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00K2L9JIpL5lAeDc48e-512JpIfoHbFaSF7z6puCwVM=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately:_ | **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950966/326667735/1823983391?express_lane=true&refcode=E13587-20220122-RoevWade-EG-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00K2L9JIpL5lAeDc48e-512JpIfoHbFaSF7z6puCwVM=)** | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40950977/326667743/1823983391?express_lane=true&refcode=E13587-20220122-RoevWade-EG-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00K2L9JIpL5lAeDc48e-512JpIfoHbFaSF7z6puCwVM=)**

name: Team ODP
subject: Roe v. Wade is still under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Nearly 50 years ago, the Supreme Court's _Roe v. Wade_ decision solidified and protected the right for a person to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions.

Even though the ruling is the law of the land, it hasn't stopped far-right extremists from passing abortion restrictions in state legislatures across the country -- including right here in Ohio.

The Ohio Democratic Party **will always** fight for reproductive rights -- that includes access to safe, legal abortions across the state. While Republicans make attempt after attempt to gut abortion care in our state, we're ready to fight back. But we need your support.

[**On today's anniversary of _Roe_ , we want you to take action and join us in the fight to protect abortion access. Add your name to sign our petition.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951075/326667991/-1430225952?ms=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=NlFvPpViX96w1WXa8TPuN52TgYzVXYyTX1PoT6X3nxr9iM01iYjpcVhaJ%2BBXP6sIzLikoPlQtaTSEH8TI56Paikwk3Yt2tfyGBSR3ExzHV%2FROmzwKhX0gUhvNc4MrxRfkDo9oFc%2FfUUjmVtmcJTubg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S2U_mDAsiGLaUmYnmQJSTrWBzclMsYwlcfpuMTiSFOQ=&emci=5a17e5e7-e07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9e12fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25291327)

We have a responsibility to fight to ensure the right to choose is never taken away.

Republicans will never stop trying to slash resources and push legislation to police reproductive care. That means we will never stop fighting to ensure access to safe reproductive care -- including abortions.

[**We'll never stop fighting for the right to choose. If you agree, add your name today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951076/326667993/-1430225952?ms=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=NlFvPpViX96w1WXa8TPuN52TgYzVXYyTX1PoT6X3nxr9iM01iYjpcVhaJ%2BBXP6sIzLikoPlQtaTSEH8TI56Paikwk3Yt2tfyGBSR3ExzHV%2FROmzwKhX0gUhvNc4MrxRfkDo9oFc%2FfUUjmVtmcJTubg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S2U_mDAsiGLaUmYnmQJSTrWBzclMsYwlcfpuMTiSFOQ=&emci=5a17e5e7-e07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9e12fdb9-a47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25291327)

\-- Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951077/326667995/1636697581?refcode=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTEyZmRiOS1hNDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S2U_mDAsiGLaUmYnmQJSTrWBzclMsYwlcfpuMTiSFOQ=)

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zigdj7njn52856qtd2e8saq3l27pedvt8il41cr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm0o74s9h2bs)**

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Kathleen Harder
subject: Jane Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
body:
Peter,
Facts are important, especially when discussing women’s health and the American public. The fact is, abortion is a necessary component of women’s health care.
On this day in 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court announced its decision in Roe v. Wade , a challenge to a Texas statute that criminalized abortions. In its ruling, the court recognized for the first time that the constitutional right to privacy “ is broad enough to encompass a woman’s decision whether or not to terminate her pregnancy ” ( Roe v. Wade , 1973).
Fast forward to today, Roe v. Wade is under constant attack.
Will you add your name to tell the Biden-Harris administration they need to do everything in their power to protect Roe v. Wade right now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J8OBjgIGVEqEexr2tTcYrQ2]
SIGN NOW >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J8OBjgIGVEqEexr2tTcYrQ2]
When abortion is restricted, women resort to dangerous methods of ending unwanted pregnancies. Today, approximately 21 million women worldwide obtain unsafe, illegal abortions each year, and complications from these dangerous procedures account for about 13% of all maternal deaths.
Abortion is healthcare. Plain and simple. We shouldn’t still be debating the only protection women have to control their bodies in the USA. Sign our petition now! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J8OBjgIGVEqEexr2tTcYrQ2]
SIGN NOW >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J8OBjgIGVEqEexr2tTcYrQ2]
The best health care is provided free of political interference in the patient-physician relationship. Personal decision-making by women and their doctors should not be replaced by political ideology.
I know this because I’ve lived this. I’ve seen so much hurt in my 30 years as a physician, and I cannot idly stand by as politicians try to weasel their way into the lives of my patients.
I hope you’ll join me in fighting to protect Roe v. Wade .
Dr. Kathleen Harder
Democrat Kathleen Harder is a doctor who's been on the frontlines to protect her community against COVID-19. Now, she's answering the call for service again, this time to fight for Oregonians in Congress.
Donate today to send a science-driven leader to Congress.
CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220122-email&amount=25] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220122-email&recurring=true]Follow Dr. Harder Online:
https://www.facebook.com/drkathleenharder [https://www.facebook.com/drkathleenharder] https://twitter.com/DrHarderOR [https://twitter.com/DrHarderOR]

Portland, OR 97242

body:

Nan’s birthday is tomorrow and we want you to sign her card!
We have a lot to celebrate this year, mostly thanks to people like you. With your support, we’ve been able to build an incredible movement that will bring honesty and integrity back into Ohio politics.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Today is the Anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951825/326671896/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJlNTkzZi1hNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcO5ovQLOcKurPu34pPR6fYtq0TRNta6xJhkdMZCAOY=&emci=8f584f73-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8fbe593f-a77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15353729)
---
Peter --

**Today** is the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court decision that recognizes the right to access safe, legal abortion.

It transformed how we view women's rights and emphasized the importance of prioritizing access to health care services for everyone.

That is why it is more important than ever before that we continue to support this landmark ruling. As a legislator, I have always advocated for policies and laws that focused on women's rights, health care reforms and reproductive rights.

Throughout my career, I have made it a priority to stand up for reproductive rights and the rights of women in Oregon. Now, more than ever, we need leaders who will stand against those who threaten our rights by looking to overturn _Roe_. [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951826/326671897/1650183785?refcode=em22_220122_roe2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJlNTkzZi1hNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcO5ovQLOcKurPu34pPR6fYtq0TRNta6xJhkdMZCAOY=) Let me be clear here: banning abortion services does not stop people from getting abortions, but it means that people will lose their access to a safe and legal abortion.

This will lead to an increased number of botched abortions and potential deaths. Millions of lives could be in danger if this were to happen. And this reversal will disproportionately affect communities of color, people living in poverty and those in rural communities.

Our most vulnerable will be at risk if _Roe_ gets overturned this year.

**[Will you join me in the fight for our right to choose by donating $5 today?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951827/326671898/1650183785?refcode=em22_220122_roe2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJlNTkzZi1hNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcO5ovQLOcKurPu34pPR6fYtq0TRNta6xJhkdMZCAOY=)** [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951828/326671899/1650183785?refcode=em22_220122_roe2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJlNTkzZi1hNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcO5ovQLOcKurPu34pPR6fYtq0TRNta6xJhkdMZCAOY=) Thanks for standing with me in this fight.

– Tina Kotek

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951829/326671900/-294883092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJlNTkzZi1hNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcO5ovQLOcKurPu34pPR6fYtq0TRNta6xJhkdMZCAOY=&emci=8f584f73-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8fbe593f-a77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15353729) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40951830/326671901/-1484875328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmJlNTkzZi1hNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcO5ovQLOcKurPu34pPR6fYtq0TRNta6xJhkdMZCAOY=&emci=8f584f73-f37a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8fbe593f-a77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15353729) Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. I’m running for re-election to expand on the progress we've delivered for Coloradans. Last year I negotiated tax cuts for working parents, critical investments in jobs for our state, funding to repair our bridges and roads, and more. While I fight to deliver for folks like you, Mitch McConnell, the National GOP, and wealthy self-funded opponents here in Colorado are trying to flip my seat and turn the Senate into a legislative graveyard with Mitch at the helm — _and they raised over $104 million last year to do just that._ I’m asking grassroots folks like you to start a monthly donation today because my seat and the Senate are on the line. Your monthly recurring donation helps my team strategize and fiht back against attack ads, hire staff, and mobilize voters. **Together, we’ll build on the progress we’ve made. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Recommitting to the fight to defend reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Today is the 49th anniversary of the landmark Supreme Court _Roe v. Wade_ decision that made abortion legal in the United States. As we wait for the Supreme Court to decide on the case that could determine the future of _Roe v. Wade_ , we must reaffirm our commitment to defending reproductive freedom.

Last year, we saw an unprecedented number of abortion restrictions and bans passed by state legislatures. Texas was one of those states, with S.B.8. becoming the most extreme abortion ban in the country. Since then, reproductive rights activists have been fighting to appeal the dangerous law that's left millions of Texans without access to reproductive health care.

People are left with no choice but to travel hundreds of miles to the nearest clinic, struggle with lengthy wait times, and deal with financial barriers. This is the reality of a future without _Roe v. Wade_ , and we can't let that happen.

[**On today 's anniversary, will you join me in the fight to defend reproductive freedom? Add your name to recommit to protecting reproductive rights in 2022.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8Hf16Ei2fyCnxQJrKlAvKr2K2eIEsiiJmfC5KQq56yc=/Uy2bpfpw5ilTOgl9PZVJwyj04Lxcxo2RsNtpzhBbglE=?ms=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

I've always been guided by the principle that health care decisions should remain between people and their doctors. Last year, I voted to pass the Women's Health Protection Act to enshrine the right to choose under the law. It will prohibit bans, mandatory waiting periods, and other restrictions on a person's reproductive rights.

The anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ is a stark reminder of how far we've come, and how little it takes to lose decades of progress. We have to stay vigilant in the fight for reproductive rights. Our civil rights are on the ballot in 2022 as we work to defend pro-choice leaders in the House.

[**Today, please add your name to recommit to the work of defending access to reproductive health care >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8Hf16Ei2fyCnxQJrKlAvKr2K2eIEsiiJmfC5KQq56yc=/Uy2bpfpw5ilTOgl9PZVJwyj04Lxcxo2RsNtpzhBbglE=?ms=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

It's an honor to serve you.

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/8Hf16Ei2fyCnxQJrKlAvKr2K2eIEsiiJmfC5KQq56yc=/TPyfdGyD6hNNdrLBP8zcLPVA5OenOgH0dWFnvuXVSNM=?refcode=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8Hf16Ei2fyCnxQJrKlAvKr2K2eIEsiiJmfC5KQq56yc=/LXetW5tLk29uloGzVAD84nadacDMzFRlTATdHEkmZtY=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8Hf16Ei2fyCnxQJrKlAvKr2K2eIEsiiJmfC5KQq56yc=/kOETFdNsFBPva0AQRbsORy2OGD_nbKV10ZrV67pW_FQ=)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Who is fact-checking the fake news “fact-checkers”?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59329247:6zWCZHENy:m:1:3298722022:A1DA4E5E5DB667E050D159D302DF94E4:r)
Peter,

The Associated Press tried to downplay the terrorist attack in Texas.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59329247:6zWCZHENy:m:1:3298722022:A1DA4E5E5DB667E050D159D302DF94E4:r)
**But don 't worry. The press and the FBI are quick to call parents terrorists for protesting at their local school board meetings.**

Fortunately, after intense backlash, the Associated Press deleted the tweet and corrected the information.

This is how we hold the media accountable.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the Leftwing media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[_**I am asking for your immediate support for 2022. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, or more to help hold the fake news media accountable? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59329247:6zWCZHENy:m:1:3298722022:A1DA4E5E5DB667E050D159D302DF94E4:r)

With 2022 being an election year, the fake news "fact-checkers" are working extra hard to silence conservative voices.

Here's how "fact-checkers" work with big tech to silence conservatives.
1. Big Tech social media companies outsource their "fact-checkers" to liberal-biased news media outlets like the Associated Press.
2. Whenever conservatives mention facts or a narrative outside of the liberal orthodoxy, then the fact-checkers go to work, oftentimes labeling TRUE information as "out of context."
3. Then, Big Tech social media companies use these "fact-checkers" as an excuse to ban conservatives online.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59329247:6zWCZHENy:m:1:3298722022:A1DA4E5E5DB667E050D159D302DF94E4:r)

And the irony is the ones screaming the loudest about disinformation are the ones pushing it out to the public the most: NPR, MSNBC, Associated Press, ABC, NBC, and all those other corporate media outlets.

We cannot let them lie to the public. Do you remember what they did to the Hunter Biden laptop story? We cannot let them do that again in 2022 before the elections.

It is my mission to destroy the liberal bias in the media and their collusion with Big Tech.

**I am looking to raise $24,000 in the next 48 hours to gear up for 2022. **

Help me hold them accountable.
[_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $5,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59329247:6zWCZHENy:m:1:3298722022:A1DA4E5E5DB667E050D159D302DF94E4:r)
The fight for liberty is underway. No one can stand on the sidelines anymore. We have to expose the corruption working together to take away our freedom.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
President & Founder of MRC

clean_body: Peter, The Associated Press tried to downplay the terrorist attack in Texas. But don 't worry. The press and the FBI are quick to call parents terrorists for protesting at their local school board meetings. Fortunately, after intense backlash, the Associated Press deleted the tweet and corrected the information. This is how we hold the media accountable. My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media. When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the Leftwing media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media. With 2022 being an election year, the fake news "fact-checkers" are working extra hard to silence conservative voices. Here's how "fact-checkers" work with big tech to silence conservatives. 1. Big Tech social media companies outsource their "fact-checkers" to liberal-biased news media outlets like the Associated Press. 2. Whenever conservatives mention facts or a narrative outside of the liberal orthodoxy, then the fact-checkers go to work, oftentimes labeling TRUE information as "out of context." 3. Then, Big Tech social media companies use these "fact-checkers" as an excuse to ban conservatives online. And the irony is the ones screaming the loudest about disinformation are the ones pushing it out to the public the most: NPR, MSNBC, Associated Press, ABC, NBC, and all those other corporate media outlets. We cannot let them lie to the public. Do you remember what they did to the Hunter Biden laptop story? We cannot let them do that again in 2022 before the elections. It is my mission to destroy the liberal bias in the media and their collusion with Big Tech. I am looking to raise $24,000 in the next 48 hours to gear up for 2022. Help me hold them accountable. The fight for liberty is underway. No one can stand on the sidelines anymore. We have to expose the corruption working together to take away our freedom. Thank you, Brent Bozell President & Founder of MRC This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 16, 2021. I’ll be direct, friend.

My opponent Doug LaMalfa is a far-right seditionist -- plain and simple.

Unlike folks like Matt Gaetz or Marjorie Taylor Greene, he may not make news headlines. But he's been just as dangerous for our democracy as those who are front and center on Fox and CNN. Trump lost fair and square, but they continue to spread lies and stoke division to undermine confidence in our democracy.

I am committed to making sure that Doug LaMalfa and seditionists like him never return to office in 2022, but I need your help to do it: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Since launching our campaign managed to outraise Doug LaMalfa in two consecutive fundraising quarters. That’s huge, and it’s a clear sign that we are gaining serious traction. Voters are sick of Doug, and now that we’re in the election, let’s all commit to doubling down and sending him packing for good. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Protecting the right to vote is too important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
I’m ready to update the rules in the Senate to move legislation protecting the right to vote.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952426/326674506/-368617150?refcode=20220121_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBhMjBkZi1hOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRqUbrTFUHyCOaP15YE3St7RFZ_m780FJiwoEKORiMs=)

| | Derek, I wanted to talk to you about a decision I’ve made. It was a tough one — but it’s the right one for Arizona and our country.

I am a cosponsor of critical legislation to protect voting rights — and with this legislation blocked in the Senate, I support changing Senate filibuster rules to allow these bills to pass by a simple majority vote.

Arizona does elections well. But our right to vote is under attack. Protecting these rights is too important to fall victim to Washington’s dysfunction. Arizonans sent me to the Senate to make difficult decisions and to do what’s best for our state — and I’m going to continue doing that.

Corporate special interest groups are already attacking me for doing what’s right for Arizona. Millions of dollars have already been spent against us, and after today, you can bet millions more are on the way. We’re going to need your help to fight back and hold this seat. So, I’m asking:

**[Can you split a contribution between my campaign and CommonGood today? It might not seem like much, but when thousands of people join together, it all adds up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952427/326674527/1008178349?refcode=20220121_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBhMjBkZi1hOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRqUbrTFUHyCOaP15YE3St7RFZ_m780FJiwoEKORiMs=)** | | | [DONATE $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952428/326674528/-368617150?refcode=20220121_CGVA_Kelly&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBhMjBkZi1hOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRqUbrTFUHyCOaP15YE3St7RFZ_m780FJiwoEKORiMs=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown?=
subject: We have the pictures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
When Gretchen Whitmer had the audacity to say she ”supports the spirit” of the “defund the police” campaign she went too far. | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=95f0f94001&e=0636b97700)
---
| Peter:

Our brave men and women of law enforcement have been under attack the past two years like never before.
* They’ve been targeted and harassed.
* The radical “defund the police” movement has cut funding for law enforcement in various cities throughout America.

* Liberal district attorneys and politicians have reclassified many crimes to be misdemeanors meaning criminals are being released and in many cases not even prosecuted for their crimes.
* Zero bail policies are being implemented turning criminals loose without any recourse.

**And what has been the result?**

_**Crime increasing everywhere.**_

I’m seeing it. You’re seeing it.

It must stop.

**When Gretchen Whitmer had the audacity to say she ”supports the spirit” of the “defund the police” campaign _she went too far_.**

Not only did she march in a large crowd during her own lock down order, but she raged into a bullhorn condemning the men and women in blue.
---
|
---
| Then, when a reporter made a statement that _had lockdown protestors been black they’d have been shot, Whitmer agreed_!

**Her contempt for law enforcement cannot stand.** It will take a new Governor to right the ship supporting law enforcement and reducing violent crime.

I’ve been on the streets of Michigan for 30 years taking down some of the worst criminals. Working in narcotics enforcement I can tell you, these aren’t nice people who only need a slap on the wrist.

Yet that’s what Gretchen Whitmer and liberal politicians like her are offering.

**They want to cut funding for law enforcement and redirect tax dollars into social programs.**

And the result is just what you’d expect – increasing crime.

It’s time to have a Governor in Michigan who will stand up for the safety of the people. Someone who will say enough is enough.

**Will you join me?** Together we can defeat Gretchen Whitmer and her liberal cronies. Together we can make our cities safe again – for all our citizens. Together we can fix Michigan.

Please take a moment today to make a generous contribution.

$5, $50, $500, or more.

Any amount helps.
---
| [DONATE TODAY. ANY AMOUNT HELPS.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=203bd246ae&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY. ANY AMOUNT HELPS.")
---
| If you’re tired of hearing about increasing crime; if you’re tired of the witch hunt that is targeting the hard-working men and women who have sworn an oath to protect the safety and security of you and your family; if you’re ready for a change, then please stand with me.

[Join our campaign to Dump Whitmer and Fix Michigan.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=28674cb8db&e=0636b97700)

Please make a donation today, then head over to my website and volunteer to help. We need all hands on deck if we’re going to defeat her this November.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor

name: John Cranley, Teresa Fedor
subject: It’s time to ratify the ERA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
We’re committed to the fight for women’s equality. | Friend, Women’s rights are on the line — in Ohio, in Washington, D.C., and across this country. Republican states have successfully passed radical, anti-choice laws that attack the right to abortion access. The Supreme Court is poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , ending the constitutional right to abortion for the first time in nearly 50 years. During the pandemic, levels of intimate partner violence have seen a drastic increase. And over the last 15 years, the gender pay gap has remained pretty much the same — women in the U.S. still earn about 15% less than men on average. **It's time to act.** Nearly a half-century ago, Ohio ratified the Equal Rights Amendment in an effort to end pregnancy discrimination, guarantee equal pay for equal work, and strengthen protections against sexual harassment, intimate partner violence, and human trafficking. Though a majority of states have ratified, it failed to meet the deadline to become a constitutional amendment. **Yesterday, we called for ERA to _finally_ become law — because it’s time to enshrine in our Constitution the fundamental principle of women’s equality.** **[We’re asking you to join us now, friend. Sign on now to show your support for the ERA and the rights of women across this country>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952724/326676444/1384625878?refcode=ea.2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjg0ZTExYS1hZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvEJJghHdEJvSgADbTso8rKDvFqwNlX2yTpoaKwrvp4=&emci=c6303497-037b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289)** **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952729/326676454/1384625878?refcode=ea.2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjg0ZTExYS1hZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvEJJghHdEJvSgADbTso8rKDvFqwNlX2yTpoaKwrvp4=&emci=c6303497-037b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289)** Thank you for taking action, John Cranley & Teresa Fedor
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952731/326676456/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.2284e11a-ad7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjg0ZTExYS1hZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bvEJJghHdEJvSgADbTso8rKDvFqwNlX2yTpoaKwrvp4=)**
---
John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: We’re committed to the fight for women’s equality. | Friend, Women’s rights are on the line — in Ohio, in Washington, D.C., and across this country. Republican states have successfully passed radical, anti-choice laws that attack the right to abortion access. The Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade , ending the constitutional right to abortion for the first time in nearly 50 years. During the pandemic, levels of intimate partner violence have seen a drastic increase. And over the last 15 years, the gender pay gap has remained pretty much the same — women in the U.S. still earn about 15% less than men on average. It's time to act. Nearly a half-century ago, Ohio ratified the Equal Rights Amendment in an effort to end pregnancy discrimination, guarantee equal pay for equal work, and strengthen protections against sexual harassment, intimate partner violence, and human trafficking. Though a majority of states have ratified, it failed to meet the deadline to become a constitutional amendment. Yesterday, we called for ERA to finally become law — because it’s time to enshrine in our Constitution the fundamental principle of women’s equality. Thank you for taking action, John Cranley & Teresa Fedor = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

subject: I will be a vote in Congress to codify Roe v. Wade

| | Peter, Today marks the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ – a landmark decision made by the Supreme Court that protects an individual’s right to choose. And in the 49 years since this decision, this right has never been more threatened than in this moment. In September, Texas passed a draconian law banning abortions after six weeks of pregnancy with almost no exceptions. Almost _immediately_ after Texas made this law, Madison Cawthorn and his allies went on record to say that all 50 states should follow their example – and we have seen some states do exactly this. We cannot rely on the Supreme Court to protect _Roe v. Wade_. We urgently need federal protections to protect the right to choose. **As a pro-choice pastor, I will be a vote and a voice in Congress to codify the right to choose into federal law.** We need elected officials and judges who respect a person’s right to make decisions about their own body. [**If you support protecting reproductive rights and upholding _Roe v. name: Derek Marshall
subject: We’re in a student debt crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
With everything that’s happened since Donald Trump was elected in 2016, it can feel like there’s too many crises to know what to focus on at any given time. And it’s true, our country is facing a difficult turning point, one that will define history for years to come. **But there’s one thing in particular that I want to address today, something that is affecting the lives of millions of Americans across this country. **
Student loan debt is a crisis that has gone unresolved for far too long. **The collective debt owed has now reached a whopping $1.8 TRILLION, a number almost too big to conceive.** College and university should be accessible to all who wish to pursue higher education, but unfortunately, the price tag has become so high that most people can only attend with the promise of loans to help them afford it.
**I believe in cancelling ALL student debt, no matter the cost or the source.** I believe that people deserve a chance at real economic opportunity, one that disappears when people are forced to pay off their debts instead. I believe in justice and equity for Black and Brown students who are disproportionately burdened by student debt.
**But we need more fighters in Congress to advocate for this bold measure.** Right now, progressives are holding a strong line, but President Biden has yet to truly fulfill his campaign obligations. **[Every progressive in the House counts, which is why I need your help to get there. Will you support my insurgent campaign with a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952687/326676409/-996156956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzg0ZTExYS1hZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Fvz3rkq-XZG3KPo1Dn2FMntIjW0ytxQNzz2prlnMB0=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952690/326676411/-996156956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzg0ZTExYS1hZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Fvz3rkq-XZG3KPo1Dn2FMntIjW0ytxQNzz2prlnMB0=)**
Student debt is a burden that is crushing people of many generations. Why? Because the loans people take out are so high, because the interest is so high, that it can take decades or even a lifetime to pay it off. **There is no reason why in the richest country on Earth, millions of people should be struggling to pay for such high debts rather than saving for their futures or providing for their families. **
**I know that paying off my student loans was a huge source of financial anxiety for me.** There were many things I had to give up along the way so I could pay down my debt faster. And I know that the crippling debt my generation is burdened with will only continue to hold us down. Freeing up $1.8 trillion in debt would free up consumers to spend more, which would only benefit the economy. **Cancelling debt is not just a moral solution, but a sound economic one. **
**Few politicians are brave enough to stand up for the millions of borrowers whose lives would be improved by student debt cancellation**. My opponent Jay Obernolte will certainly never look out for the interests of the working class. But I will never be afraid to advocate for what’s right. **[Your support means I get that much closer to defeating this Trump-backed Republican and fighting for this life-changing policy. I’m asking you to make a contribution today to get me there. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40952696/326676416/-996156956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzg0ZTExYS1hZDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Fvz3rkq-XZG3KPo1Dn2FMntIjW0ytxQNzz2prlnMB0=)**
In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

clean_body: Peter, With everything that’s happened since Donald Trump was elected in 2016, it can feel like there’s too many crises to know what to focus on at any given time. And it’s true, our country is facing a difficult turning point, one that will define history for years to come. But there’s one thing in particular that I want to address today, something that is affecting the lives of millions of Americans across this country. Student loan debt is a crisis that has gone unresolved for far too long. The collective debt owed has now reached a whopping $1.8 TRILLION, a number almost too big to conceive. College and university should be accessible to all who wish to pursue higher education, but unfortunately, the price tag has become so high that most people can only attend with the promise of loans to help them afford it. I believe in cancelling ALL student debt, no matter the cost or the source. I believe that people deserve a chance at real economic opportunity, one that disappears when people are forced to pay off their debts instead. I believe in justice and equity for Black and Brown students who are disproportionately burdened by student debt. But we need more fighters in Congress to advocate for this bold measure. Right now, progressives are holding a strong line, but President Biden has yet to truly fulfill his campaign obligations. = = Student debt is a burden that is crushing people of many generations. Why? Because the loans people take out are so high, because the interest is so high, that it can take decades or even a lifetime to pay it off. There is no reason why in the richest country on Earth, millions of people should be struggling to pay for such high debts rather than saving for their futures or providing for their families. I know that paying off my student loans was a huge source of financial anxiety for me. There were many things I had to give up along the way so I could pay down my debt faster. And I know that the crippling debt my generation is burdened with will only continue to hold us down. Freeing up $1.8 trillion in debt would free up consumers to spend more, which would only benefit the economy. Cancelling debt is not just a moral solution, but a sound economic one. Few politicians are brave enough to stand up for the millions of borrowers whose lives would be improved by student debt cancellation. My opponent Jay Obernolte will certainly never look out for the interests of the working class. But I will never be afraid to advocate for what’s right. = In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

Remember when the Democratic Texas House Representatives fled to Washington in 2021 to warn the rest of the country about what was happening in Texas? We’re now seeing the impact on voters. Here in Austin, Texas, Travis County is reporting that they had to reject about half of applications for mail-in ballots. And, voter registrars now say they have a shortage of voter registration forms ahead of the March 1 primary. This restriction on voting by mail is a direct result of the GOP trifecta that rules over Texas. **We must stand up to this tyranny.** Donna Imam is running for Congress to fight back, and win a brand-new open seat in Texas. And she needs your help to GET OUT THE VOTE when early voting starts in just a few weeks. **[Maximizing Democratic voter turnout in Austin — the bluest city in Texas — is the way to help flip statewide races where gerrymandering is not a factor. Fight voter suppression and elect more Democrats to the House. To fight back, our campaign is doing the work in the field to drastically ramp up our GET OUT THE VOTE work. **We need your help so we can get more field organizers to voters' doors — meeting them where they are. I’m a Kitchen Table conservative running for U.S. Senate

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs53s6ecduvkk48gfh6nna1u92l9aoftn89tkat0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5g8r12rttt86qgrdcdrk7cfcumch7ssni3783ag_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)

---
Friend,

I’m Kevin Smith, and I’m officially announcing my run for the U.S. Senate seat in New Hampshire.

**I’m running to represent New Hampshire because I truly love our state and believe that we have so much to offer.**

**I’m a kitchen table conservative with local, New Hampshire values.**

[**Join my campaign today >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkjfoi7pie74477kojchmeken99f8supklfq68sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)

I believe that the most important decisions in America today are being made at the kitchen table, _not the halls of power in Washington or in Concord._

I’ll bring Washington back down to size. **That means requiring the federal government to balance the budget, establishing term limits for Members of Congress, putting parents back in control of their kids’ educations, and creating an economy that allows families to thrive.**

These are common-sense solutions that we need across the country.

For nearly a decade, I have served as the Town Manager of Londonderry – one of the state’s largest and most successful communities. I proudly _balanced the budget_ and _reduced local taxes_ while growing and diversifying our economy.

**With you by my side, we can put New Hampshire First and safeguard our American values. Together, we can put American families back in control of their futures. **

**Chip in to my campaign today!**
_**Let’s put America First**_
| [**CHIP IN $10**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt3crmgu7lbugbgbam0g9rfumcsnj0k16of1g18g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $25**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5b0ajrdkn3dhee0nk32scdccn9j0s2ps8jnf3hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $50**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7j17moodhivtuoo9nuahu6tsb3t7ebkrlphp3fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $100**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziddr71vj3mu12mu4mvr2vr234i77nj11ppi188o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $250**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh5qemqbole1oscrtj8t8n9t6pn25b6hjhouhbm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $500**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6ou1jjn0miqm9ibjijkibdisd6j2ahmjnottp68_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)
---

I’m a conservative, a patriot, and a father. I promise you that I’ll be a true fighter for _you_ in Washington. It’s time to bring Washington back down to size.

[**Join our campaign today! >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvsc9ld64prmboscglqnj9tkq398c921vio2rvdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)

Thank you and God Bless,

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaates67u4765ri0ue5pp2ejs7qneo6duh6705dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c3jm2ob6cdh2bs)

Kevin Smith
Candidate for N.H. Senate
