clean_body: I’m a Kitchen Table conservative running for U.S. Senate | Friend, I’m Kevin Smith, and I’m officially announcing my run for the U.S. Senate seat in New Hampshire. I’m running to represent New Hampshire because I truly love our state and believe that we have so much to offer. I’m a kitchen table conservative with local, New Hampshire values. I believe that the most important decisions in America today are being made at the kitchen table, not the halls of power in Washington or in Concord. I’ll bring Washington back down to size. That means requiring the federal government to balance the budget, establishing term limits for Members of Congress, putting parents back in control of their kids’ educations, and creating an economy that allows families to thrive. These are common-sense solutions that we need across the country. For nearly a decade, I have served as the Town Manager of Londonderry – one of the state’s largest and most successful communities. I proudly balanced the budget and reduced local taxes while growing and diversifying our economy. With you by my side, we can put New Hampshire First and safeguard our American values. Together, we can put American families back in control of their futures. Chip in to my campaign today! Let’s put America First | I’m a conservative, a patriot, and a father. I promise you that I’ll be a true fighter for you in Washington. It’s time to bring Washington back down to size. Thank you and God Bless, Kevin Smith Candidate for N.H. Senate Paid for by Kevin Smith for Senate Copyright (C) 2022 Kevin Smith for Senate, All rights reserved.

Wade_ , but never in the last half-century have reproductive rights been more under attack than they are today.

**[In honor of the 49th anniversary of _Roe_ , can you sign our petition today showing you support a woman’s right to choose? Just click here to add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40953675/326679726/1696549257?refcode=EM_p_220122roe_chc_tlbr_actives_5_ng_na_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY0NzQzNi1hZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6owHvAF0LBeHv-iEL_5XxaSLdY5E2aSKplsUTTXRp8=&emci=af9ccdaa-f87a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0f647436-ae7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11913588)**

For years now, anti-choice Republicans have been attacking the basic rights of women across the country, and, unfortunately, they’ve made progress.

In Republican-controlled states like Texas and Mississippi, women are essentially barred from accessing abortion, and if _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned this year, it could get worse.

**[We cannot let our rights be taken away! We need 500 supporters to sign on today showing that the American people don’t want to see Roe v. Wade overturned!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40953676/326679730/1696549257?refcode=EM_p_220122roe_chc_tlbr_actives_5_ng_na_l2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY0NzQzNi1hZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6owHvAF0LBeHv-iEL_5XxaSLdY5E2aSKplsUTTXRp8=&emci=af9ccdaa-f87a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0f647436-ae7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11913588)** | | **[Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40953677/326679731/1696549257?refcode=EM_p_220122roe_chc_tlbr_actives_5_ng_na_EL15&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY0NzQzNi1hZTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6owHvAF0LBeHv-iEL_5XxaSLdY5E2aSKplsUTTXRp8=&emci=af9ccdaa-f87a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=0f647436-ae7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11913588)**

subject: Our Michigan Olympic delegation is making history - Here's a list.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
our district is home to the oldest American snowboarder in Olympic history, the first Indigenous woman to play hockey for Team USA, and two skiing protégés considered "the future of the sport." **N. All are inspirations in their sport and will represent Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula well. Kailia Kuhn of Boyne City was a competitive gymnast and aerial skiing junior champion at age 14. Her teammate, Gaylord’s Winter Vinecki, is a former triathlete and marathon runner turned winter athlete who's been aerial skiing since she was 13. Nick Baumgartner, 40, from Iron River is the oldest American snowboarder in U.S. history. Also making history is Abby Roque of Sault Ste. Marie. Roque is the first Indigenous woman ever to play hockey for Team USA. Watching world-class athletes compete at the pinnacles of their careers against the highest caliber of competition is a time-honored tradition we enjoy every Olympiad. Some of the best stories of triumph and victory come from the Games, and this year Beijing will be no exception. Politically, there’s another critical discussion taking shape, one we ought not to overlook. As a former diplomat with the U.S. State Department and candidate for U.S. Congress, I support the United States government's boycott of the Beijing 2022 Olympics and hope the absence of a diplomatic envoy at the ceremonies and competition sends a message to China – The free world condemns human rights violations of violent governmental regimes. **_“China’s continued involvement in genocide against Uyghurs and other Muslim minorities in the Xinjiang region is inhumane, immoral, and wrong.” - Dr. Bob Lorinser_** The Olympic Games give us hope that a better world is possible because they set an example of peaceful global interaction and inspiration. Athletic attendance and participation by Team USA ensure the representation of a Nation that holds human dignity in high regard. Many Olympians work their entire lives for the honor of representing their country in their respective sports, and it’s important we preserve that opportunity. Ultimately, the mission of the Olympics is admirable – “**The goal of Olympism is to place sport at the service of the harmonious development of humankind, with a view to promoting a peaceful society concerned with the preservation of human dignity.”** Because Communist China cannot adhere to this principle in the governing of their Republic, a diplomatic boycott is appropriate. Olympism is a philosophy of life, exalting and combining in a balanced whole the qualities of body, will, and mind. Blending sport with culture and education, Olympism seeks to create a way of life-based on the joy of effort, the educational value of a good example, social responsibility, and respect for universal fundamental ethical principles. The Olympic Movement covers the five continents. It reaches its peak with the bringing together of the world’s athletes at the great sports festival, the Olympic Games. Its symbol is five interlaced rings, symbolic of unity. **The practice of sport is a human right.** Every individual must have the possibility of practicing sport, without discrimination of any kind, and in the Olympic spirit, which requires mutual understanding with a spirit of friendship, solidarity, and fair play. The enjoyment of the rights and freedoms set forth in this Olympic Charter shall be secured without discrimination of any kind, such as race, color, sex, sexual orientation, language, religion, political or other opinions, national or social origin, property, birth or another status. We wish all American athletes success and glory at the Games, especially in upholding the values of Olympism. Good luck to Abby Roque, Nick Baumgartner, Kailia Kuhn, Winter Vinecki of Michigan’s First Congressional District, and all those with ties to the State. Go, Team USA. **MICHIGAN 2022 ATHLETES**

name: Holly
subject: Millionaire Marjorie is out of touch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40954203/326681745/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFmOTdlNS1hZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vg6yW5AlnImfl5FuUnOXeT8rOBa4GUsabluJMPXNoQY=&emci=9f006962-187b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6c1f97e5-af7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter,

Once again Marjorie Taylor Greene shows that she is out of touch with our District, by joining an elite country club. Like so many folks in Northwest Georgia, I’ve spent countless nights worrying how the next bill will be paid, or how I’ll be able to send my kids to college. I shop for discounts, clip coupons, and work hard every day for every penny I earn.

But Millionaire Marjorie – who doesn't even live in our District, has no committee appointments, and who has been fined $90,000 – wastes money flying around the country and joining expensive country clubs.

****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40954204/326681746/-804235033?refcode=em0118b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFmOTdlNS1hZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vg6yW5AlnImfl5FuUnOXeT8rOBa4GUsabluJMPXNoQY=)
This is not representative of the folks of Northwest Georgia. But neither is Marge. She's from a wealthy city near Atlanta and she has lived her life in luxury.

**_All the while we, the REAL people of GA-14, suffer._**

While Marge abuses her power – the power she got by pretending to be one of us – we are left behind. Her lies about vaccines are killing her constituents. Her ignorance of our crumbling infrastructure, aging population, and growing poverty rates, is hurting our community.

**That’s why I stepped up to challenge her.** She parachuted into this District because she thought it would be an easy win. But I won’t make it easy for her. This is a fight for our lives, and I’m in it for the long haul. As one of the people of GA-14, a real member of this community, I will fight day and night to make sure our voices are heard and our needs are put first.

**Are you with me? Send $20.22 today to help me fight for the needs of GA-14. **

With Gratitude-
Holly McCormack
|

subject: Unapologetically, Pro-Choice AF
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC-ahixX_Fv--rG-vAFTBsWby9nLoFXp923QysruYPpFiX0gfVARxq0__JV0GDpeVCp3qLejeJhJhgckMg-tccn_rPIusDyCg9ADf3PKu_CIvNpDakVQqJE2ywPlu5KGXE3RyjlmIiVEMybfG85LVnIZkonjxtEsNxoA_a5pofyp9RDY4_6Ju4NKip_5a048rtuFmyUpVUkU518og0kB_iyXds5tLPVa2T_CHrLm6dYxPlk8WuAXFM0Q45_PMVTOsCtnsOEyaFco37btvrx80QGJRXsmqoVWj5twcF-TQIrPWodqII88QmGZWCZAlsFQnqxerOwtCSY9jICJ7EVz6xYg/3ix/Jz5ju5tmSTiHGUDM8aTaow/h0/j-A0hwZtr4mycBKVyo7xZpotYf0A7GCJGGwMOBtj1Ok)
For over 50 years we’ve been asking for reproductive justice and to deliver on our human right to decide what we do with our own bodies — without shame, judgement or barriers to care.
**We are no longer asking.**
Today is the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ — and the Supreme Court could soon make it the _last_ one before it is overturned. I need your help to defend a MUST-WIN open Democratic seat and preserve our pro-choice majority in Congress.

name: Karen Bass
subject: Join me in defending reproductive freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Team —

Today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court's _Roe v. Wade_ decision. Now, nearly half a century since this ruling, the constitutional right to abortion is at greater risk than ever before.

2021 was the single worst year for reproductive rights in America since _Roe v. Wade_. State politicians introduced over 600 abortion restrictions, and more than 100 were signed into law — a new record. These restrictions disproportionately harm Black, Latino, and Indigenous communities, making reproductive rights a racial and economic justice issue.

If the Supreme Court overturns _Roe_ , 26 states could move to ban abortion. Over thirty-six million people could lose abortion access _overnight_.

I have always been guided by the principle that everyone — no matter where you live or how much money you make — deserves access to health care. On today's anniversary, I want to be clear: **As Los Angeles' next mayor, I will keep fighting to ensure that every person who seeks an abortion can get one, without having to navigate harmful, misguided, and often expensive barriers.**

**[If you agree no law or politician should stand between a doctor and their patient, then I need you to take action with me today. Add your name next to mine to support accessible, affordable reproductive health care for every Angeleno and every American.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40954465/326682814/-179752621?ms=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220121_roe_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xs1mmYYa7paAPGaGWnhEr8L2t0pmmgBv9Td0syEv4BzFrregR73a%2Bqv1dVGOlKNcuyFcQ%2FHen1bT9HMnviCTqef8sjVC3YnHk4ChroFh67Hxxfv0Hi1FAAxMsPNeuCmvIx3RjM5icuSOawjsxaiukA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJhODZmMS1iMTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-Gba6PZ36mU2fg0F9RqDdtkhSUqWry65Hy-tY7tQS8=&emci=312b8493-067b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c82a86f1-b17b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2429742)**

clean_body: Team — Today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court's Roe v. Wade decision. Now, nearly half a century since this ruling, the constitutional right to abortion is at greater risk than ever before. 2021 was the single worst year for reproductive rights in America since Roe v. Wade. State politicians introduced over 600 abortion restrictions, and more than 100 were signed into law — a new record. These restrictions disproportionately harm Black, Latino, and Indigenous communities, making reproductive rights a racial and economic justice issue. If the Supreme Court overturns Roe , 26 states could move to ban abortion. Over thirty-six million people could lose abortion access overnight. I have always been guided by the principle that everyone — no matter where you live or how much money you make — deserves access to health care. On today's anniversary, I want to be clear: As Los Angeles' next mayor, I will keep fighting to ensure that every person who seeks an abortion can get one, without having to navigate harmful, misguided, and often expensive barriers. In solidarity, Karen Bass Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Putting America Back on Track – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132252?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**America is heading in the wrong direction.** Prices are rising, regulation is becoming more burdensome, and the federal government is overbearing.

Worse, a generation of young Americans is being taught to despise their own country. Patriotism is treated with contempt by our cultural elites, while Critical Race Theory risks tearing this great nation apart.

**Things might seem bad, but they don’t have to stay this way. If we act now, we can put America back on the right path.**

Again and again, when things go wrong in America, it is the states that provide us with the right answers. Washington DC might make a mess, but it is states like Mississippi that can show us how to fix things.

**That is why we published the Freedom Agenda 2022** – a set of 12 reforms that we believe will not only improve our state but will serve as an example of the kind of change that America needs.

Here is an update on how this reform agenda is advancing here in Mississippi during the 2022 legislative session:
* **Tackling red tape:** If America had been regulated back then the way we are today, I wonder if the Wright brothers would have got permission to fly the Kitty Hawk? Excessive red tape is robbing America of the entrepreneurial spirit that has made this country such a success. Nowhere is red tape more burdensome than right here in Mississippi.

Thankfully, Secretary of State Michel Watson this week launched a new initiative to try to tackle the red tape, which we are supporting.
---
|
---
Douglas Carswell w/ SOS Watson at the launch of Tackle the Tape, this week.
| I am also thrilled to see Senator Kevin Blackwell’s bill (SB2162) propose a new red tape reduction scheme, a bill to remove Certificate of Need red tape, and a bill to allow so-called "sandbox" innovation.
* **Combating Critical Race Theory:** We published a report on CRT, and I am delighted to now see that Senator McLendon’s bill was approved by the Senate. Similar bills have been prepared in the House, and there is a real chance that we might tackle this divisive ideology head-on.
* **Education Improvement:** If Mississippi is to prosper, we need a public education system that educates young Mississippians to a sufficient standard. The best way to achieve that is to allow moms and dads school choice. I am pleased that open enrollment is now on the agenda and that there is a bill to cap the administration costs of school board bureaucracy so that more money goes into the classroom**.**

Also of interest is Rep Chris Brown’s HB 874, which would ensure that we funded students, not systems, here in Mississippi. As you can see, this bill has our official stamp of approval!
---
|
---
| If you would like to watch in real time as the Freedom Agenda advances, please use our special [Legislative Tracker site,](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ce2d487f54&e=5703353baa) designed to help you see what your lawmakers do under the dome!
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1f2a1e4510&e=5703353baa)
---
| If we can implement this agenda here in Mississippi, we won’t just improve the lives of those living in our state. We will help show how lower taxes, less regulation and an appreciation of America’s founding ideals can give this country back its sense of confidence.

Have a wonderful weekend.
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell, President & CEO
---
|
---
| | **_BEST OF BROADCAST_**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=da31b60b2d&e=5703353baa "SuperTalk MS - Douglas Carswell, MS Freedom Agenda")

name: Michelle Siri
subject: On this day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Friend,

On this day in 1973, the Supreme Court announced its decision in Roe v Wade and legalized safe abortions for women across the country. But in the decades since, reproductive rights have been constantly under attack, and now the conservative majority on the Supreme Court is threatening to take away our rights on the national level.

I’ve dedicated my life working towards achieving equal rights for women here in Maryland and across the country — through my law career, at Planned Parenthood, and at the Women’s Law Center — and I know that women’s economic security and equality depends on the right to bodily autonomy. Now more than ever, we have to stand up for those rights and defend access to reproductive care. So will you join me in calling for improved access to reproductive health care and sign our abortion rights petition today?

ADD YOUR NAME: https://secure.ngpvan.com/eC0IAtYL80ugEQx8Oj5CNw2

I strongly believe that no matter who you are or where you come from, each of us deserves the dignity to make choices for ourselves. Though abortion rights are codified on paper here in Maryland, those protections don’t exactly translate into practice as over two-thirds of Maryland counties do not have meaningful access to a nearby abortion provider. These days, it's not enough to be just pro-choice — we need leadership that understands what’s at stake and what it really means to support reproductive freedom. If you agree, can you sign the petition today to expand access?

Without the basic dignity of bodily autonomy, we can never achieve gender equality. That’s why we must not only ensure a women's right to abortion care is never infringed, but also fight to expand access to care for all women. The King-Siri administration would lead the charge in this fight by removing barriers to access by expanding the scope of practice of who can provide care, filling in gaps in funding and insurance coverage so everyone can afford the reproductive health care they need, and more.

But we can’t do that without your support, so if you have a moment, please add your name to join John and I in calling for real access for reproductive rights today >>

Thank you,

Michelle Siri

Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer

John King for Governor
PO Box 8429
Silver Spring, MD 20107
United States

clean_body: Friend, On this day in 1973, the Supreme Court announced its decision in Roe v Wade and legalized safe abortions for women across the country. But in the decades since, reproductive rights have been constantly under attack, and now the conservative majority on the Supreme Court is threatening to take away our rights on the national level. I’ve dedicated my life working towards achieving equal rights for women here in Maryland and across the country — through my law career, at Planned Parenthood, and at the Women’s Law Center — and I know that women’s economic security and equality depends on the right to bodily autonomy. Now more than ever, we have to stand up for those rights and defend access to reproductive care. So will you join me in calling for improved access to reproductive health care and sign our abortion rights petition today? ADD YOUR NAME: I strongly believe that no matter who you are or where you come from, each of us deserves the dignity to make choices for ourselves. Though abortion rights are codified on paper here in Maryland, those protections don’t exactly translate into practice as over two-thirds of Maryland counties do not have meaningful access to a nearby abortion provider. These days, it's not enough to be just pro-choice — we need leadership that understands what’s at stake and what it really means to support reproductive freedom. If you agree, can you sign the petition today to expand access? Without the basic dignity of bodily autonomy, we can never achieve gender equality. That’s why we must not only ensure a women's right to abortion care is never infringed, but also fight to expand access to care for all women. The King-Siri administration would lead the charge in this fight by removing barriers to access by expanding the scope of practice of who can provide care, filling in gaps in funding and insurance coverage so everyone can afford the reproductive health care they need, and more. But we can’t do that without your support, so if you have a moment, please add your name to join John and I in calling for real access for reproductive rights today >> Thank you, Michelle Siri Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States Follow on Facebook: Follow on Twitter: Follow on Instagram: CONTRIBUTE TODAY: CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY: If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our website [] . By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring text messages from John King for Governor. Message & Data Rates May Apply. Text HELP for Info. Text STOP to opt out. No purchase necessary. If you would prefer to not get updates from the campaign, please unsubscribe:

body:
Geoff has a simple message for his liberal Democrat opponents -- "Bring it on!"
| | | |
---
---
|
---

Did you hear Geoff Diehl on Howie Carr's radio show last night?
If not, you missed a great discussion about Geoff's campaign for Governor and why he's a better candidate than any of his challengers.
Howie and Geoff talked about out-of-control government spending, excessive mandates, and a lack of affordability in our state.
"That's Maura Healey: big government. I don't see her cutting government regulations. As for me, I'm about individual freedoms and liberties, and a free market that helps drive down costs." \- Geoff Diehl

When it comes to the Democrat candidates running against him, Geoff has one simple message:
"Bring it on!"

name: John Fetterman
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Reproductive freedom is sacred both in Pennsylvania and across America.
#
Derek,
Today, we honor the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , which legalized abortion across the United States. Now, we’re faced with constant threats to not only repeal _Roe_ , but criminalize abortion.
**I’ve said it before, and I will say it again: The right to an abortion is non-negotiable. Reproductive freedom is sacred, and people should have control over their own bodies. Period.**
Here in Pennsylvania, Governor Wolf and I will veto ANY bill that limits a person's reproductive freedom.
Together, we're the first and second line of defense for abortion rights and reproductive freedom in our Commonwealth.
**But the truth is, Derek, it isn't enough.** Democrats must immediately enact federal protections for reproductive rights on the national level so we can prevent the types of astounding abortion bans like the ones we're seeing in Texas and Mississippi. This means abolishing the filibuster and passing the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would codify reproductive rights into law.
**Let me be very clear: The future of _Roe_ is on the ballot this year.** I need your help in this race because whoever becomes Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator will be able to cast a deciding vote to end the filibuster and clear the way to protect abortion access, not to mention confirm or deny future Supreme Court nominees.
**[Threats to reproductive freedom aren’t slowing down any time soon, even after 49 years of legal abortion. In honor of the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , will you please chip in $5 or any amount today to help me become the 51st Democrat in the Senate voting YES on abolishing the filibuster, protecting abortion access, and so much more?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41250?refcode=ema20220122-4284&t=1&akid=4284%2E434096%2EANgsW_)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41250?refcode=em20220122-4284&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4284%2E434096%2EANgsW_)**
Thank you for taking action today,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220122-4284-footer&t=21&refcode2=4284_434096_ANgsW_&akid=4284%2E434096%2EANgsW_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=4284%2E434096%2EANgsW_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=4284%2E434096%2EANgsW_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: 49 years of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Sign the petition to support reproductive rights >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955557/326688481/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAzNDVlMy1iNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG6G-dSoXSVyQWMm0i7XXXcnwOw4ABZvo_HKPJsvOWs=&emci=a2e26a2f-ff7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=020345e3-b67b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)

Today marks 49 years since _Roe v. Wade_ was decided. That’s 49 years of protecting women’s critical and constitutional health care rights. But whether we reach a 50th hangs in the balance. In the coming months, we could witness another historic event for our country, this time at the hands of the conservative-stacked Supreme Court. **We could see the end of _Roe v. Wade._** We are not helpless, folks. Passing the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ is a sure-fire way to codify women’s health care rights into law. [**Please, if you believe in equitable access to health care and a woman’s constitutional right to choose, voice your support for the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ at this critical moment. Sign my petition below:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955558/326688482/-1287802390?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAzNDVlMy1iNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG6G-dSoXSVyQWMm0i7XXXcnwOw4ABZvo_HKPJsvOWs=&emci=a2e26a2f-ff7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=020345e3-b67b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955559/326688483/-1287802390?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAzNDVlMy1iNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG6G-dSoXSVyQWMm0i7XXXcnwOw4ABZvo_HKPJsvOWs=&emci=a2e26a2f-ff7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=020345e3-b67b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)
---
Here in New Mexico, our state constitution and laws support a woman’s right to choose. But that’s not the case for our neighbors in Texas, where they recently passed a near-total ban on abortions.
I’m an original co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ because the state a woman lives in shouldn’t determine whether she has reproductive rights. All women should be protected at the federal level.
[**We’re running out of time. Will you sign my petition to call on my U.S. Senate colleagues to pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and protect reproductive rights nationwide?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955560/326688484/-1287802390?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAzNDVlMy1iNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG6G-dSoXSVyQWMm0i7XXXcnwOw4ABZvo_HKPJsvOWs=&emci=a2e26a2f-ff7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=020345e3-b67b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955561/326688485/-1287802390?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjAzNDVlMy1iNjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG6G-dSoXSVyQWMm0i7XXXcnwOw4ABZvo_HKPJsvOWs=&emci=a2e26a2f-ff7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=020345e3-b67b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)

Your support on this issue will make a powerful difference. Thank you.
— Martin

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: This is not a movement for life, it’s a movement against women.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
As a doctor, I understand how critical this is. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955591/326688926/1561815853?refcode=ea.e2f28794-b77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.e2f28794-b77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmYyODc5NC1iNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HItU0QU6dZSjRrdg3ZkmdfijVntXrSmcfcw9Aa8NPP4=&emci=cea7bc82-187b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e2f28794-b77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Peter,

49 years ago, the _Roe v. Wade_ decision was handed down, affirming every woman’s constitutional right to choose, forever. Or so we thought.

As a doctor, it breaks my heart to know that GOP lawmakers in states like Florida and Texas are ripping this constitutional right away from women. And it hurts me even more that electeds — including my opponent Barbara Kirkmeyer — want to do the same right here in Colorado. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955592/326688927/1050357650?amount=25&refcode=ea.e2f28794-b77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.e2f28794-b77b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmYyODc5NC1iNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HItU0QU6dZSjRrdg3ZkmdfijVntXrSmcfcw9Aa8NPP4=) Just earlier this month, Kirkmeyer attended an anti-choice march here in Denver calling reproductive rights “inhumane” and “barbaric.”

People like Kirkmeyer blanket their anti-choice position in language like “march for life” when they really mean the exact opposite. When we make abortion inaccessible and illegal, we all know abortions don’t actually stop. They just go underground and become dangerous and even deadly.

Kirkmeyer isn’t really marching for life, she’s marching against humane health care and the right for women to make decisions about our own bodies.

**[I will never stop fighting for reproductive rights, and I need your help in this battle. clean_body: As a doctor, I understand how critical this is. | | Peter, 49 years ago, the Roe v. Wade decision was handed down, affirming every woman’s constitutional right to choose, forever. Or so we thought. As a doctor, it breaks my heart to know that GOP lawmakers in states like Florida and Texas are ripping this constitutional right away from women. And it hurts me even more that electeds — including my opponent Barbara Kirkmeyer — want to do the same right here in Colorado. = Just earlier this month, Kirkmeyer attended an anti-choice march here in Denver calling reproductive rights “inhumane” and “barbaric.” People like Kirkmeyer blanket their anti-choice position in language like “march for life” when they really mean the exact opposite. When we make abortion inaccessible and illegal, we all know abortions don’t actually stop. They just go underground and become dangerous and even deadly. Kirkmeyer isn’t really marching for life, she’s marching against humane health care and the right for women to make decisions about our own bodies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you for your support, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. body:
I need your help to flip this seat blue
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955662/326689139/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk561-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc1NzU0YS1iODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltebxzT5B1FYzUxqPrHF8eMWKrrwReifSLaLu95TlFE=)
Peter – last year, Donald Trump held a rally in Iowa that a CNN opinion piece calls "the most alarming Trump rally yet." During his speech, Trump welcomed my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), to the stage, praising Sen. Grassley for always being there whenever he needed him. **Then, he gave Sen. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement," which Sen. Grassley enthusiastically accepted.**
Moments like this show why our campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley is so important – and why I need to ask for your donation to stay on track with our fundraising for the month. But before I do, I hope you'll let me explain.
You see, this rally has political commentators especially worried because top-ranking Republicans, like Sen. Grassley, are making their allegiances clear. Instead of choosing facts, reason and our democracy, they're choosing Donald Trump – the man who incited a deadly riot on our Capitol. But frankly, I'm not surprised at my opponent's actions. Sen. Grassley has a long history of advancing radical ideas at the expense of our country.
**Just look at his time as chair of the Judiciary Committee, when he blocked President Obama from appointing a Supreme Court justice and then rammed through the controversial confirmations of Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh.** It's not shocking to me that he'll happily defend Trump's attempts to overturn the election and put our democracy at risk if it helps further his radical agenda.
We have seen as clear as day that Sen. Grassley will stand by Trump no matter what – and that Trump is all in to protect Sen. Grassley. **Together, they'll do everything they can to take back the Senate and reclaim the White House. Our race here in Iowa is critical to stopping them. **
That's why I'm asking you to support my campaign, Peter. You see, I'm still short $5,292 of what I should raise by TONIGHT to stay on track for the month. With Trump and Sen. Grassley working hand in hand to keep Iowa red and take back the Senate, we cannot afford to have shortfalls. **[Please, can you donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now, so we can defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and stop Trump in his tracks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955663/326689140/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk561-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc1NzU0YS1iODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltebxzT5B1FYzUxqPrHF8eMWKrrwReifSLaLu95TlFE=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955664/326689141/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk561-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc1NzU0YS1iODdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltebxzT5B1FYzUxqPrHF8eMWKrrwReifSLaLu95TlFE=)

Thank you for always standing beside me, especially in moments like these.

– Abby

Peter,

Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration.

**They were Democrats.**

So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace.

**In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist.**

On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed.

They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree.

**Sadly, this was all a political game.** President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy.

**Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington.**

**[If you believe that we need elected officials who will support voter ID laws and common-sense election reforms- not the federalization of elections, then I'm asking you to chip in $5 to my Senate campaign today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f2727373d26f413887570e9916de9177&_e=l0QiJRYdP35VB0rTdnCWYr5U4ARdboU7N8e05yghgwMtyixWLZEMivXCf10LgFo9tnIXNgD9JmLzNhGflXl20oyVZQi-4xu-Tjy3sW4PH5hZVb7VBl9nOAtddxL9waxJpHecOAF-DMoG-xQe2aw7l33frXPimoJEQrCystVHhF46clll6CmYhziVh7p-FwaxOJqvby8H-FOO_8J04UrVvNqW1mHziZXfld02AdeAUv0HFgA4ypwQtFWM5Qoz3EKrTeTH_5G8RyR5V_8Hccp49VZru-_byXp2ls9vb_m_Fzixdu3Aghdgx0qmpmWQMSIMP8W2eREdqQNYkZMcXRBGd4rxgjbz4DeC7ul1J93w_T-wdgXCCM3i1UyPwesWe-ad1FAch7bVwfilcJzJwmdZHGm3Yy6RTSVZr9qeenXi9gn7LVmZZBlDNkywirZ8oDB-AEsqOL3P8vy4IeewDAO7xw%3D%3D) **

name: Patty Murray
subject: Protect abortion rights now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We can’t stand by while the rights we’ve fought so hard for are at risk
#
Peter,
49 years ago today, the Supreme Court made history by affirming the right to abortion in Roe v. Wade.
Nearly five decades later, reproductive rights across the country are more at risk than ever before. Since Senate Republicans confirmed three new Supreme Court justices under Donald Trump, state lawmakers have been emboldened to dismantle abortion rights. Now, the Supreme Court is considering cases that could roll back Roe entirely.
**We can’t stand by while the rights we’ve fought so hard for are at risk, , Peter.**
**[I’m fighting to expand our Senate majority so we can pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify Roe v. Wade and I need your support. Will you chip in $5 today to help me keep up the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955936/326690259/-126434323?refcode=pm_em_220122_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzY4ZTg4YS1iYjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2dFfDJCWbkDNJ7IdD68b4EhrtYxE3QFwqYTcMW4k_k=)**
Already, extreme new state laws in places like Texas are preventing patients from accessing the abortion care they need.
Meanwhile, a majority of Americans agree: people should be trusted to make their own decisions about when and whether to have children.
As the GOP tries to turn back the clock and restrict access to constitutionally-protected health care, we must fight back to guarantee Americans’ rights to make their own personal decisions about their bodies and futures.
**[Are you with me? Rush in $5 or whatever you can spare to help us win in 2022, pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, and put a stop to the GOP’s push to dismantle reproductive rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955937/326690260/-126434323?refcode=pm_em_220122_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzY4ZTg4YS1iYjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2dFfDJCWbkDNJ7IdD68b4EhrtYxE3QFwqYTcMW4k_k=)**
Thank you,
Patty
** **
** **
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40955938/326690261/-126434323?refcode=pm_em_220122_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzY4ZTg4YS1iYjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P2dFfDJCWbkDNJ7IdD68b4EhrtYxE3QFwqYTcMW4k_k=)****

subject: My subject
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
Peter, I’m on a mission to change the way things work in Washington.

**We need leaders who put service before self, and who understand the cost of the freedoms we too often take for granted here in America.**

Fighting as a Green Beret in the Middle East, I saw firsthand that these kind of missions take time, courage, and most importantly, teamwork.

**That’s why I want YOU to help me develop my plan to take back the House and defend American values.**

I put together a [quick survey for you](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=29a6f87930e54be492a3f8ffd2625113&_e=ClSg-hPt70PsDENiafPrbDYX5u6im_zSodP5vInb2HzoW8QQ5Dfb6LOl4EP2nFK-OvRfZH2QNEJj4d3HaZ-lAfzMjTbOzwntUCboSBhUP2GsTiZZnpRRgVD3j7qiq_3neiZTjta-3VDg4c9zCQX2rELQ9_F-C-JTkzZt2JkbWH5867VlYLQKb3zeYmCt8gbQOS2bFuMpGy-qzG_jMFLyNSZPxet3G54c_qpnHaaDdQPV1jPE9WET0dvLJZv8Kmy56GJjwOIqbTCFiAQv41k0j69AIg2WnxeKwHLhUaY7qgw-5C2oU2tFhHfwYmVe1b1hPTtKWtvzeYWV4AA3V6jp4HEJGENUM-TVzYf7NIbvgeZSfiOmNiyHDSbvnqxtjzCwKvtV2q1LbsF9wen867_g0SXaARFEkyFhupto2Ay5HK0%3D) to let me know which issues are most important to you, and it would be a HUGE VALUE to our mission if you took a few minutes to fill it out.

clean_body: Peter, I’m on a mission to change the way things work in Washington. We need leaders who put service before self, and who understand the cost of the freedoms we too often take for granted here in America. Fighting as a Green Beret in the Middle East, I saw firsthand that these kind of missions take time, courage, and most importantly, teamwork. That’s why I want YOU to help me develop my plan to take back the House and defend American values. I put together a to let me know which issues are most important to you, and it would be a HUGE VALUE to our mission if you took a few minutes to fill it out. In Service, Col. name: Afi Blackshear
subject: Doug Gansler is the clear choice for Governor of Maryland
body:
Meeting Doug Gansler changed my life. He showed me that there are people that truly care about diversity, equity, and justice in the legal field. That's why I believe Doug would make an amazing Governor of Maryland. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl461VbxsVs7DKXgAILS89KysDzR2SyDR1bDtT9k_HcbSHOzaSth1kD6p-TM3ZJGCB0SqXb6l3pmIlWw_CILd-ldm2XWov55eYcsojnInXjXw9J5yVzZIQV393U2ywBVZO2xzPrvKAxqGZe8SLDu6S7uyknJZjare1Wzn5ggslAHnhYesew4mvEj71CZRpquo9wk6SdcwGuYXc8Xgm6_ou-gh6B-vB2O8AcXVBBRO_U6icrRmczif0alBMg2ntV-8yR1PhrIr_zvt_SnBHXEPYV7XBxQIt0q_MnmhXMhQaIlbMoVyxFA1M7-OMJz0wCB_I/3ix/1Ver5BkgQqek6qjipYRJ4g/h0/Q0Expgzb6EL4y5bUTylIBtfsZKvywzUIu2T4BYRDPlM)
---
Hi friends, Four years ago, when I was debating whether or not the legal field was the right fit for me, I met Doug Gansler at an event. Surrounded by many important people, Doug chose to sit and talk with me for hours about my decision to attend law school. **That day changed my life.** Not only did it convince me that I could thrive as a Black, gay man in a legal career, but it also showed me that there are people out there who are genuinely committed to diversity, equity, and justice. Since then, I've witnessed Doug be that great person I met that day and I've had the pleasure of calling him a really close mentor ever since. ** ** Now, I'm in my second year of law school at Stanford. Unfortunately, living in California means I won't be able to directly benefit from a Gansler governorship, but it is so exciting to think about all the people in Maryland who would. **For all these reasons and more, I know Doug is the clear choice for Governor.**
---
**[Are you on Team Gansler too? Make it official by telling us WHY you support Doug today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl461VbxsVs7DKXgAILS89KysDzR2SyDR1bDtT9k_HcbSHOzaSth1kD6p-TM3ZJGCB0SqXb6l3pmIlWw_CILd-ldm2XWov55eYcsojnInXjXw9J5yVzZIQV393U2ywBVZOIzZhPFzf8hY40F6AIE13RcmTRn109v7ZA8SMDC0qVegvljKMDcgWroFCKbAWC_nAPnv_yZk2dEz8KXlZ5BknmrjLH4mzYWjquHecju01PJXYuXliC3TmJPWazu5I9_ypvz55wfU3Zqjix4YJwEaS8pGIfIdIbrqCqKUgNtrSa7gm-B-EdCAoynZjyKON4FII/3ix/1Ver5BkgQqek6qjipYRJ4g/h1/OA6Z0akI6CkmRHLjyNlXwsxOnH2Zz4beW0bVYvwEufc)**
---
[ **SHARE WHY YOU SUPPORT DOUG HERE ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl461VbxsVs7DKXgAILS89KysDzR2SyDR1bDtT9k_HcbSHOzaSth1kD6p-TM3ZJGCB0SqXb6l3pmIlWw_CILd-ldm2XWov55eYcsojnInXjXw9J5yVzZIQV393U2ywBVZPgS7VWbjyuj2huNZZArMI3MmH-kV4heLgS2CyZK-cUoS7U2GQuxuJt4OnXkpHLEE6ok-5HLIvxgyYJM1yne8KmQXXhWBC6SiJfxBOpbvKQADjoEXf6_Mm_OHDLFcN4i94fMaNL7iNUUdklJSEYrTYpIf1hY5R0lWSMK-iNjrWdL4wndz994DWdD2uxNFsfouc/3ix/1Ver5BkgQqek6qjipYRJ4g/h2/8XOsC2wdFQef4Vx4L6g6kD677KXyWOJwmiKOW_3g6Ug)
---
With your support, Doug will make Maryland a more equitable and prosperous place for all. Afi Blackshear
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzujrXXxiXmjZZTH-zkgI-y2demNxZCSpJ7lW6-LqnnShegz3osSw_7o686g-vOyRKwyhTXL2LNh1Nm66aJj4oLNurUg1KchyRWxWxHpDEkheOIWBQiXfqAL73R_Yl2jJYtnVKc9UND99t9rt02lMsISkfX2SNukbCamKyxjegYMt4QiOQTckoNiiYYdPKX3USktwvRgviJZyA197xO_hz_Ci-husrRPduqmVBqg1OX6j5RGLuYq0F7HcUQQ50FPBM4hMrQoo9FGrpGFyUXFvsArQiqaivBxuMhD7GqsDd7qTA6BpxRFpeSVsfIS2Mb_7KOVWvOAJQgPdrwFzYBa5fNoeErEjqWgSA3tS_uB2yVdVM/3ix/1Ver5BkgQqek6qjipYRJ4g/h3/IwnYCij-B2y_lZngr9_b4u26HWpbSqZZl6EuN3Cv06E)

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: One year of crisis and failure.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
We’re one year into the Biden administration. It’s been rough.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3celj--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | |
Friend, one year ago, Joe Biden took the oath of office and gave a speech full of promises.

Biden promised to keep our economy moving. Fast forward one year, and Americans are facing higher prices for everyday essentials, empty shelves at the store, and weak jobs growth. Biden broke that promise.

He promised to shut down COVID, not our economy. A year later, we’re facing testing shortages, misguided mandates, and a return to remote learning for our students. Biden broke that promise, too.

Biden promised to be our commander-in-chief, to stand up to our enemies and stand with our allies. Over the last year, Biden led a disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan and emboldened China, Russia, and Iran. Biden broke that promise to America and our closest allies.

Biden promised he would be the president for all Americans. Now, he’s using lies about “voter suppression” and “Jim Crow 2.0” to attack Americans who disagree with his assault on our election integrity. Biden absolutely broke that promise.

I could go on, Friend, but one thing is clear: **Joe Biden is a failed president. His administration has created crisis after crisis in our country.**

Joe Biden won’t listen to the American people as they stand up to the disaster this administration is causing. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

**[I want to hear your thoughts as we look back on Biden’s first year in office. Will you take a few minutes to let me know what you think Biden’s biggest failure has been as president?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3celj-1ugb2-4qqlpo7/ "I want to hear your thoughts as we look back on Biden’s first year in office. Will you take a few minutes to let me know what you think Biden’s biggest failure has been as president?")**

---
| | | [SHARE YOUR ANSWER HERE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3celj-1ugb3-4qqlpo8/ "SHARE YOUR ANSWER HERE")
---

Thanks for weighing in, Friend. Together, we can hold Joe Biden accountable.

-Senator Tim Scott

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Asking one last time — we need 5,000 more people to step up and say they endorse Mark’s re-election. We want to get there before the end of the weekend.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Last July, Trump said “Taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
#

Friends —
We are looking for 5,000 more people to step up and say they endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election. We’re hoping to reach that number before the end of the weekend.
Just use this link to add your name:
[**Add your name to say you endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign in Arizona.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220122-1-7&t=1&akid=1978%2E6688874%2EfwemVj)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220122-1-7&t=2&akid=1978%2E6688874%2EfwemVj)**
Last July, Trump said “Taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
Then, last weekend, Trump came back to Arizona and started his rally attacking Mark only to circle back an hour later to rant against him for even longer.
There’s a super PAC with at least $10 million out there trying to beat Mark, and millions of dark money dollars have already been spent against us.
But through it all, Mark continues to do the right thing for Arizona and our country.
That’s why we’re building a list of people who want to see Mark re-elected. We reached our first goal a few weeks ago, now we’re hoping for 5,000 more endorsers this weekend.
So please — help us get there:
[**Please use this link to add your name and say you endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. Help us reach 5,000 more endorsers by the end of the weekend.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220122-1-7&t=3&akid=1978%2E6688874%2EfwemVj)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220122-1-7&t=4&akid=1978%2E6688874%2EfwemVj)**
This simple act is incredibly important. It means a lot to Mark, and it shows the strength of our campaign.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1978%2E6688874%2EfwemVj).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: it was all a political game
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=01901bfa52f749d2b8b45c53db7e8882&_e=PMdSR5ABVJg2HKaZg5Ax52obbzV1GXbqRAUrZUineefX9dyFGYZLu72dAclgnLw8kAQIZ_EG9hwlQ1pwcvm5PdVMbqC2Rk7WtLbHrMZn7mpTxJL5P8Y7twDGCfAnYiyvmM5TVdL9xb6JAd4VgxwVsfUMOIaPDUt8aqbaYfUBfe-ITJqVU4aQKYf-LqTbV0LeHKYZq8pjmZAvkROJafbo-dY4J0VaVC-An_MQxRVFv69DxvGYWamnQ9UhbK3FZMzj_iK-sgXjuayY5i73_DMgze4MmXpchEKRYBqnl5nCGCK9fNKMlUQk8MapYCl3XwdZIdTRNFeIE3iYNenT4IReVvhNAID0unPDjmn7PoKUYVGlJf6lyezWWY7DjK6VseHd2LPni_sDdOXgwBztqJC1SskxFwntIXD5y-qaBSjIiioBEvTu3UR_5IBToXZJ8UCcgHOCol0dasTHnbXUH0bR2w%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration.

**They were Democrats.**

So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace.

**In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist.**

On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed.

They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree.

**Sadly, this was all a political game.** President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy.

**Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington.**

**[If you believe that we need elected officials who will support voter ID laws and common-sense election reforms- not the federalization of elections, then I'm asking you to chip in $5 to my Senate campaign today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=01901bfa52f749d2b8b45c53db7e8882&_e=PMdSR5ABVJg2HKaZg5Ax52obbzV1GXbqRAUrZUineefX9dyFGYZLu72dAclgnLw8kAQIZ_EG9hwlQ1pwcvm5PdVMbqC2Rk7WtLbHrMZn7mpTxJL5P8Y7twDGCfAnYiyvmM5TVdL9xb6JAd4VgxwVsfUMOIaPDUt8aqbaYfUBfe-ITJqVU4aQKYf-LqTbV0LeHKYZq8pjmZAvkROJafbo-dY4J0VaVC-An_MQxRVFv69DxvGYWamnQ9UhbK3FZMzjx0fYi-QT1R_Ko6rpZ8QYxy1nPKkQGrYy83GPgivCvup9s3EBJDO_LsUmWqztO2rKQMj_XnzePAPQwdKK2t1MmMxPtl3yIELdzWYJ7JaGluCOiuMj-eU7fsyXK9wy5w3TR3Fkl0BdA_R6OTfvZJMT-M6tvSivG4WYd8KZ6aZyhidpqzXcARKXM4Gr1XmvUXLQMSphkUjedZwzkKfWOMH0rw%3D%3D) **

clean_body: I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | Peter, Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration. They were Democrats. So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace. In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist. On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed. They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree. Sadly, this was all a political game. President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy. Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington. President Biden and our Democrat opponent want the country to believe Georgia's updated voting laws are nearly identical to ones in place during the Jim Crow era that disenfranchised black voters. Mr. President, that's absurd. I don't support your federal voting legislation, and I'm not a racist. The sad truth about Democrats today is that if they don't get the outcome they want, they accuse Republicans of being bad actors out to destroy America. Until we can figure out a way to put a lid on that kind of talk, our country is not going to heal. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: Fighting to Protect Our Right to Choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
What’s at stake | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=5f0318b960&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

On this day in 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court announced one of the most impactful decisions in our nation’s history, turning the tide in favor of women’s rights. Roe v. Wade cemented women’s constitutional right to choice and control over our own bodies.

This anniversary takes on added significance in the face of a manipulated Supreme Court majority that threatens to remove protections women depend on and reproductive freedom we’ve had for nearly 50 years. For some women, a ruling that removes the protections of Roe v. Wade will literally mean the difference between life and death. Frankly, it’s shocking to me that we are still debating government control over women’s bodies in 2022.

**As the only woman in this race for Congress, a devout Roman Catholic, and the mother of two teenagers, I have a first-hand understanding of the difficult reproductive choices women face. While I respect all people’s views, I also know these are deeply personal choices that every woman must be allowed to make for herself.

As your next Congresswoman, I will work tirelessly to protect Roe v. Wade so that future generations will never again have to worry about their right to reproductive health and freedom.**
[Will you join us today and support our campaign to ensure a woman’s voice in Congress?](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=c17ab4962f&e=de8b2615ea) [We cannot let up in this fight to protect women’s rights.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=5c47d6aaf1&e=de8b2615ea)
---

---
| Women must control our own bodies. With only 27% women in Congress today, we can’t afford to lose a woman’s voice when Jackie Speier retires.

[Join us today.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=0c89a20006&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| Sincerely,

Emily Beach

**BIDEN:**
**“NO APOLOGIES FOR WHAT I DID”**
Friends,

Last Thursday at his press conference, Joe Biden was given the opportunity to apologize for killing Americans and abandoning our allies in Afghanistan. Instead, he doubled down on his fatal decisions!

After a year in office, it’s clear that Biden’s agenda is failing the American people. We are watching America crumble, and the American Dream disappear.

Here are some of Biden's Biggest failures of his first disastrous year in office:

A border crisis that’s allowing undocumented, unvetted illegal immigrants to flood the U.S. with the highest number of illegal border crossings since 1960. Plus, don’t forget the Biden administration was reportedly in talks to pay out billions of dollars to migrants who broke our immigration laws.

**_\- Historic spikes in inflation that have resulted in record-high prices for fuel and food._**

_**\- A failed exit from Afghanistan that left Americans behind enemy lines and cost service members’ lives.**_

_**\- We need to focus on reversing Biden’s failed agenda and focus on making America stronger, safer, and more prosperous.**_ | [**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=2fd0147df7ec482a827cb362471927da&_e=Zy281kp9tFJIYs5fH_5XEhBzeyLyxlTWfxVDL2AoAuJQAqYxq34YWrMLlO4emudi2HdRKe7MmIRG02h8jz7VnQsh9iG7bh6ioDTpb-B0Fq2fcNeAYrqiWyChzd9n2AZdlLsG8yRmEC6cheQlagJSm19irNjaUovUyLMWjXH_Uqhbx1Zk-qEF5IQ55SUW6Q3oQ67Ub-2kXTlp8h3ZWFGbG6N0ui6b7AXbP78sEdtzsCn0euoLvKormS2dGtaHrwu3YRaiWZhqa0PCNz2ktpYuBNN_N-2kK8X4YSVFLPUjRacEMbZiMBpg4d_gWwMWRxgBMcwednVvB7elJW6SR6GNMELtUy-Rjjcn90QeF_wwypXixP-b16rWi9YpkVBkFryEkVULbaKp9HFaIHhovIrQUZarcHjGpptsgiwHWxMo3zZvKL3JI1W_trP5ZoEscNfeRICfnEsdsVYQiD-n-OPZkbj2xYadIec6TUNnCdgarwg%3D)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3cf0i--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cf0i-1uggs-4qqlpo7/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cf0i-1uggt-4qqlpo8/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cf0i-1uggu-4qqlpo9/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cf0i-1uggv-4qqlpo0/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cf0i-1uggw-4qqlpo1/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cf0i-1uggx-4qqlpo2/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

name: John Kasich
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I wanted to share some updates with you. Thank you for all that you are doing to help heal America! [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=4a23f03a1d6d41cead56424883267643&_e=mZlt9nCXjAE3k8x3DDE3yPjH2YR84Q1Dme5CB8J-eNIt2pB0xcJmx-QYLE89A8gMsS4PZzYc1NH9vZkr6vMbEN6l06qTmmaL3wK72DKjRfgZweZnxcP1PLKgBz88Mw8pf0VeF9IlhSIHSSM1tX_frqa2k78NU4c0p3Z6wE8MCk38Zbp5hZwkpZpWqgrHewbali7T6a3QtXCBIyBtPrpmMpCUtMRozYltB8tzGedsfzNj4Ra96nN3kXCCDHynXKXKDv9UeuU4iufbnH_dabirAw%3D%3D) Peter, I wanted to share some updates with you. President Biden held a press conference this week to reflect on his first year in office. He certainly had some meaningful accomplishments like the bipartisan infrastructure bill, but there were also failures with the military withdrawal from Afghanistan and the inability to reach across the aisle on his other legislative priorities. Unfortunately, he championed the agenda of the far left rather than keeping his campaign promise to heal Washington and bring about bipartisanship. He needs to shift his strategy to working with moderate Republicans on many of the issues where there can be compromise, such as prescription drug costs, the child tax credit, making government more efficient and efforts to tackle inflation. As for the Republicans in Congress, they have a real opportunity to take control of the U.S. House, and maybe even the Senate. For that to happen, there needs to be a real agenda to rally around. Loyalty to a former president isn't enough. You can view clips on my social media account of recent interviews on this topic and other current events. I'm also excited to share with you that I have a new podcast that will launch on January 27th! I'm teaming up with comedian Jordan Klepper to host a program that will be about life and the fascinating people out there. Please follow along on my social media for more details! | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=4a23f03a1d6d41cead56424883267643&_e=mZlt9nCXjAE3k8x3DDE3yFL0rN8g2Gipy9ziGYcx9btLLwscvcKX9g6QKeYqupFnwnUR3XLAqqfrmVvtaSWifF52Yh8IJtVboFNW_8VBuwXc3PeKvoSgMJXfNu3SM9DL2i9JcOc-2MZvM6NRSRVT7BvBCDVA6oLXdl8flbVCCt3KGLfz9szt12z5GLPq2nk5FbmAXF3Pd-Y5357gFCKHrJMFfnVlWIbxX0myM3l2VSMw4n5e2WlQ8FL7y1IWsGttYjAwGLd5wb99XkSg_JhNkA%3D%3D) | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=4a23f03a1d6d41cead56424883267643&_e=mZlt9nCXjAE3k8x3DDE3yMPLsr_-6iwaElrZ6NmBGsuo46D7kJCJy7NLz8mQmdQipajGi5PnuXMENcdrAXYaNT3KxOmlmD61j2xmQ_PHHmQ9yumhoYawNMkeLzxL3PehX5m8Ihqq70bhHgaAyfpyZYoqv5oU2_vUbn0QmIcn_83SkS-Ue_NkDX0XmUMl79iuT56kQPfaBomOOcFH21a8jVMQjYAa5KdPcqxZzfEQ8jtPuPLvb6vBYH3k1WTz4YjvnjD3dW7fTp1arNCQlXP6GA%3D%3D) | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=4a23f03a1d6d41cead56424883267643&_e=mZlt9nCXjAE3k8x3DDE3yChZ63ec_U6ZnZi9jK_rulkFcCYqyWlaaXweSEOWx0SfmgIRa1Ab4o-FxtHExI4r9bGFYSwHj9Ez0OFWqLAh5NfDIZqSr2zZRzU9uL7u7MGYiQ63k-N0c-wVcdH2jOuAjU3JyO_pdCnfEam20n_gAXYoIMGbj_B69yoLxIdG-3wesvXW21STzVYeo2nwjCviD2_DA6nNJvx2cTRpFKGet-JI92h01Ap04AzklW0gJlpP85of7wpMepjYaYzhDgfwGw%3D%3D)

I joined Captain America, Chris Evans and Mark Kassen on their ["A Starting Point" program](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=4a23f03a1d6d41cead56424883267643&_e=mZlt9nCXjAE3k8x3DDE3yBYY_0Xy_-W0GLJhlJn9YGt_-x3GYezMOVOpVDNH01AMOWbYdY4ThuNwoSAJTCFFEETQLCjlvL8_VDLnYGcZbmzO6-GCaWOQd1Y-srbW_wZxQXgcDidEEoCVBE2E1VpA10vs8TTfDzVt89cQ4hCCHKaDNBIgejoqNtMErJpkHldrgnlLZjsJckoXeZbfcqfT5xJSqpiSIkMJo4LSJkB0deprhHAZdIp6bNNCnxi6vJxNYhP_EL2Wn1jsWQ00VZ2RKOMh2-BnyqDhxPuj-yMgVGWm5dDkNsxpuLWl2_UWYgNW8uk2j9XX3MOayBzoKwtHCCLF6um_TpxxWSnid2tyqjU%3D) to discuss the debt limit and what it means for America. Give it a listen!
|
---
And finally, we recently marked the one-year anniversary of the January 6, 2021 attack on our U.S. Capitol. The lives of our elected officials, law enforcement and very fabric of democracy were threatened that day. We must all commit ourselves to resist those who seek to divide us and incite violence. [I spoke about this recently with Don Lemon](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=4a23f03a1d6d41cead56424883267643&_e=mZlt9nCXjAE3k8x3DDE3yO64ISZdTMSdlgVknmFbRgw66dArCjSVckScxGivSyoB8Vp6sg2VqVF0_3iGEChA1uHC6kI5JL81N9yzTzCYccQP7cS1bGfBmWB_BtmlZaWXx5rNyuUgVSH3S3j0L97E2LVnINOdSFjOVc38OzMR3wR5H0ZTk_8ZMfXFqyKyl15kNVgekRd0Izc6824_6ggKUJZ3w36pI953BnSPX13qL1utDQUSkhnJ5Avk_LLVxnNQ369njLiEBf_1CuJlO2iGgA%3D%3D).
|

Peter, together, we are making a real difference. Thank you for all that you're doing to help heal America!

-John

clean_body: I wanted to share some updates with you. Thank you for all that you are doing to help heal America! Peter, I wanted to share some updates with you. President Biden held a press conference this week to reflect on his first year in office. He certainly had some meaningful accomplishments like the bipartisan infrastructure bill, but there were also failures with the military withdrawal from Afghanistan and the inability to reach across the aisle on his other legislative priorities. Unfortunately, he championed the agenda of the far left rather than keeping his campaign promise to heal Washington and bring about bipartisanship. He needs to shift his strategy to working with moderate Republicans on many of the issues where there can be compromise, such as prescription drug costs, the child tax credit, making government more efficient and efforts to tackle inflation. As for the Republicans in Congress, they have a real opportunity to take control of the U.S. House, and maybe even the Senate. For that to happen, there needs to be a real agenda to rally around. Loyalty to a former president isn't enough. You can view clips on my social media account of recent interviews on this topic and other current events. I'm also excited to share with you that I have a new podcast that will launch on January 27th! I'm teaming up with comedian Jordan Klepper to host a program that will be about life and the fascinating people out there. Please follow along on my social media for more details! | | | | ---|---|--- | I joined Captain America, Chris Evans and Mark Kassen on their to discuss the debt limit and what it means for America. Give it a listen! | And finally, we recently marked the one-year anniversary of the January 6, 2021 attack on our U.S. Capitol. The lives of our elected officials, law enforcement and very fabric of democracy were threatened that day. We must all commit ourselves to resist those who seek to divide us and incite violence. . | Peter, together, we are making a real difference. Thank you for all that you're doing to help heal America! -John | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: Erica Smith
subject: A decision only I could make
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Today is the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade, and as we speak the Supreme
Court is deciding on a case that will determine the future for protecting
reproductive rights across the country.

So today, I want to share my very personal experience with reproductive
freedom.

I had my youngest son, Elias, at 22 weeks. He was very premature as a
result of preeclampsia and pregnancy-induced hypertension. It was a really
scary situation.

At 16 weeks, my doctors told me that if I continued my pregnancy I would
be risking my own death. This meant I faced an incredibly difficult
decision. Before Elias’ delivery, I had to decide on priority of life. “If
it comes down to it,” my care team asked, “Do you want us to save you or
your unborn child?"

Only I could make that decision. Despite my infinite love for my children
and family, I made the decision for doctors to save my baby if they could
not save us both.

This experience has shaped my views and policy positions on abortion
rights. Nothing should stand in the way of a person’s right to abortion.

With the rise of back-door attempts at overturning abortion rights across
several states, including here in North Carolina, we can’t afford to wait
to codify Roe v. Wade any longer.

As the next
representative of North Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District, you have my
promise that I will proudly vote to defend the right to safe, legal
abortion.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/35737?refcode=em20220122-804&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=804%2E3698%2EXVfwK9 ]So, I’m humbly asking you: Can you please consider making a donation to
our campaign today? Rural eastern North Carolinians deserve a Democrat who
will stand up for reproductive freedoms and our constitutional right to
abortion access.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/35737?refcode=em20220122-804&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=804%2E3698%2EXVfwK9 ]Donate $5

In solidarity,

Erica Smith
Candidate for North Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/35737?refcode=em20220122-804&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=804%2E3698%2EXVfwK9 ][IMG]

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220122-804-footer&t=1022&refcode2=804_3698_XVfwK9&akid=804%2E3698%2EXVfwK9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=804%2E3698%2EXVfwK9

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: On this day 49 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Earlier in my life, I made the choice to have an abortion. Terminating my pregnancy was not an easy choice, but it was MY choice.
#
Peter, today is the 49th anniversary of the historic _Roe v. Wade_ decision that recognized the constitutional right to abortion.
**But it could be the last.**
Reproductive freedom is under direct attack across the country, and we can’t rely on Donald Trump’s conservative Supreme Court to uphold the right to abortion.
**Despite what happened in the Senate this week, we must continue demanding an end to the filibuster — so we can pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and finally safeguard abortion rights in this country.**[**If you’re still with me in this fight, can you chip in $3 today? We can’t go back.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9874?refcode=em20220122-979&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=979%2E420207%2Ei1f6N3)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9874?refcode=em20220122-979&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=979%2E420207%2Ei1f6N3)**
This is personal to me — earlier in my life, I made the choice to have an abortion. Terminating my pregnancy was not an easy choice, but Peter, it was MY choice.
**Unfortunately because of restrictive abortion laws currently being passed in state legislatures all across the country, many people may not have the same choice that I did.**
The Senate can protect abortion rights right now, but only if it ends the filibuster and passes the Women’s Health Protection Act. We can’t wait any longer. [**Chip in $3 or anything you can to support my work to end the filibuster and protect abortion rights across the country. Time is running out to stop this assault on reproductive freedom.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9874?refcode=em20220122-979&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=979%2E420207%2Ei1f6N3)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220122-979-footer&t=22&refcode2=979_420207_i1f6N3&akid=979%2E420207%2Ei1f6N3)**
