Friends,

I’m a little concerned. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me feel so honored. This has become a movement to take power out of the hands of Washington and put it back into the hands of working New Yorkers.

Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. **I couldn’t do it without you.** That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my **Dark Money** opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and advance their Radical Agenda. **This can’t happen.**

clean_body: I cannot do this without you | Friends, I’m a little concerned. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me feel so honored. This has become a movement to take power out of the hands of Washington and put it back into the hands of working New Yorkers. Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask. I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Dark Money opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and advance their Radical Agenda. This can’t happen. The only way we’re going to Save America, Take Back the House, and stop Sean Patrick Maloney’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below. | I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up. Thanks for your support, Colin J. Schmitt Republican Candidate in New York’s 18th Congressional District Paid for by Schmitt for Congress Our mailing address is: Schmitt For Congress PO Box 67 South Salem, NY 10590 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Josh Harder
subject: $2 million for doctors and nurses
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Btweqh2J1j8kPClclY9n1FqqyUPcgqYat6DvYC-lUi4=/e8sYNMwOf1c8NKGvF2jYvLHKI3a7fcDlYlWu2Z80QKk=?refcode=E13573-20220121-DoctorsAndNurses-header-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, My brother David was born 10-weeks premature and needed multiple surgeries to save his life. His story is the reason why I got into politics. We are so grateful for the doctors and nurses who gave David the opportunity to grow into the man he is today (though it's still weird to think of him as being older than 10...) Here in the Valley, access to healthcare is a massive issue because we have a dangerous shortage of doctors and nurses. To show you how bad it is: _when COVID hit and our ICU 's reached capacity, it wasn't because we didn't have enough beds - it was because we didn't have enough doctors._ **I fundamentally believe this is a justice issue.** Valley families wait months longer for specialist appointments than in richer cities nearby. The quality of care in our country should not be dependent on zip code or income - it is a human right. So, I've dedicated a lot of my time to doing my part locally to fix it. **I 'm happy to share we just secured two major grants from the Department of Health and Human Services:** $939,906 for the Teaching Health Center Graduate Medical Education Program and $1.18 million for the Valley Consortium, a non-profit based in Modesto that delivers first class training to medical professionals. These grants are going to help us educate and attract more doctors and nurses right here in the Valley to make sure our families receive care from their doctor when they actually need it. Wins like these are incredibly personal. There's nothing more important than our loved one's health. And I refuse to stop until the healthcare system is more just and more equitable for all our families, both locally and nationally. [**I 'll never back down to better our communities. Will you please chip in now to help me win re-election and keep up the fight in Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Btweqh2J1j8kPClclY9n1FqqyUPcgqYat6DvYC-lUi4=/e8sYNMwOf1c8NKGvF2jYvLHKI3a7fcDlYlWu2Z80QKk=?refcode=E13573-20220121-DoctorsAndNurses-SL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/Btweqh2J1j8kPClclY9n1FqqyUPcgqYat6DvYC-lUi4=/e8sYNMwOf1c8NKGvF2jYvLHKI3a7fcDlYlWu2Z80QKk=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13573-20220121-DoctorsAndNurses-EL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

name: Izzi Levy
subject: Recommitting to Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2106%2E3611125%2EBQBGbN ][IMG]

Folks,

Today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark ruling in
Roe v. Wade.

While we celebrate this historic decision, and the progress we’ve made,
Roe is under unprecedented attack by GOP extremists who won’t stop until
it’s overturned.

Here in Ohio and across the country, Republicans are targeting
reproductive freedom by passing extreme legislation that severely hinders
access to safe abortions.

In the Senate, Tim will be a vote to codify Roe v. Wade into law. But
first, we need your help to get him there. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6510?t=1007&akid=2106%2E3611125%2EBQBGbN ]Can you chip in to flip Ohio
blue, expand our Democratic Senate majority, and protect the right to
choose?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6511?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2106%2E3611125%2EBQBGbN ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6511?t=1015&amount=50&akid=2106%2E3611125%2EBQBGbN ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6511?t=1016&amount=100&akid=2106%2E3611125%2EBQBGbN ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6511?t=1017&amount=200&akid=2106%2E3611125%2EBQBGbN ]Donate $200

With a 50/50 split in the Senate, what happens in Ohio could determine the
future of Roe v. Wade—and that’s no exaggeration. Every one of Tim’s
extremist GOP opponents is anti-choice.

Josh Mandel wants to overturn Roe entirely and supports an extreme
heartbeat bill.

Jane Timken will “defend the unborn” with no exceptions.

Mike Gibbons wants “to end abortion in America.”

JD Vance is against abortion even in cases of rape and incest, which he
called “inconvenient circumstances.”

If we lose control of the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell will take back
the gavel and ram through more anti-choice legislation. It could even cost
us another seat on the Supreme Court.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6510?t=1008&akid=2106%2E3611125%2EBQBGbN ]We can’t let Republicans turn back the clock on abortion rights—but
we’ll need your help. Will you chip in to flip Ohio and elect Tim Ryan to
the Senate to protect the right to choose once and for all?

In solidarity,

Izzi Levy

subject: Biden Admin Pushing to Federalize Elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dems’s plan to rig the 2022 elections is underway | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/biden-pushing-to-federalize-elections?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I take issue with Biden’s idea that the most secure, fair, and unbiased elections are under his administration’s “close” watch. His cronies on Capitol Hill – Schumer and Pelosi – are flooding the airwaves and social media with misleading soundbites. They’re telling us that “Democracy is Dying”, but this bill will be the final nail in the coffin.
---
| [WE NEED CONSERVATIVE FIGHTERS IN WASHINGTON - DONATE](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=1b7a75a8eb&e=f7e301a8ae "WE NEED CONSERVATIVE FIGHTERS IN WASHINGTON - DONATE")
---
| Democrats have no shame.

It’s the same as watching a two-faced liar talk to the American people. They have no problem dragging Voting Rights, Martin Luther King Jr., or racism out whenever they need to get a bill passed—despite the fact that their bills to federalize our elections would only worsen the state of our American Republic.
---
| [DEMOCRATS ARE WRONG FOR AMERICA AND WRONG FOR NJ JOIN NOW TO FLIP NJ-07 RED IN '22](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=35aa6e4407&e=f7e301a8ae "DEMOCRATS ARE WRONG FOR AMERICA AND WRONG FOR NJ JOIN NOW TO FLIP NJ-07 RED IN '22")
---
| Elections are best run locally, where our election officials are within arms’ reach of their voters _and_ critics. But Biden’s plan will supplant the States’ Constitutional responsibility to conduct elections with the federal government. This massive overreach and abuse of power will eliminate any measure in place that would prevent Democrats from cheating. This opens up America to Leftist fraud and a future controlled by a single party.

It’s time to say NO to the federal government trampling on our States. NO to tyranny. NO to election fraud. I’m eager to take that fight to Washington.

For New Jersey,

_Phil Rizzo_
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: So much for uniting the nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0f239ac9d3604822b43e7605712d9776&_e=_N1w91-2AlSUmujMLTtBrZBi3MVrj5OChgcI0t_zyJ8MtKeFBajNdwryYv2OdCDVZi0jegBdZ3bTwiMmD0ijDA5c1ta1z3TAh7-5R940aB9ZVXmcmAse2ohBLepEC1HO302yPeQFD9D_rLgktKD2nZ-Xi6lZ-OCn8kE27OfmZ__z1mTkJjMvAml1zlx8WCakSr-lMr2pCb6HHWKEDvp9xHilEf1wkVOD0NLebgTg65xss0c7A1RTkwDDDOYE7p_sRexH3MRfxtg8XGEdIYep69MJabkqmRRwBlhNCu7xnLm3_zVOTH8GDXi7JRDK4_ANyMtnl1nJJIsDkH3zLerjwSzinfZIJU2lp0Zdlt9fuQoYIajL-Wj_P_0UO3RPC1ikG4UUCwAzjWlL-GBmrNk6Nn2me0yj7NgVFqSd3HJzP-QyxtizhBq7qLbVDe9ghi_Air3sIxHouROe1qiWSnScwg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration.

**They were Democrats.**

So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace.

**In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist.**

On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed.

They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree.

**Sadly, this was all a political game.** President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy.

**Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington.**

clean_body: I thought he was supposed to bring people together. | Fellow American, Unlike President Biden, I was born in the deep South nearly 60 years ago. Back then, Dixiecrats - conservative Democrats - as they were known then, controlled nearly every aspect of government in Georgia and many states across the South. These politicians were opposed to racial integration. They were Democrats. So when President Biden visited Atlanta last week to give a fiery speech on election reform, I was stunned at what he said. He argued people who don't support the Democrats' voting legislation are like former segregationists Bull Connor and George Wallace. In other words, anyone who disagrees with him is a racist. On Wednesday, Democrats in the Senate - including my opponent - responded to Biden's siren call by holding a vote, which they knew would not pass, that would federalize our elections. As expected, it failed. They even tried to change the Senate's filibuster rule to ram through the legislation, which they knew would not succeed. As expected, it failed too because they couldn't get all Democrats to agree. Sadly, this was all a political game. President Biden used outrageous rhetoric, and Senate Democrats pushed forward with doomed legislation, simply to keep their base happy. Unfortunately, that's how Washington works these days, and it's why we need to change who we send to Washington. President Biden and our Democrat opponent want the country to believe Georgia's updated voting laws are nearly identical to ones in place during the Jim Crow era that disenfranchised black voters. Mr. President, that's absurd. I don't support your federal voting legislation, and I'm not a racist. The sad truth about Democrats today is that if they don't get the outcome they want, they accuse Republicans of being bad actors out to destroy America. Until we can figure out a way to put a lid on that kind of talk, our country is not going to heal. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: Noticing empty shelves, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |

Have you noticed _food prices going up at your grocery store_ , _the shelves getting emptier_ , and _more of the essentials missing_?

That's because Joe Biden and Democrats are prolonging this supply chain crisis that's been going on for 18 months.

name: Laura Neuman
subject: Roe v. Wade
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957717/326702786/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2RiYjc1NS1jZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vnm2RgXXE3hAeLM3r4183vWOH86W1231luDXktX8D_0=)

| | Peter, today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision, which made access to reproductive health care a constitutional right. Ever since then, Republicans have been trying to roll back _Roe’s_ protections. And now, they may be dangerously close if states don’t intervene and enshrine it into state law. **That’s why I’m urging Maryland’s Legislature to introduce a ballot initiative for a constitutional amendment to further protect the right to choose.** **[If you want a governor who will defend reproductive rights no matter what, then I need you with me. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can so I know I have your support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957718/326702787/-1938532744?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220122_FR_RoeAnniversary_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2RiYjc1NS1jZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vnm2RgXXE3hAeLM3r4183vWOH86W1231luDXktX8D_0=)** I’ve been an advocate for women for decades – from standing up for survivors of rape and sexual assault to speaking up against attacks on the right to choose. And now, as the only Democratic woman running for governor, I intend to continue that fight. With the right to choose under attack like never before, we need a staunch defender of reproductive rights leading our state forward. As a rape survivor, a mom, and a pro-choice woman, I am that person. clean_body: | = | | Peter, today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark Roe v. Wade decision, which made access to reproductive health care a constitutional right. Ever since then, Republicans have been trying to roll back Roe’s protections. And now, they may be dangerously close if states don’t intervene and enshrine it into state law. That’s why I’m urging Maryland’s Legislature to introduce a ballot initiative for a constitutional amendment to further protect the right to choose. = I’ve been an advocate for women for decades – from standing up for survivors of rape and sexual assault to speaking up against attacks on the right to choose. And now, as the only Democratic woman running for governor, I intend to continue that fight. With the right to choose under attack like never before, we need a staunch defender of reproductive rights leading our state forward. As a rape survivor, a mom, and a pro-choice woman, I am that person. But Peter, I need your support. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for standing with me in this fight. – Laura | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Peter, today marks an important day in our nation’s history.

**49 years ago today, the Supreme Court made _Roe v. Wade_ the law of the land** — thanks to this landmark case, the right to an abortion is protected.

But now, Republicans in Congress and in statehouses nationwide are attacking reproductive rights. _If Roe v. Wade is overturned, the consequences for all Americans will be devastating._

So today I’m calling on my supporters to solidify their support for reproductive rights. [**If my petition gets 5,000 signatures, we’ll send an unmistakable message to MAGA Republicans — that they have NO place meddling with reproductive freedom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957742/326702867/-1429019326?refcode=PAFC_20220122_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGRiYjc1NS1jZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qhFRaKTZSTf4TuLRwHu0bnHVs1koFPcD6EbxZycH3A=&emci=72afe888-257a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8ddbb755-cf7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1755436) | [5,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN NOW TO PROTECT THE RIGHT TO CHOOSE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957743/326702868/-1429019326?refcode=PAFC_20220122_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGRiYjc1NS1jZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qhFRaKTZSTf4TuLRwHu0bnHVs1koFPcD6EbxZycH3A=&emci=72afe888-257a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8ddbb755-cf7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1755436)

Peter, I refuse to stand idly by while Republicans tear down another fundamental right of every American.

From fighting to destroy our democracy, to now openly calling for the reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ , **Republicans will stop at nothing to turn back the clock.**

I’m proud to be a pro‐choice Democrat — and if California voters elect me to Congress, **I vow to protect the fundamental right to choose with everything I’ve got.**

Republicans won’t stop in their quest to take away reproductive freedoms. [**That’s why I’m calling on my supporters to stand up and make your voice heard — join me and 4,999 grassroots Democrats in protecting the right to choose by signing on before midnight:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957744/326702869/-1429019326?refcode=PAFC_20220122_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGRiYjc1NS1jZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qhFRaKTZSTf4TuLRwHu0bnHVs1koFPcD6EbxZycH3A=&emci=72afe888-257a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8ddbb755-cf7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1755436)

clean_body: I vow to protect the right to choose with everything I’ve got. | = Peter, today marks an important day in our nation’s history. 49 years ago today, the Supreme Court made Roe v. Wade the law of the land — thanks to this landmark case, the right to an abortion is protected. But now, Republicans in Congress and in statehouses nationwide are attacking reproductive rights. If Roe v. Wade is overturned, the consequences for all Americans will be devastating. So today I’m calling on my supporters to solidify their support for reproductive rights. | Peter, I refuse to stand idly by while Republicans tear down another fundamental right of every American. From fighting to destroy our democracy, to now openly calling for the reversal of Roe v. Wade , Republicans will stop at nothing to turn back the clock. I’m proud to be a pro‐choice Democrat — and if California voters elect me to Congress, I vow to protect the fundamental right to choose with everything I’ve got. Republicans won’t stop in their quest to take away reproductive freedoms. Thank you, Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us replace the worst MAGA Republican in Congress, make a=. name: Jessica Mason
subject: Why do we have to fight so damn hard, friends?
body:
This could be Roe’s final anniversary.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957774/326703147/-1288899752?refcode=220122_FR_roevwade_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDc2ODg1MS1kMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjgIZZcP8PCq4elye3jzXxVnmm9hx2Y1Cz8AZgmXMRQ=)
---
Team New Deal,

It’s nothing short of _**enraging**_ that on Thursday, the Supreme Court ruled to allow the _**most restrictive**_ abortion law in this country to stay in effect right here in Texas.

**The truth is, that this rage is rooted in fear. Fear of the very real possibility that _Roe_ could be overturned as early as _this year._**

With today being the anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ court decision in 1973, it is even more devastating to think that it could be the very last anniversary this landmark legislation ever has.

**_How can we still be fighting for the basic fundamental human right to choose what we do with our own bodies? Why do women have to fight so damn hard to have bodily autonomy?_**

Women in Texas are already paying the price of the abortion ban here. Women who don’t have means or resources to travel to a state where abortions are legal. Women who don’t even know they are pregnant before six weeks. Women with health complications that become life-threatening through pregnancy.

I refuse to sit back and let this happen to the women of my community, my state, or my country. I’m going to stop at nothing to ensure that abortion is accessible to ALL, and I will fight back against reproductive injustice. **We must stand together as a pro-choice coalition to resist these destructive assaults on reproductive rights, so I’m asking you to take urgent action today.** ****[Please, team, can I count on you to stand with me in defense of reproductive freedom? Rush a contribution right now to help me champion this important fight in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957775/326703148/-1288899752?refcode=220122_FR_roevwade_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDc2ODg1MS1kMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjgIZZcP8PCq4elye3jzXxVnmm9hx2Y1Cz8AZgmXMRQ=)**** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ************[**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40957776/326703149/-1288899752?refcode=220122_FR_roevwade_EL10&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDc2ODg1MS1kMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjgIZZcP8PCq4elye3jzXxVnmm9hx2Y1Cz8AZgmXMRQ=)************

She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind.** **TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. clean_body: This could be Roe’s final anniversary. | | | = Team New Deal, It’s nothing short of enraging that on Thursday, the Supreme Court ruled to allow the most restrictive abortion law in this country to stay in effect right here in Texas. The truth is, that this rage is rooted in fear. Fear of the very real possibility that Roe could be overturned as early as this year. With today being the anniversary of the Roe v. Wade court decision in 1973, it is even more devastating to think that it could be the very last anniversary this landmark legislation ever has. How can we still be fighting for the basic fundamental human right to choose what we do with our own bodies? Why do women have to fight so damn hard to have bodily autonomy? Women in Texas are already paying the price of the abortion ban here. Women who don’t have means or resources to travel to a state where abortions are legal. Women who don’t even know they are pregnant before six weeks. Women with health complications that become life-threatening through pregnancy. I refuse to sit back and let this happen to the women of my community, my state, or my country. I’m going to stop at nothing to ensure that abortion is accessible to ALL, and I will fight back against reproductive injustice. We must stand together as a pro-choice coalition to resist these destructive assaults on reproductive rights, so I’m asking you to take urgent action today. **= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ********=******** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** ******** ******** I promise, I won’t back down on this. But I need you fighting alongside me. In solidarity, Jessica = **********************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress******************** ********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:******************** ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = ____= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Cuellar shows up at anti-abortion event
body:
It's bad enough.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, Henry Cuellar accepted an award from March for Life, an extreme anti-abortion group that opposes Roe v. Wade. That was his FIRST public appearance since his house and campaign office were raided by the FBI.
It’s bad enough that Henry Cuellar takes millions from Big Oil, Wall Street, private prisons, Big Pharma, and other corporate PACs. It’s really bad that his home and office were raided as part of an investigation led by the DOJ team that handles issues related to bribery, corruption, election crimes, and more.
**And it’s despicable that Henry Cuellar continues his advocacy AGAINST abortion rights.** He’s the only anti-abortion Democrat remaining in the House, he’s co-sponsored anti-abortion legislation with Republicans, and he was the only Democrat to vote against a bill to codify Roe v. Wade after Texas enacted extreme abortion restrictions in the state.
[We must take advantage of this moment and help progressive fighter Jessica Cisneros defeat the anti-abortion corporate-backed Cuellar. Split a contribution between Jessica and Justice Democrats right now so we can ensure Jessica defeats Cuellar.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90037?refcode=em20220122-21604&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=21604%2E1203867%2EfbiWvW) _These are the last few weeks of the campaign and your donation can make the difference._
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90037?refcode=em20220122-21604&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=21604%2E1203867%2EfbiWvW)**
None of this is good news for Henry Cuellar’s campaign. The FBI showing up to Cuellar’s house raises major issues for his re-election campaign and Democratic primary voters overwhelmingly support abortion rights.
Just a few days ago, things were looking very good for Cuellar’s re-election. He reported having $2.3 million in corporate-backed campaign cash — far more than Jessica Cisneros, who isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money.
Honestly, we were worried that we might get outspent badly and lose this race.
**Now, the race is blown wide open.** With the FBI raid AND Cuellar championing his anti-abortion positions, we have an opportunity to get voters to reconsider Cuellar before they start casting ballots in just a few weeks.
**There is a very good chance that Jessica Cisneros can win this race if we see a huge surge in fundraising right now.[So, can you split a donation to Jessica and Justice Democrats so we can send Jessica to Congress?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90037?refcode=em20220122-21604&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=21604%2E1203867%2EfbiWvW)**
In solidarity,
Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=21604%2E1203867%2EfbiWvW) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=21604%2E1203867%2EfbiWvW) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220122-21604-footer&t=24&refcode2=21604_1203867_fbiWvW&akid=21604%2E1203867%2EfbiWvW)**
---

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Abortion is health care.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We cannot turn our backs on the millions of people who are counting on us.
#
**Today, on the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , reproductive rights for millions of Texans — and Americans — are under attack.**
Earlier this week, the Supreme Court once again declined to intervene and put an end to SB 8. It's one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country, which places a $10,000 bounty on anyone who supports someone trying to exercise their basic right to control their own health and decide their own future.
Plain and simple, the Supreme Court is refusing to protect the constitutional right of Texans to make their own health care decisions. **To make this right in Texas, we've got to win this race and elect Beto as Texas' next Governor.**
Beto won't back down when it comes to fully protecting _Roe v. Wade_ , fighting anti-choice efforts to roll back reproductive health care, and defending the right to access a safe, legal abortion. **But first, we have to build the people-powered campaign it will take to defeat Greg Abbott and put an end to this chaos and cruelty.**
**[Consider a $3 or more donation today to elect a Governor who will fight to protect _Roe v. clean_body: We cannot turn our backs on the millions of people who are counting on us. Today, on the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade , reproductive rights for millions of Texans — and Americans — are under attack. Earlier this week, the Supreme Court once again declined to intervene and put an end to SB 8. It's one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country, which places a $10,000 bounty on anyone who supports someone trying to exercise their basic right to control their own health and decide their own future. Plain and simple, the Supreme Court is refusing to protect the constitutional right of Texans to make their own health care decisions. To make this right in Texas, we've got to win this race and elect Beto as Texas' next Governor. Beto won't back down when it comes to fully protecting Roe v. Wade , fighting anti-choice efforts to roll back reproductive health care, and defending the right to access a safe, legal abortion. But first, we have to build the people-powered campaign it will take to defeat Greg Abbott and put an end to this chaos and cruelty. Texas already leads the country — and much of the developed world — in the rate of maternal mortality. And the closure of reproductive health care clinics across Texas in recent years has made it more difficult to have a safe abortion. clean_body: If we don’t act, it will soon be a reality. | Peter, Like many Americans, my parents came to this country in search of a better life. They fled Castro’s Cuba to escape the horrors of socialism and have a chance at the American dream. Now, as a member of Congress, I’ve made it my mission to stop the Left from turning America into a failed socialist state like the one my parents fled. But because of my outspoken support of capitalism and the American way of life, Nancy Pelosi and the socialist Left have placed a target on my back. They’re determined to FLIP my seat this November so they can save Pelosi’s House majority, and I’m counting on your support to defend myself. During my career as a 5-time Emmy Award-winning journalist, I worked to hold the corrupt and powerful accountable. I’ve gone toe-to-toe with socialist dictators like Venezuela’s Nicolás Maduro and Cuban dictator Fidel Castro, so I’m not afraid to stand up to socialists like AOC and Ilhan Omar in Congress. I’m committed to tirelessly defending individual rights and liberties and making sure EVERY American has the opportunity to achieve the American dream. But I can’t win this battle without your help... Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

subject: Today marks the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958531/326706375/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmZiZWMxZS1kOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5QSsDZP387vpTmSZ-T1vNEFsPtYHClzQLQ4galdNrU=)
Today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s _Roe v. Wade_ decision. And nearly 50 years after this declaration of reproductive freedom, _Roe_ is still under attack. In fact, one of my opponents has filed legislation to outlaw abortion rights in Colorado. The decision to have an abortion is deeply personal, and should be kept between a patient and their doctor. So, I co-sponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify _Roe_ into federal law. If passed, this bill ensure that everyone can safely access abortion care no matter where they live. The fight to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and uphold the right to safe and legal abortion care for people across the country is critical, folks. We can’t afford to get complacent. **Will you add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act? clean_body: | = Today marks the 49th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s Roe v. Wade decision. And nearly 50 years after this declaration of reproductive freedom, Roe is still under attack. In fact, one of my opponents has filed legislation to outlaw abortion rights in Colorado. The decision to have an abortion is deeply personal, and should be kept between a patient and their doctor. So, I co-sponsored the Women’s Health Protection Act to codify Roe into federal law. If passed, this bill ensure that everyone can safely access abortion care no matter where they live. The fight to defend Roe v. Wade and uphold the right to safe and legal abortion care for people across the country is critical, folks. We can’t afford to get complacent. Will you add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act? We must enshrine access to reproductive care into law once and for all. | | Thank you for standing up for choice with me on this important day, — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

**You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," working families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away.** That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve.
**Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working families. **
Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him.
This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. The GOP is sitting on a war chest of $32 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate. It'll take massive grassroots resources to compete with their funds.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello, In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign. But I hope you’ll take a minute to let me explain why your support matters so much, especially right now. As you may know, my 2016 Senate election was one of the closest in history. I won by 1,017 votes and unseated a Republican incumbent in the most expensive Senate race New Hampshire had ever seen. Mitch McConnell and his allies have spent over $7 million attacking me – more than any other Senate Democrat on the ballot next year. They’re backed by dark money, far-right billionaires, and super PACs with bottomless war chests. If we’re going to stand up to their attacks and win this race, it’s going to take an army of grassroots supporters. That's why my team set an emergency goal of $10,000. We can’t match the Republican mega-donors and their million-dollar checks, but we can show the strength of our campaign with people like you chipping in $5 or more whenever you can. **[Please, can you donate $5 before midnight tonight? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, and I could really use your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958551/326706479/-1281091919?refcode=e20220122_mwh-grateful&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzcyYzZmOC1kOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DU_sD_gnmSE3B3Hx_GGEqY8xmQsbaF-TUlWgS2ubdlM=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958552/326706480/-1281091919?refcode=e20220122_mwh-grateful&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzcyYzZmOC1kOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DU_sD_gnmSE3B3Hx_GGEqY8xmQsbaF-TUlWgS2ubdlM=)
---
I first got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like my son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. I ran for office to make a difference for as many people who needed my help as I could and to ensure all Americans have the opportunity to succeed.
I still remember the long night in 2017 when Senate Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and they failed by one vote. I realized that night that if it weren’t for 1,017 votes in New Hampshire, a Republican would have been in my seat – and millions of Americans would have lost their health care coverage.
That’s why I’m so grateful for grassroots supporters like you, my friend. Your support got us those 1,017 votes we needed to flip this seat in 2016. Your enthusiasm helped us flip the Senate and win the White House in 2020. And with you on our team, we are going to take on the tough fight ahead and keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue this November.
**[Please contribute $5 or whatever you can to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958553/326706481/-1281091919?refcode=e20220122_mwh-grateful&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzcyYzZmOC1kOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DU_sD_gnmSE3B3Hx_GGEqY8xmQsbaF-TUlWgS2ubdlM=)**
Thank you for being with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958554/326706482/-1281091919?refcode=e20220122_mwh-grateful&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzcyYzZmOC1kOTdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DU_sD_gnmSE3B3Hx_GGEqY8xmQsbaF-TUlWgS2ubdlM=)
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
A PAC supporting six Navy SEAL combat veterans running for Congress this year released a hard-hitting ad highlighting the six candidates for Congress. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3c7ea8350cd0/a-strong-finish-to-8804545?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=47df0e4d1e&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| Navy SEAL PAC Ad Features Ed Thelander
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=b832a76e38&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
"I Don't Just Want To Serve; I Need To Serve. America Has Called, And I Proudly Step Forward To Serve, Once Again."
|
> * * *
> _Ed Thelander is a Retired Navy SEAL, Volunteer Firefighter and a Reserve Deputy Sheriff who will lead by example to restore common sense, honesty and real Maine priorities to the United States Congress. Ed pledges to work to: _
* _Improve our education system, ensuring that our children grow up with the skills required to be successful in life _
* _Fix our broken border policy once and for all _
* _Restore domestic energy production and manufacturing to America _
* _Stop reckless government spending and over-reach _
* _Protect Maine's fishing and lobster industries from overbearing regulations_

> _ Just as he defended America’s liberty and security when deployed in our service overseas, Ed will work tirelessly to make sure Congress acts meaningfully on our priorities — not those of special interests._
> * * *
---
| [Please Donate Here](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=0e24da09e0&e=f8a0a76a2b "Please Donate Here")

|

body:
| | | We can’t trust the courts to do the right thing | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403Vvz9Tcb1pxsYI3tviLozUahSDaIHFMrqdEcP7r2dAysdCchGsO1fT-v0v-2SxbgzGmY00vAveOqd3SeIJQIbEZFraP2T3r0Hb5zFSaJt6ZNSC2OwpM10rGBzre1cZ2mnWEvuHAxdXmLeNmEFMAR8gqoAmRglVNp24bGYq2eLBWv6NKURxRdDkLqKowGTMc-yu5naVX3o25ExTPS6aNyBzk9nM1fbdnxkEUyMmoBCn2h8OAUJoy08y4KI7A5YRA0AFkVS8s9plCC5aKOb-zVchV7DndkXyG5xn3Zh5zsjFsVHkBpny8cDNLlXD13nX3rWJrpI0_jQNMT6oeikHRImgS8gX5Ad88qorH9N6FTMD5pbBQ9wJiuA0jANH-aoqMbgpLmOzcq2l_eShw4nBfoS2THlAtNNN2owoqhbipRsGhOkOs92UkW_pLYpwCdDx1cfgTATnY7CAHTUUmm_LW63Qs/3ix/18m15dxyT7aPVpx9nbobRg/h0/w9ZatOMaeFvaaXp2TVgPkZ92FXVKa1D2hSfyd7NUWFE)

| Team, today is the 49th anniversary of the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ case that allowed women to make their own decisions about their bodies.

Despite constant attacks, it’s amazing the landmark case has made it this far. But **there is a real danger that it will not make it to its golden 50th anniversary.**

Thanks to the AZ GOP, the minute SCOTUS rules, **a “trigger law” would end reproductive rights in AZ instantly.** But we can take that off the table by flipping AZ blue in November.

**[Team, we’ve launched our Blue AZ Fund to help us win the statewide races and legislative seats we need to take control. Can you make a $10 donation today so we can turn AZ blue and allow women to make their own medical decisions?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403Vvz9Tcb1pxsYI3tviLozUahSDaIHFMrqdEcP7r2dAysDpAERRaGpNWdWPpszi_qoTGsOnpCuc5MuRkc_6OietcDbUco0KVr4pj5ilAVHGC4RU2wzlpALDj5-YADdpFay0Lcq_wqK3GS2ugxLfQV1o66AFKXPEI_eRZCb3SiaXNLL3sVAWCB5t3Mg8kswQYMiteRHecH_xB0FVWBe9RbCg655QHeqRFW122uuEly32HNatG1-Xq1FOYVsQ_HOKGHf5fDqV3uG4PzI5M7rk8ZqvwYR_ANLcEqAe3f6BGk9E659ijEh3M0KOSwHtWhCi9I_rdgGx6kMATOgBVX7Szl5uGkkH0e6iGbvHCmrZU-FxhGhRkNhgR70dYfaU1gcwHZRbHokdOgf51LEgNbyxF81fLV0XlYXvulTguIs1ylItCFcBH-Q-10B_iNiqQZ7fgrdA/3ix/18m15dxyT7aPVpx9nbobRg/h1/Bv3ppjlY0EscX5M3S1jC1h4_RAS8NicUAF76PoJVMVc)** [
DONATE ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403Vvz9Tcb1pxsYI3tviLozUahSDaIHFMrqdEcP7r2dAysK0nvK49CXONH1Uw7OvAzYTZU5NRPXUiULoP0RUYky7nJP8EeYJ8u-ZRLb4JZl_QUWK2qDl6yhwh1BeU75R2UBfxIDIvH4zh-gP6KxPk_2mDKBfMJ9CvcOjo4MuPgU-d-uGL6n6WkZTOtFrOM89_e2j4-G-Y0LOgXOiaVvLN9cPaTq2IzRtGzPHbiGG0Uw_TYz0cLWlVvXmHQTLPSq0e1oxub3RIz49jccgHRq96KLtlggq7_ilyBONW8L3ewPchM8v_GA7vFw2kzUKdd6DcTr9S3_oktSJwVRkUJdA4b6KkOK5cCixPOzcEDrSqcrr-MTDJ32_pOYgNnb0d89JtYxei9ijOjWNnNbXZ317Rocaj7UqyCHhNnaZPCeOVfBRYeZXDPCkNPQHAJeupkKROcSQ/3ix/18m15dxyT7aPVpx9nbobRg/h2/6XMo09pz6fnwihhYV3k5C7DnESYuS3ZuDPD_ZkbgkPQ)
The AZ GOP is so giddy about the prospect, AZ Gov. Doug Ducey has been _publicly cheerleading SCOTUS to do just that._

It’s shameful how openly the AZ GOP are trying to control women. But it’s not surprising.

With your support, we can turn AZ blue, get rid of the trigger law, and allow women to make their own decisions with their doctors -- not with politicians.

**[Team, turning AZ blue at the state level is our best chance to maintain reproductive freedom for another year! Can you make a $10 donation today to our Blue AZ Fund so we can fund the organizing work necessary to turn AZ completely BLUE?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403Vvz9Tcb1pxsYI3tviLozUahSDaIHFMrqdEcP7r2dAysgPOMz-BB6O34aELZ84RURBntt5-pL-aFGrOEqtW9ZhL13dVtZj-uVGNIYKE3XCo7H6N9xnAzi9xXCwsVXXPmwi-JFufGRoaCUxKEimqLtTLtWE4-TPLpF40vvahTJmhgyOQ-pYSOx5HKKR-uFa159mJU86WJ7Zxy1GOAZT3EQyDZT3vDDqb3NxloRgNm4U75CjIjj5LUA0Wnod7qjj4OiC_AA_2s_9d6JJURezIrRMfa3ZfppQRCVu4KhNXJKWVJ-V86aO-Jd7p4a9lJtbmmxmy69VS3tPxbTPw0f1oLt4xyiuEa2JLVlzxNCxeLOoa-UoTCzMroI8g_I30YBsli22yMD83hjlt_cU842XdYNn2mHxKytMydlXKFqTdtoGAalZPPLZZ6KRqRunRwvvbKWw/3ix/18m15dxyT7aPVpx9nbobRg/h3/bQMojDZq2X2otjt69tcIUWyB24PtlQ5szxjLl1Ki9Wo)**

clean_body: | | | We can’t trust the courts to do the right thing | | | Team, today is the 49th anniversary of the landmark Roe v. Wade case that allowed women to make their own decisions about their bodies. Despite constant attacks, it’s amazing the landmark case has made it this far. But there is a real danger that it will not make it to its golden 50th anniversary. Thanks to the AZ GOP, the minute SCOTUS rules, a “trigger law” would end reproductive rights in AZ instantly. But we can take that off the table by flipping AZ blue in November. The AZ GOP is so giddy about the prospect, AZ Gov. Doug Ducey has been publicly cheerleading SCOTUS to do just that. It’s shameful how openly the AZ GOP are trying to control women. But it’s not surprising. With your support, we can turn AZ blue, get rid of the trigger law, and allow women to make their own decisions with their doctors -- not with politicians. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, azdem.org For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958803/326708237/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjcxZjY2Ny1kZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtX6cVuCwjiDq3_wNxAH6Wh52LoUmrhF4XzkKWOJDqU=&emci=1241d0ae-d47b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f271f667-df7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now.
I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service.
In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa.
There’s one reason: **Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. **We’re just 36 hours away from our most important fundraising deadline yet, and right now we’re still very short of our $65,000 goal. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now – before our critical fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958804/326708256/-42398318?refcode=em20220122pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjcxZjY2Ny1kZjdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtX6cVuCwjiDq3_wNxAH6Wh52LoUmrhF4XzkKWOJDqU=)

clean_body: Hello, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now. I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service. In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa. There’s one reason: Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate. Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley. I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. We’re just 36 hours away from our most important fundraising deadline yet, and right now we’re still very short of our $65,000 goal. So I have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = No amount you can give is too small. Every dollar counts in hitting our goal and ensuring we have the resources to fight back against all the Super PAC lies. Thank you for being a part of this campaign, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Jack Ballard
subject: My thoughts on Roe v Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
Hi Folks, Today marks 49 years since the passage of the landmark Supreme Court decision, Roe v. Wade. This anniversary comes at a time when an indivi | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=8c185b7c4b98477da333a00786505508&_e=UXUD23CYLLUpzgwXThCoT2xy9FnV1VE77xIwgrVAoGPqtLNFX2lViAMWloFj_iSbk60gPMAccMkLFqbguySqCCPhUHTJYSjvHPkGveykCPsdEXS-VME2dlB3tVCcfXyRZmk4yhqS-sLYfhz-SrphUInci3SSKs_LE6v8hqgzJD5k5eEdTXRwZCR9QnES-9r73pg2KAlcoAi3Y5UWLrjxSdDTVp4bhuYgja0kDny7-QrO8Xa8RtAtufRe4aYamcj3_KcXW9l8a2sdyakks2T6Zw%3D%3D) Hi folks, Today marks 49 years since the passage of the landmark Supreme Court decision, _Roe v. Wade_. This anniversary comes at a time when an individual’s right to make decisions regarding their own health is seriously vulnerable. Sometime in the next few months, the current Supreme Court could overturn this landmark decision which we believed was a settled legal precedent. There are complex philosophical and religious aspects to abortion. But one thing is clear. A woman and her doctor should have the legal and medical ability to make decisions regarding all aspects of her health, reproductive and otherwise. If we really want to reduce the number of abortions in this country, overturning _Roe v. Wade_ is a disastrous and dangerous way to do it. A better approach is through honest reproductive education in our homes, churches, and schools, along with giving all adults in this country access to contraceptives where cost isn’t an issue. I’m proud to stand as a voice for women’s reproductive rights today and I truly hope you feel similarly. Best,
Jack

Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. **[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=8c185b7c4b98477da333a00786505508&_e=UXUD23CYLLUpzgwXThCoT3Lb_oqETFIaNXOdygVNxYJgMi56jEPbwCI0yvNnYQENmhqtzQh29WEY6CvY-VAV7qu4QEuw-SNxiiI8J3M71Um_hQ-2XX3fknV3YQn6QplkmA_2uIU-_z5lpgas1t_J10QJ6cvFQ3uJ0gvFIuia76B7rTqlTWq_ROOv7-8vGA77TDn9QAkrYRJDWO-W3lbGs4r1n3mRFuuMpBCJLTMwVRE0NZ6ImW0dBQkF91x7HY-6dW0WDf77kJcBF1-5jSvWx-j1qmbXJHOZZctceL-QaBA0Gtwz1zIsc9ABH6I_J8zbIjmCRXLlnT6zB2OOwF2Vciy3rXTg9HCIURfgjpe7yz8Tb9PV6yqhb68b2ihkFlWtjkT6dCoJYX5JR_FyWwtU_PuMeMPd9vrYcvf3jFMWJdre15k6YgncI6uSpBzEynfBeQgAxMbOsDPMp0BMOKpS4md7ZmBXHs7_8nSUyPH58StEEilEOAxGo82rEe1E-6P6qaTVK1BthXF7qb0SLZKSBQ%3D%3D)**** ** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

49 years ago today, the Supreme Court guaranteed the right to women’s bodily autonomy in their _Roe v. Wade_ decision. Since then, reproductive rights have been protected across the country. But _Roe_ may not see a 50th anniversary, Peter. Later this year, the Court will issue another pivotal decision on Mississippi’s extreme abortion ban — and this decision could mean the end of _Roe v. Wade_. **[Roy will _always_ defend the right to choose here in North Carolina, but in states under GOP control, reproductive rights are in peril. We need you to show your support for _Roe_ by signing our petition calling on the Supreme Court to UPHOLD it — add your name right now >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40958936/326710110/1458084227?refcode=ea.10edbd35-e07b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.10edbd35-e07b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGVkYmQzNS1lMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsKI3Ce8DzsRmISrNXUQtnrTNn44VU9WWz40Ug5sKdY=&emci=04edbd35-e07b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=10edbd35-e07b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=1049176)** Peter, in 2022, the right of women to make their own medical decisions should not be controversial. Nonetheless, ultra-conservative Republicans are committed to restricting abortion access everywhere they can. Once _Roe_ is overturned, 21 states have laws on the books that would immediately ban abortion in all or most cases. **Radical right-wingers are closer than ever to achieving their decades-long goal of defeating the constitutional right to abortion.** Women’s rights are under attack. clean_body: We need your signature immediately! | 49 years ago today, the Supreme Court guaranteed the right to women’s bodily autonomy in their Roe v. Wade decision. Since then, reproductive rights have been protected across the country. But Roe may not see a 50th anniversary, Peter. Later this year, the Court will issue another pivotal decision on Mississippi’s extreme abortion ban — and this decision could mean the end of Roe v. Wade. Peter, in 2022, the right of women to make their own medical decisions should not be controversial. Nonetheless, ultra-conservative Republicans are committed to restricting abortion access everywhere they can. Once Roe is overturned, 21 states have laws on the books that would immediately ban abortion in all or most cases. Radical right-wingers are closer than ever to achieving their decades-long goal of defeating the constitutional right to abortion. Women’s rights are under attack. We MUST join together and stand up to defend abortion access everywhere. | Thank you for taking action, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. subject: [New post] Biden’s reaction to inflation: “My hands are tied.”
body:
theresacoatesellis posted: " YOU DESERVE EXPERIENCE TO FIX DC. IT IS A MESS! As a self-made successful businesswoman with more than 30 years of experience in fixing messes, plus working with a family and strong network of successful entrepreneurs throughout Virginia and this country" | | |
---
## New post on **Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress**
|
---|---
| | [](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1) |
## [Biden’s reaction to inflation: “My hands are tied.”](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/01/22/bidens-reaction-to-inflation-my-hands-are-tied/)
by [theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)
---|---
YOU DESERVE EXPERIENCE TO FIX DC. IT IS A MESS! As a self-made successful businesswoman with more than 30 years of experience in fixing messes, plus working with a family and strong network of successful entrepreneurs throughout Virginia and this country, I have a strong background in all phases of our economy to bring to Washington, DC as your U.S. Congresswoman.
The list is extensive, but here are a few. From working in my dad's auto repair shop, scooping ice-cream in high school, putting myself through college, working in top American investment management firms, providing for my family by managing healthcare, wellness, service businesses, marketing, accounting, helping non-profits, communities for 30 years throughout our country. This is what you deserve. Experience only can fix this mess!
I built my own business in Virginia's 10th District from NOTHING, operated, budgeted, negotiated contracts, hired staff -- did it all -- because that is what small business owners must do to make it through the rises and falls of the economy. We are in a nosedive with career politicians navigating and we will crash. Unless we bring in real experience. No training time available. It is that bad. This is important.
Inflation is at a 40 year high. Wage increases mean nothing with the high and escalating prices and supply shortages that Americans are facing! Wash. Post reported yesterday, Biden’s reaction to the inflation problem: "My HANDS are kind of tied."
As an experienced leader and business owner, I can tell you -- this is the time to roll up your sleeves and GET TO WORK with your head, your network, your HANDS -- all HANDS on deck!
SUPPORT my campaign today! I am running for YOU, your family, and your future. Seriously. This is critical to get the experienced candidate in that seat to flip the house and make our country thrive again. INVEST in Theresa and CONTRIBUTE today: [https://www.TheresaEllisforCongress.com/Contribute](https://www.theresaellisforcongress.com/Contribute?fbclid=IwAR3khlCVNImgrmnAOFGyTFCEFjP0ygXzHQ_3CZb80bi_5jEqnM4smIQapoc)
Washington Post news article on MSN: [Biden’s inflation problem, in stark relief (msn.com)](https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/biden-e2-80-99s-inflation-problem-in-stark-relief/ar-AAT18nL?ocid=uxbndlbing)

clean_body: This is the reality we’re facing | | | Peter, We’re weighing our options as we fight back against the new gerrymandered congressional map that dilutes the voices of Black, brown, and working class voters by chopping up Nashville. What’s clear is that we’ll only be able to stay in this fight if we have a strong base of grassroots support on our side. Like Odessa said, we have to claim our power and make this country work for all of us, not just the wealthy few. Odessa is a strong candidate who can energize working class voters anywhere we bring our message in Tennessee. All across this state, there are communities that have been left behind by absent political leaders and that are ready to come together and shake up the status quo. Thank you, Odessa Kelly HQ | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

body:
My family legally immigrated to the United States when I was an infant. As Christians, we had to escape the persecution of an oppressive religious reg | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a9d1d9f4db894ee7b5f1c530a3396cfc&_e=avPFXOtj3V_DEAb81pju-hFi8bbWg5P7L9i3FQ4w7Yyd-loAU2BQaDI_YNExnkqIGrdTZU8EpbY_2kPW9VwBY1A_SVDnm38JlZ0_STF_1kxO-OiOG4OcroE3rs8vHIRfV9lZQHpWz9KDLLAMcTL6rCwGxRqGNwvFTZA1iTE-1I6yVrPNvqUu9alvK3zDgzUC8uyRl9ae1BU3Mfu-uRGFe97WbtR1wdesU-06IFgcUSmhFlzbBKYlGgDmNFCEMZqUfGNtmtIcIAErJxQbcyf8_itXLwhVBL-NkYEb1tGxQPsX_JhZ2T_3E6090N_-ATUd--LMT8vFCcRRmQeN5SHYKb9jy5NM5Ve_5WLbYQQaTuTCrGlN3_EMpXKZA4epL97IbLMmmc8WkIIkg-pU7d9TM4cMQFX55m8cMqjE-PYMoLi8sTtmusbvu3SdAvdsNy8P)

Fellow Conservative -

I'm Amanda Makki. I'm a proud, America First Conservative running for the 13th Congressional District in Florida.

**My family legally immigrated to the United States when I was an infant to escape the persecution of an oppressive regime in Iran. My parents scraped together whatever resource they could to immigrate to the land of opportunity.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a9d1d9f4db894ee7b5f1c530a3396cfc&_e=avPFXOtj3V_DEAb81pju-hFi8bbWg5P7L9i3FQ4w7Yyd-loAU2BQaDI_YNExnkqIGrdTZU8EpbY_2kPW9VwBY1A_SVDnm38JlZ0_STF_1kxO-OiOG4OcroE3rs8vHIRfV9lZQHpWz9KDLLAMcTL6rCwGxRqGNwvFTZA1iTE-1I6yVrPNvqUu9alvK3zDgzUC8uyRl9ae1BU3Mfu-uRGFe97WbtR1wdesU-06IFgcUSlcLemupzJDpnlZ8t1AJHvvsByJXFB3GILj6ha_pNVyKpwExNLlR5WFJKUvEoYrtu5BTbVWe0DhDY2MX2uxv-yVc4EUc1xDz64irLjoiayw7-9BjhqJ1ls1xIDPdrAy6YrvVud9Z_hRXa82bx1tMgi3H1DOAGKh-AnGRtlucDlu0m085xSo9eT-do_3RBFOOB2HkNnQ5qQUn-azeW_mz-t1)
While my father studied to become a surgeon in the U.S., my mother delivered Yellow Pages and was a nanny to support our family. I witnessed my parents work hard to make their American dream come true. They are the inspiration for everything I do.

A few weeks after September 11, 2001, I went to work in the Army General Counsel's office in the Pentagon. **As a native Farsi speaker, I knew I had to do whatever I could to protect my adopted country.**

From there, I went to work fighting against Obamacare as a Republican Healthcare Advisor in both the House and the Senate. **And in 2020, I stood up to the Democrat lawyers who tried to have ballots mail-in ballots counted that we know shouldn’t have been!**

I love this country, and I have spent my career standing up for the values and principles laid out in the Constitution. [**That's why I've decided to run for Congress in Florida.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a9d1d9f4db894ee7b5f1c530a3396cfc&_e=avPFXOtj3V_DEAb81pju-hFi8bbWg5P7L9i3FQ4w7Yyd-loAU2BQaDI_YNExnkqIGrdTZU8EpbY_2kPW9VwBY1A_SVDnm38JlZ0_STF_1kxO-OiOG4OcroE3rs8vHIRfV9lZQHpWz9KDLLAMcTL6rCwGxRqGNwvFTZA1iTE-1I6yVrPNvqUu9alvK3zDgzUC8uyRl9ae1BU3Mfu-uRGFe97WbtR1wdesU-06IFgcUSnKdZN_7Tr4nR-U4YxZIzSTsSrS7LUSw1xmFxU7TOB7hX7HsIzjgqcaqesP1yO_0eWlSrqEqP8RlQMQ7erkbXKxVh-j0poybAeVu_EBI37hz879tuDAuD3UFNSLWh59fUew_NboE-Yx1FfhAsQe6aF2rG0xQYnaUPBEtouRljMFgnrWM7PJ77hZogprfVWTQiyu6j-UhGZ0GMpp3r__pb49)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a9d1d9f4db894ee7b5f1c530a3396cfc&_e=avPFXOtj3V_DEAb81pju-hFi8bbWg5P7L9i3FQ4w7Yyd-loAU2BQaDI_YNExnkqIGrdTZU8EpbY_2kPW9VwBY1A_SVDnm38JlZ0_STF_1kxO-OiOG4OcroE3rs8vHIRfV9lZQHpWz9KDLLAMcTL6rCwGxRqGNwvFTZA1iTE-1I6yVrPNvqUu9alvK3zDgzUC8uyRl9ae1BU3Mfu-uRGFe97WbtR1wdesU-06IFgcUSm2TiyHjIJS9uTO-H1EEWUCaM36S-cWkfxKmQvpRoG6KzBBU1Yv9Jg-9tAX6RRFwPZzhOqizThdRh_ZSeSI4mgRuWxEXXPcLoG1BRP_EqaQSfsL7CLMRHM8m2UzCG6RQMADKBDx-12CZ1eGlMyEWhYc0skZRxnN3-G3bQKFePp6_7X0b6QcQEh8CfRB6cex3TDOGKBcwvyJrh5MaSqXL3G_)
I experienced the American Dream firsthand, and I'm sickened by now the Leftists in Washington are trying to destroy it. **My RINO opponent was an “avid” two-time Obama supporter. There's no telling who she'll side with if Florida elects her to the House.**

RINO's and Democrats want to turn our beautiful nation into their socialist dreamland. My family didn't sacrifice everything and leave Iran to live in a country where we could be persecuted for our thoughts and canceled for not agreeing with the Woke.

The reality is that this election could be our last chance to save this nation from the Left's destruction.

I have fought for this American dream. I will not stand by and let the radical-Leftist agenda destroy it.

[**If you are with me, let me know by standing up and fighting alongside me today. Please, pitch in $25, $50 or even $100 right now to help me win.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a9d1d9f4db894ee7b5f1c530a3396cfc&_e=avPFXOtj3V_DEAb81pju-hFi8bbWg5P7L9i3FQ4w7Yyd-loAU2BQaDI_YNExnkqIGrdTZU8EpbY_2kPW9VwBY1A_SVDnm38JlZ0_STF_1kxO-OiOG4OcroE3rs8vHIRfV9lZQHpWz9KDLLAMcTL6rCwGxRqGNwvFTZA1iTE-1I6yVrPNvqUu9alvK3zDgzUC8uyRl9ae1BU3Mfu-uRGFe97WbtR1wdesU-06IFgcUSkk7KrUa_eY7ZxRXFbzDxCrPFaV0h3GosfyZIFZLvxsRb82Wm7o-8PK7wu63WGpMEGyArWg7B0womHZJcH4iqFIaED7_pgIZW6ZSXzGyayswwqZFuCSbM46wBvcu00hEoUO6UxffT-5CQy-ZydnyR6qCWNyBmCE4DO6LI3NCl8f6wgCBFr1amw6KeeE3T349BmLLxfveeU8buoaBLhMdHPL)

Sincerely,

**_Amanda Makki_**
Republican for Florida's 13th Congressional District

[ DONATE TODAY»](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a9d1d9f4db894ee7b5f1c530a3396cfc&_e=avPFXOtj3V_DEAb81pju-hFi8bbWg5P7L9i3FQ4w7Yyd-loAU2BQaDI_YNExnkqIGrdTZU8EpbY_2kPW9VwBY1A_SVDnm38JlZ0_STF_1kxO-OiOG4OcroE3rs8vHIRfV9lZQHpWz9KDLLAMcTL6rCwGxRqGNwvFTZA1iTE-1I6yVrPNvqUu9alvK3zDgzUC8uyRl9ae1BU3Mfu-uRGFe97WbtR1wdesU-06IFgcUSnYQUPj4yj9Rr-3dUMDO6-670wzJkYDz_ovgwrpwNDEq0HCC-8UDdhdeiqBDmywU2GaWYdA3yfeZMj4Skt_Qt9S-OJEvirbiV7S09tRhw-iAAIqOIBeuF0XZbljUCKOv22MUXw4SxYO1wiLA3c61-FNnxgYi3KRbSohHhoyC8v9_YLmHsDL6nMq5PAg1rFg-3vt6bUlU3MwQnm1ZU77tGYo)

| Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress

subject: Your money - easy come, easy go?!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aaf6b33e6ee6/were-off-and-running-6703606?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# Money ... easy come, easy go?

People talk a lot about where a candidate's donations come from. Some of my opposition is establishment - funded by big pharma donors and promoted by lobbyists. Some are self-funded or funded by one or two individuals - those candidates don't excite the base, and lose general elections for us. A swamp-free, grassroots candidate garnering voter support is exactly the kind of change we need. I'm exactly that candidate, which is one reason I stepped up. We HAVE to take Oregon back during THIS election.

_No one ever talks about the other side of campaign financing, though! _ It's my theory that the way a gubernatorial candidate spends your donations is probably the same as the attitude with which they will approach taxpayer money and the state budget. Easy come, easy go, right?

Is a candidate spending hundreds of thousands of dollars for a team of consultants to tell him what to think, what to say, and what people need? Or does your candidate already know your issues inside and out? Is a candidate paying for $5,000 venues when a $45 venue would reach just as many voters? Does she bring a $75 pop-up to meet and greets? Or does she rent giant LED flatscreens to see her name in lights - literally! Glitz is NOT grassroots!

**I take your donations just as seriously as I will take your hard-earned tax dollars.** There's no waste in my campaign, and I will approach all of my recommendations for our state budget with the same attitude!
_**If you're so inclined ... please chip in today! **_ Your donations help me stop my opposition from buying the primary with a flood of TV ads.**Your dollars will be effectively spent.** I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.

Yours,
_Kerry_

Some are self-funded or funded by one or two individuals - those candidates don't excite the base, and lose general elections for us. A swamp-free, grassroots candidate garnering voter support is exactly the kind of change we need. I'm exactly that candidate, which is one reason I stepped up. We HAVE to take Oregon back during THIS election. No one ever talks about the other side of campaign financing, though! It's my theory that the way a gubernatorial candidate spends your donations is probably the same as the attitude with which they will approach taxpayer money and the state budget. Easy come, easy go, right? Is a candidate spending hundreds of thousands of dollars for a team of consultants to tell him what to think, what to say, and what people need? Or does your candidate already know your issues inside and out? Is a candidate paying for $5,000 venues when a $45 venue would reach just as many voters? Does she bring a $75 pop-up to meet and greets? Or does she rent giant LED flatscreens to see her name in lights - literally! Glitz is NOT grassroots! I take your donations just as seriously as I will take your hard-earned tax dollars. There's no waste in my campaign, and I will approach all of my recommendations for our state budget with the same attitude! If you're so inclined ... please chip in today! Your donations help me stop my opposition from buying the primary with a flood of TV ads.Your dollars will be effectively spent. I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you. Yours, Kerry | "DONATE TODAY!" | Your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more will help me achieve critical goals like attending events in all 36 Oregon counties! LEARN MORE AT | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Kerry McQuisten for Oregon, All rights reserved.

name: Team Schmidt
subject: More Support for Derek!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This past week was another big one for Team Schmidt, with Derek receiving the endorsement of several leaders of the Republican Party here in Kansas an Friend, **This past week was another big one for Team Schmidt, with Derek receiving the endorsement of several leaders of the Republican Party here in Kansas and across the country. **
We’re sharing these not just because we are really proud of them - we are - but more importantly because we want YOUR support if you haven’t already joined our movement and we ask you to forward this email and share these with friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team as well. [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=2606eef6a94d40009319638691789f85&_e=n5ZJDawtmWsBLUmcfPVCNqANGqrqSuZB7GVO-wT1PuLijpd4gjS7tWbmn6aXsc4EWYvVn6QfQfpZBxsFBQhDE3F2RDR6dEbI0LFwdyIGNGKC097TKXrp7yFdgDCxEIN0Vau0lIWtSdT9itgBEoUANrQ01R5dVVPfEwWS_lu33xalxIYQbtCppZjeGe7qoPz9o4FDYvhkM1qY7Xk84LaJPbQUAJCRR-gAgQcGBYqX_4-3CyK5W12fmhnl-Cqz6dWl6VtRw2WrRjnBivelzAGJ8unqo3a8smdql-vtAMBGSqcqa9pZ93Hxb8oERLM9vBedD6lb78e3Nid5jU8cog6jHRx_DpfjVgeWu7MBlNW6MxPTDiv3_m8oho6uvP3EtZb6PjsBzgF8soFuOZzvIHMBj9lmo96gq_L8JkaW1nX-7wrbjlhPqMOA6eTXKHlCCabzf5za_nEPJdm9zAPC2RJjtzgUUZgPfyOTlp2b8BXAY-vIzpRKeJsCz61D_dOHccSM) Check out each of our recent endorsements below: _“Kansas and the nation are in constant and dire need of the leadership supported by the conservative and patriotic ideals that Derek Schmidt has provided as attorney general. His constant and proven track record of defending and enforcing constitutional rights demonstrate that as governor, Derek will stand strong in the representation of his people against the forces of federal tyranny.”_ **_– Chairman Matt Schlapp, Conservative Political Action Coalition (CPAC)_** _“Derek Schmidt’s strong values and common sense leadership will govern Kansas with a steady hand.”_ **_– Exec Committee, Sedgwick County GOP_** _“Given his commitment to taking on the Kelly and Biden administrations in his role as Attorney General, the Johnson County Executive Committee has endorsed Derek Schmidt for Governor.” _ **_– Exec Committee, Johnson County GOP_** _“We believe, just like President Trump and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo, that Derek is the right choice for Kansas Republicans.” _ **_– Exec Committee, Shawnee County GOP_** _"I have known and worked with Derek Schmidt for about 15 years, and I know him to be a person of paramount integrity and ethics who is always working for the betterment of Kansans. He will be a strong leader for our state who will unite Kansans around our shared values and work every day to make our state the best in the country to live and raise a family. He has my full support in the race for governor." _ **_– Former State Senator Kay Wolf_** _As a State Senator, I observed firsthand the outstanding work of Attorney General Derek Schmidt to both enhance public safety and to protect the individual rights of Kansans from governmental overreach. There is simply no one in Kansas that can match his combination of education, experience and temperament. Derek Schmidt is exactly the Governor Kansas needs to prosper through these challenging times and he has my full endorsement._ **_– Former State Senator Kevin Braun_** **Thanks for[standing with Derek](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=2606eef6a94d40009319638691789f85&_e=n5ZJDawtmWsBLUmcfPVCNqANGqrqSuZB7GVO-wT1PuLijpd4gjS7tWbmn6aXsc4EWYvVn6QfQfpZBxsFBQhDE3F2RDR6dEbI0LFwdyIGNGKC097TKXrp7yFdgDCxEIN0Vau0lIWtSdT9itgBEoUANrQ01R5dVVPfEwWS_lu33xalxIYQbtCppZjeGe7qoPz9o4FDYvhkM1qY7Xk84LaJPbQUAJCRR-gAgQcGBYqX_4-3CyK5W12fmhnl-Cqz6dWl6VtRw2WrRjnBivelzAGJ8hxFUFfjTt02yAW3ywPr1VeS5s4ttN7ho_A_DlTGLwOaAsz9vHqy8xXjR-RRAQmmwrcMfQzda0mRv0OIB-N8S7HRpSMNGeISPIktQHuI5d-bmdRNrnhUi7DB1nuj98qFjVtoXRU92MTuNHXA_BukLwO40kykccxjzOMSKT_CySY0W3QSQwwFt9lrsek8g1lDAcXW-ioxfvxf0BjxrQz_QgPq9tovYtEPztQ2JTNg57kU) and our conservative values. We’re so glad to have your support!** Thanks, Team Schmidt | |
