clean_body: This past week was another big one for Team Schmidt, with Derek receiving the endorsement of several leaders of the Republican Party here in Kansas an Friend, This past week was another big one for Team Schmidt, with Derek receiving the endorsement of several leaders of the Republican Party here in Kansas and across the country. We’re sharing these not just because we are really proud of them - we are - but more importantly because we want YOUR support if you haven’t already joined our movement and we ask you to forward this email and share these with friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team as well. Check out each of our recent endorsements below: “Kansas and the nation are in constant and dire need of the leadership supported by the conservative and patriotic ideals that Derek Schmidt has provided as attorney general. His constant and proven track record of defending and enforcing constitutional rights demonstrate that as governor, Derek will stand strong in the representation of his people against the forces of federal tyranny.” – Chairman Matt Schlapp, Conservative Political Action Coalition (CPAC) “Derek Schmidt’s strong values and common sense leadership will govern Kansas with a steady hand.” – Exec Committee, Sedgwick County GOP “Given his commitment to taking on the Kelly and Biden administrations in his role as Attorney General, the Johnson County Executive Committee has endorsed Derek Schmidt for Governor.” – Exec Committee, Johnson County GOP “We believe, just like President Trump and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo, that Derek is the right choice for Kansas Republicans.” – Exec Committee, Shawnee County GOP "I have known and worked with Derek Schmidt for about 15 years, and I know him to be a person of paramount integrity and ethics who is always working for the betterment of Kansans. He will be a strong leader for our state who will unite Kansans around our shared values and work every day to make our state the best in the country to live and raise a family. He has my full support in the race for governor." – Former State Senator Kay Wolf As a State Senator, I observed firsthand the outstanding work of Attorney General Derek Schmidt to both enhance public safety and to protect the individual rights of Kansans from governmental overreach. There is simply no one in Kansas that can match his combination of education, experience and temperament. Derek Schmidt is exactly the Governor Kansas needs to prosper through these challenging times and he has my full endorsement. – Former State Senator Kevin Braun Thanks for and our conservative values. We’re so glad to have your support! Thanks, Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Trump rally BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)

I've had it.

Donald Trump just held his FIRST rally of the year.

_He smeared my Democrats. He threatened our Majority. And he set the stage for his potential Presidential run._

_**Now, I 'm going to make Trump's first rally completely BACKFIRE.**_

**[Here's my plan: I'm calling for 1,000 Democrats to become Majority Makers and rush in a $3 monthly recurring contribution before midnight. We're going to OVERSHADOW Trump's despicable rally and stop him and Republicans from EVER holding an ounce of power again. I will not allow this shameful one-term President to rally his base, spread his lies, and barge his way back into power. I'm calling on you to meet this moment with me so that we have a fighting chance of winning this election. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Majority Makers are some of my best grassroots Democrats because they know that in 2022, there's never been more at stake.

Majority Makers will receive exclusive updates about the state of our races, opportunities to hear directly from me and other Democratic leaders, and a personalized member card.
| [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
MAJORITY MAKER STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

I don't say this lightly.

Trump has hinted his return to the White House hinges on Republicans taking back the House.

**And if his plan succeeds, a total Republican takeover could be all but guaranteed.**

I'm calling for 1,000 Democrats to fight with me, rush in a $3 monthly recurring contribution before midnight, and join my team fighting to protect our Majority from Trump's grasp.

**[Can I count on your help to make Trump's first rally completely BACKFIRE?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/NaPAfrXP~)**

| [**Donate $1 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
---
| [**Donate $5 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
---

| [**Donate $15 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-CN_)

| [**Donate $20 >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTRP~)
---

Thank you,

Nancy

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46286914&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MjQxNDI0MwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46286914&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MjQxNDI0MwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

body:

| | | **BREAKING via NBC News: “Poll numbers are pointing to a midterm shellacking for Democrats”**

Chip in $5 RIGHT NOW to help us stop McConnell’s momentum>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220122-PollingAlert-Shellacking-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220122-PollingAlert-Shellacking-ETG-sl1&akid=2687%2E9716520%2Exo5I8Y)**

We’ve got some bad news, team: **MSNBC says Democrats are in “‘shellacking’ territory”** \-- and we have AT MOST only a few months to turn things around.

The biggest headwind, according to our strategists, is that **Senate Republicans raised over $100 MILLION last year** \-- more than they've **EVER** raised leading up to an election year!

Put simply, we’re in for a rude awakening in November unless this grassroots team steps up NOW to hit every single target from here on out. **But we're still BEHIND on today's must-hit $20,000 goal, with just hours to go until midnight!**

**[Please, pitch in $5 or whatever you can _before midnight_ to help us avoid a midterm shellacking and protect our Democratic majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220122-PollingAlert-Shellacking-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220122-PollingAlert-Shellacking-ETG-sl1&akid=2687%2E9716520%2Exo5I8Y)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
|

| | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=179e2b9958&e=9920087750)
---
| Peter,

It was great to be with so many pro-life warriors yesterday. I joined fellow conservative Texans - Congressman Chip Roy, Congressman Beth Van Duyne, and Congressman Michael Cloud - for a pro-life congressional prayer breakfast hosted by America First Policy Institute, Christians Engaged, and Intercessors for America.
---
| [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=19324ca58b&e=9920087750)
---
[ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=33658c454f&e=9920087750)
---
| | The message was humbling and gives me hope for the future. I am honored to receive "A" ratings from organizations like Susan B. Anthony List and National Right to Life, as well as the endorsement of Texas Right to Life. But this week's March for Life served as a reminder that we still have work to do. Rest assured, I will continue to defend the unborn in Washington.

Semper Fi,
Congressman Van Taylor

---

name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: 1 year since I was sworn in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
One year ago, grassroots folks like you helped ensure two Democratic Senators took office in Georgia, reclaiming the Senate for Democrats.
#
Peter,
One year ago, grassroots folks like you helped ensure two Democratic Senators took office in Georgia, reclaiming the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've made huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more.
But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority.
**Here’s the deal though, Peter: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR!**
**CNN has called me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as their TOP target for defeat.**
**So I need to ask:[Will you contribute $5 right now – anything you can spare before midnight tonight – to my reelection campaign and Dick Durbin so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority and continue delivering for our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40959477/326734299/-1352206458?refcode=dd_em_220122_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGM4YTcyYi1mMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gmI6SmU9RGi47i9pEU0leXLBAyxWlwTCum-YstOtzU=)**
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black Senator in Georgia's history.
Don't forget, with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control. **[So will you give $5 or more now – before the critical midnight deadline – to help me win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40959478/326734300/-1352206458?refcode=dd_em_220122_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGM4YTcyYi1mMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gmI6SmU9RGi47i9pEU0leXLBAyxWlwTCum-YstOtzU=)**
Thank you, Peter. It's going to take all of us coming together to win this.
– Reverend Raphael Warnock

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40959479/326734301/-1352206458?refcode=dd_em_220122_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGM4YTcyYi1mMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gmI6SmU9RGi47i9pEU0leXLBAyxWlwTCum-YstOtzU=)****

clean_body: One year ago, grassroots folks like you helped ensure two Democratic Senators took office in Georgia, reclaiming the Senate for Democrats. Peter, One year ago, grassroots folks like you helped ensure two Democratic Senators took office in Georgia, reclaiming the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've made huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more. But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority. Here’s the deal though, Peter: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR! CNN has called me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as their TOP target for defeat. So I need to ask:= As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black Senator in Georgia's history. Don't forget, with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control. = Thank you, Peter. It's going to take all of us coming together to win this. – Reverend Raphael Warnock **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: V. Demings
subject: This is a dire moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio
| | |
---
I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $13,441 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and****CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40959510/326734447/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2210-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjJiNDlkZS1mMDdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9og6FM2DUGBvheYzP8Mxi-8xnng9SlTsFjPXMTSlPG4=)**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: RE: SUBPOENA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

After the FBI raid on my apartment last year failed, the Deep State has unleashed its latest weapon to take me down. You’re my only hope of fighting back.

clean_body: I have been subpoenaed by Pelosi’s Congress. | Friend, We knew this was coming... Pelosi’s Congress has subpoenaed me. There’s nothing I can even say to Congress! As President Trump’s personal attorney, I have attorney-client privilege and executive privilege. And Congress damn well knows that! This is nothing but a political witch hunt to try and take down each and every one of President Trump’s loyal allies. After the FBI raid on my apartment last year failed, the Deep State has unleashed its latest weapon to take me down. You’re my only hope of fighting back. The Committee Chair responsible for issuing the subpoena – who, by the way, is NOT a lawyer – stated that I may have “advanced unsupported theories about election fraud...” Has it now become a crime to question the integrity of our elections? At a time when inflation is hitting a 40-year record, crime is soaring, our southern border is in chaos, and America’s supply chains are breaking down, Pelosi’s Congress has chosen to wage war against its political enemies. Friend: this is the monstrous face of the swamp President Trump led a mission to drain. The Deep State is trying to destroy me because of my allegiance to the man who fought to finally put the needs and interests of the American people FIRST. They’d love nothing more than to take down the lawyer who SUCCESSFULLY defended President Trump from impeachment scams and witch hunts. But now I simply have to ask for your help as I face enormous legal costs during this latest attack on my freedom. Thank you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Peter,
---
Throughout our nation’s history, America has been pushed to the brink.
---
_From the Civil war to the Great Depression to the stagflation crisis of the 1970s, we’ve endured a lot – but we’ve always come through and emerged stronger._
---
_Today, we’re facing yet another crisis. The Left’s radical socialist policies are destroying our economy, our border is wide open, and we appear weaker than ever on the global stage._
---
But I believe in America – and I know you do too. We can turn things around. But we MUST elect strong conservative leaders who are committed to solving the problems we face.
---

In many ways, the current administration reminds me of the failed Democrat leadership of the 1970s.
---
Americans were similarly uncertain about our future back then. We also faced skyrocketing inflation, a sluggish economy, and embarrassments on the world stage.
---
**But in 1980, a new generation of conservative leaders led by Ronald Reagan stepped up and brought our America roaring back from the cusp of ruin.**
---
Now, we need to FLIP the House by electing a wave of similar leaders who will get our country back on the right path.
---
_I’m ready to be one of those leaders. For my entire career, I’ve fought for my country and my constituents._
---
But I can’t do it on my own. I need the backing of grassroots conservatives like YOU who believe in America and are ready to invest in my fight to save it.

clean_body: I believe in us. | Peter, Throughout our nation’s history, America has been pushed to the brink. From the Civil war to the Great Depression to the stagflation crisis of the 1970s, we’ve endured a lot – but we’ve always come through and emerged stronger. Today, we’re facing yet another crisis. The Left’s radical socialist policies are destroying our economy, our border is wide open, and we appear weaker than ever on the global stage. But I believe in America – and I know you do too. We can turn things around. But we MUST elect strong conservative leaders who are committed to solving the problems we face. In many ways, the current administration reminds me of the failed Democrat leadership of the 1970s. Americans were similarly uncertain about our future back then. We also faced skyrocketing inflation, a sluggish economy, and embarrassments on the world stage. But in 1980, a new generation of conservative leaders led by Ronald Reagan stepped up and brought our America roaring back from the cusp of ruin. Now, we need to FLIP the House by electing a wave of similar leaders who will get our country back on the right path. I’m ready to be one of those leaders. For my entire career, I’ve fought for my country and my constituents. But I can’t do it on my own. I need the backing of grassroots conservatives like YOU who believe in America and are ready to invest in my fight to save it. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Half a century wasn’t enough time?
body:
Hi there, Today is the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , which provided the right to choose. Now Republicans have effectively ended it. Which begs the question: why didn’t Democrats codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law at any point in the last 49 years? Half a century wasn’t enough time? [**In Congress, I will fight for the right to choose and for reproductive freedom for people of all genders. Will you donate just $3 now to help me win, so I can fight for that in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40959553/326734685/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjEzYTY5OC1mNzdiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AtUbUYscixJo9H2lWTwHpmibaGPfpFx7FzVv50Ziuc=) It isn’t enough for Democrats to say they support the right to choose. name: Paul Gazelka
subject: I don't compromise on life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
Today I am marching in Saint Paul [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=50f8929fcd7b42c29ff7f7af6d82004b&_e=h0shIQvItCxOiiM54DiftL4yQ10XhWKDBW0ZuEA6lb0LKjVANcgiviXSzkPIUWzgU9jNb5YE2FjaJKkpJ-WWUpSW7--PgeYGqqFRsevK1KVJ2FHo2Y9zsnqBasKZERh_3CG2Kl8cbR8VGRprzPbcmFH9bwF2GLaut9GXLqWsCR3ok7sYJZaAz7Hz9r_2TG0rjP8VKiXJsWN0zlJS_3QEIyCGMb1_nh8d75T8gTfu0tlAcN1TIR4fUlD2u87--o6_A8SQfphEkdo9UIYxbnFsP03erNOGwjygWdajLtx2KFvLFHbtg7tXrlbrP16RzEYYGcCa61LMbR2qz9P26naW4ZsXUS3nIroMsAb-qDpfgqs%3D) My friend,
Today, on this Celebration of Life Day, I was marching in Saint Paul. While I was marching for life, I was also marching for the MILLIONS of lives lost since Roe V. Wade was decided 49 years ago. As a legislator, I voted 100% for life and I co-authored Parent's Right to Know and Positive Alternative Act, both of which were signed into law. During my time as Senate Majority Leader, the Senate added additional legal defense against a lawsuit that sought to eliminate many of Minnesota's pro-life laws. Unfortunately, many of the bills I worked on, including ending all taxpayer funding of abortion, were vetoed. That is the exact reason we need a pro-life Republican in the Governor's office. **My beliefs are simple and uncompromising: ALL human life has inherent value, from conception t o natural death.** [**Join Me In Supporting Life >> Donate NOW**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=50f8929fcd7b42c29ff7f7af6d82004b&_e=h0shIQvItCxOiiM54DiftL4yQ10XhWKDBW0ZuEA6lb0LKjVANcgiviXSzkPIUWzgU9jNb5YE2FjaJKkpJ-WWUpSW7--PgeYGqqFRsevK1KVJ2FHo2Y9zsnqBasKZERh_3CG2Kl8cbR8VGRprzPbcmMLTp_En031vAkA_waCN7L6rlxGn5EQaf1xo6W22_VZo7mDkYCXiC0oO04M695M1aOWHf4YOjelkjkCrEt6qJcQ7AGJSy9nDBiADWuTiOEqR_o1jYJxEBL6VUE2Ti4tGKXJthqoriR4mPLbkCS6Kb1PdR-cWQtvsgoSAsOGsZEgXXbkP0VYK-7CWXVDmbgWm5H4lKnO09ovRZlCk-X7s-jQ%3D) I never compromised my values as Senate Majority Leader, and I won't compromise as your Governor. I will continue my fight for life on day one as your governor, but until then **I will continue to march, pray, and fight. ** Thank you, [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=50f8929fcd7b42c29ff7f7af6d82004b&_e=h0shIQvItCxOiiM54DiftL4yQ10XhWKDBW0ZuEA6lb0LKjVANcgiviXSzkPIUWzgU9jNb5YE2FjaJKkpJ-WWUpSW7--PgeYGqqFRsevK1KVJ2FHo2Y9zsnqBasKZERh_3CG2Kl8cbR8VGRprzPbcmM03AdB-QiYO7ChaJVV_yMAa9ncWe7fRVtrvdiqkSNxdRvMSpxb_rLG3KQhYCCvfs1wu6plxtQIV7q67-PhOnE7YNwam3ctstcMkq8sGqTV9SyU2lT16K5psfxq31xHgFQZkQDvAze_LjHbf9lG8GQ10REnEzbkYCO3prO010OLzCuWJmnr_nwES1KnUlnZ1Cx1wRB8U3xN_9QOrHIbfuk4%3D) Paul Gazelka [**Donate For Life Today**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=50f8929fcd7b42c29ff7f7af6d82004b&_e=h0shIQvItCxOiiM54DiftL4yQ10XhWKDBW0ZuEA6lb0LKjVANcgiviXSzkPIUWzgU9jNb5YE2FjaJKkpJ-WWUpSW7--PgeYGqqFRsevK1KVJ2FHo2Y9zsnqBasKZERh_3CG2Kl8cbR8VGRprzPbcmPw0VhicpUsJqiUpSWA7deRS9SArlmz1DblLDpmr5QcXEft5qTzcEyn_-aoaNC4vbtacfeP5G8hdLO4bz2JcqoO56sHT_uj-v-mKixHsrwHaBuOjZ2meRbnnk1MrIXQSi-BauowUb0BzjdGWDci3tP1KZrw2TRCMfl3DIj7CCFF0kwOGzXMkRvoNbOshtC7KyYCChqpSoqtgdTXaJtbUVWQ%3D) name: Tim Ryan
subject: I knew coming out against the filibuster was a risky decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ][IMG]

Hello,

In a minute, [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6512?t=1007&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]I’ll ask you to add a critically important donation to my
campaign—a race that will decide Senate control. But first, can I have
just a moment of your time to explain why your support today is so
important?

Coming out against the filibuster was a risky decision. I knew the moment
I supported abolishing the filibuster, right-wing groups would start
flooding Ohio with cash and slamming our campaign with nasty attacks.

But it was the right thing to do. What’s the point of having a Democratic
majority if we can’t accomplish anything? I’m proud of my decision and I
won’t let anything stand in the way of delivering for hardworking Ohioans.

But let me be clear: this makes us the GOP’s top target. They’re already
spending upwards of $40 million (with millions more on the way) to make
sure Ohio’s open Senate seat stays red.

Abolishing the filibuster is the right thing to do, but it makes us
especially vulnerable to right-wing attacks. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6513?amount=25&t=1008&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]That’s why I’m personally
asking you to chip
in $25 today
to help us fight back against the GOP and flip Ohio blue so we can make
progress for Ohioans and all Americans.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6513?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]Donate
$25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6513?t=1011&amount=50&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6513?t=1012&amount=100&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6513?t=1013&amount=200&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6513?t=1014&amount=250&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6513?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ]Other Amount

Political experts are saying we’re one of the seats most likely to flip
blue, but I can’t win this race without your support. That’s why I’m
counting on your grassroots donation today.

Thank you. I really mean it.

— Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2122%2E3611125%2EppuoUl ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

subject: I want YOU to be my VIP guest

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: We must protect abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Republicans are hard at work to fully eliminate abortion access across the country. We can’t let them.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220122-541-footer-ak&t=2&akid=541%2E90090%2EojKDvf)
Today marks 49 years since the Supreme Court ruled that people have a constitutional right to access an abortion. We cannot, and will not, let right-wing politicians and judges control our bodies and roll back the clock on reproductive rights. **Morgan is the only Black woman in this race for Senate, a legislative body where there are currently NO Black women.**
**Reproductive rights are under attack. We must pass the Women's Health Protection Act, protect and codify Roe v. Wade, and expand the court.**
[**_Please join us in taking a stand for abortion access by making a contribution right now._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21935?t=3&akid=541%2E90090%2EojKDvf)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21941?refcode=em20220122-541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=541%2E90090%2EojKDvf)**
Let us be very clear:**Abortion is health care, and health care is a human right. We have a chance in Ohio to replace an anti-choice Senator with a bold defender of reproductive rights. We need your help to make it happen.**[**_Can you chip in today to join our movement?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21935?t=23&akid=541%2E90090%2EojKDvf)****
And when we take this campaign to the United States Senate, you’ll never have to question where Morgan stands on this issue — ever. **Morgan is the only candidate in this race who has always stood for access to abortion and reproductive rights.**
As a Senator, Morgan will fight to unrig Trump and McConnell’s stolen Supreme Court by expanding the Court — and will always protect abortion access for all Ohioans.
In solidarity,
Morgan Harper HQ
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21935?t=24&akid=541%2E90090%2EojKDvf)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220122-541-footer&t=25&refcode2=541_90090_ojKDvf&akid=541%2E90090%2EojKDvf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=541%2E90090%2EojKDvf)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: moms for KATIE PORTER
subject: Far from over

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

body:
New yard signs are here and we’d love to send you one.
#
Exciting news. Our Beto for Texas yard signs are here!
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51970?refcode=ema20220122-172816&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=172816%2E444211%2EbJg5C2)
We’d love to send you an official Beto for Texas yard sign today, so you can show your support for Beto in Cresco. All you have to do is chip in $15 or more toward our campaign, and we’ll send a yard sign straight to your door to say thanks.
**[Pitch in $15 or more today using this link and we’ll send you an official Beto for Texas yard sign →](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51970?refcode=ema20220122-172816&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=172816%2E444211%2EbJg5C2)**

We can’t wait to see folks repping their support from their yards and windows as Beto and our team travel around the state.
Thank you for being on our team!
More soon,
Cassie Henry
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

body:

Dear Peter, We are just about an hour away from Nicolaus' first town hall of 2022\. We want you to join us. You can **[RSVP right here](https://www.nick4wa.com/townhall?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_22_01&n=2),** and you can talk with Nicolaus. Nicolaus is ready to talk to you! We look forward to seeing you soon!
* * *

Team -- Rand Paul is no stranger to flat-out lies.

First, he fanned the flames of insurrection by claiming that the 2020 election was stolen. **Now, he’s making up conspiracy theories about Dr. Fauci, one of the hardest-working people in the fight against COVID-19, for his own political gain.**

But Dr. Fauci isn't backing down. He just SHREDDED Rand Paul’s reprehensible behavior **_on national television_** , but now we need to know if Democrats like you are ready to stand with Dr. Fauci -- **_before the GOP's attacks get even worse._**

**WE NEED 172 MORE SIGNATURES FROM PENNSYLVANIA:****Who do you trust more to tell the truth?**

Thank you,

Team DSCC
